subject: Find Out Who Tucker Carlson Thinks Is “One Of The Craziest People In The Whole United States Congress”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
Listen to what Tucker Carlson just said about my opponent. |
---
| | **TUCKER CARLSON:** **KATIE PORTER IS “ONE OF THE CRAZIEST PEOPLE IN THE WHOLE UNITED STATES CONGRESS”**
Peter,

I just finished an interview with Tucker Carlson exposing Katie “Open Border” Porter for her radical, far-left ideology that has led to thousands of illegal immigrant encounters on California’s beaches.

I have to agree with Tucker’s analysis that she’s “[one of the craziest people in the whole United States Congress.](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=b66afc3bb0&e=8a657725d1)”
---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEAT KATIE PORTER](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=d5da968352&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE NOW TO DEFEAT KATIE PORTER")
---
| For example, just recently Katie Porter has:
* Suggested abortion is a good solution to inflation
* Claimed that government spending doesn’t cause inflation
* Lied about her support for trillions in spending and earmarks
* And more

Her woke, radical left agenda is so far out of touch with the voters she claims to represent, which is probably why our race was just moved from “Likely Democrat” to “Lean Democrat.”

**Momentum is on our side, and with your help, we will win! ** But in order to do that, we need to be able to compete with her nearly $20 million war chest. That’s why I need you to answer Tucker Carlson’s call ASAP to defeat Katie Porter. Please, will you help?
---
| [DONATE $10](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=931201f7ea&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE $10")
---
| [DONATE $25](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=899e18f37f&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE $25")
---
| [DONATE $50](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=7474871348&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE $50")
---
| **The bottom line is this: if we are going to take back the House for Republicans, we need to flip 5 seats. Everybody knows this is one of those seats.** It’s been identified by both national Republicans and national Democrats as one of the most important seats in the entire country. So, we need to put everything we can into winning it.

**Please - don’t let Tucker Carlson and the Republican Party down. Donate ASAP:**

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Volunteers Needed! Can you help?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, I’m actively looking for volunteers and interns for my reelection campaign. With the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee targeting me, I could really use your help.
Hi Peter,**I'm actively looking for volunteers and interns for my reelection campaign.****With the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee targeting me, I could use your help.** Can you take my survey to indicate how you would like to get involved?

[Take Survey](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-vlutlkd-idtjvlhlh-r/) **We need help knocking on doors, making phone calls, writing letters to the editor, walking in parades, and more! **[**If you can't volunteer but would like to help fuel our grassroots campaign financially, you can donate here!**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-vlutlkd-idtjvlhlh-y/) Everything helps. Feel free to forward this to a friend you think might be interested! **If you know of someone who would like to volunteer or intern, please reach out to my team at Kim@SteilForWisconsin.com. We would love to get them involved as we work to turn Wisconsin red!**Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Take Survey](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-vlutlkd-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-vlutlkd-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-vlutlkd-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-vlutlkd-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-vlutlkd-l-k) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

body:
| | | Hi Campaign Volunteers! Happy Pride Month!**** Recently, CA-34’s corporate incumbent Jimmy Gomez mailed out hundreds of thousands of mailers **smearing our campaign with lies and fear mongering****.** In response,**I published an[op-ed with Knock LA](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/Z_ZqkvoEVNEBXR4DaXxzv1n4W4OMSGBPmOyTXGro97WQ7sw9hEkXsMeqZ-xoV6roHp6Xx4WCzqiwMcOzsQfEXQLXkxnpLChlKsGRw4ZcsdxM-0hk52c1nf5maHfTqfsSCY5d-jq9EAKCHqwd2X0RVzaJxpyjFFltqguFu7FFWRST7Cvj-FolCzbR8ngSPTQGlIP0mOeaGDmI4ul6RoVtez1e7y_bJwJmJJsynaaCdZemuWzcsxmlWiOSkxggJfKDi3sBSOWVIpjkpqBQQ7hodgcgr0aFZBIz4cbkXqJENe_DVl_dwdGOyaY-Hn1BZhSeubMWWBUQoXZwLdOTHVQOHRu-4EQAaoEJYU_t_xEgg68/3mm/xhx93VfpSLeLeZ0yfJpjqg/h0/Z8yIK3Q_JQgItyhxSmTK6h5z_JAtfQ7adzepKYdqFk8)** addressing these personal attacks in the greater context of describing the worsening conditions of CA-34 since he took office, and why we’re ready for new change and representation. Please share my op-ed with your networks and help counter our opponent’s misleading and dishonest rhetoric. ******In these last few days before the primary election, we are seeking volunteers on****Monday, June 6 and Tuesday, June 7 for:
**
1. **Tabling near Voting Centers! Locations can be found[here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/nIATlT34azO8Uq6tATWtxBUS3-cn5Fd8XNMYIfqUm5UxM-3hv6SjN82MiQGlkkDR2wshePk4CBLIvEUisZo_UIG0kFyqnZZbSf5EVH5UeDLc71Wuw8ikZYrQUSEx8_4dNKEt0KLku9Soy_81y3A_M45AvHgLLNdlGhADq5a2bW-4JKWkSGOibm5Xks9UU_MkoxGjyygnoIKp7huXhY8cNRBjV0RCvsNN_mV-UXWKoJiiHv2YOgQVjmicNz9nfhRD9-z0haF2imBnieLH6CkKByccDRVPneVdEDMj3gnzpZ0VANvxKcWqaDlYzYGINZ6p/3mm/xhx93VfpSLeLeZ0yfJpjqg/h1/c4YoGS5gL3kXEGDWtT-twq-LnoVhGGwtM_Yd6O3U8g4).**
2. **Campaign sign waving near busy intersections in the district!******

Please email [christina@davidkimforca.com](mailto:christina@davidkimforca.com) if you are available on the dates above. Times are flexible! Lastly, all volunteers are invited to our ******June 7 Primary Election Watch Party** with candidates Al Corado and Gina Viola! **We will be streaming the election results beginning at 7:00 PM********.****
** Space is limited, so please[ RSVP](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0g3wdtg9fsYZUCQweLSiUUxlzMVI81DNLdtbxgLvQPXjU9-7LsfbZa5p77Uv_OeIKdtIYB8y-prAIj2HEYlLQVAruP05-N5VhiXilEbP5U3jIn5xhYego-QMERislIDLTdVLHiCW0v69_lKw3bCn7PuVhxhvsQWCgFL8YXb6lnK6By6VDZcmnrh3xKWAr1nWB2ML1mBDYyhgL-GEWJ1wwt2e49skWZndoic1dDLhwkhqnPgxTQByynXccQWr8ly0lIlV2CSVfKrBdXulsLSGPBfjXJ3unWwOwPxb6dmrXA3N8moQ47c7dYCYM9JmCAlBb-I7uHqELV8fJD4h1GLoMct3PmF5-rwMsCIhvgXH-ufc/3mm/xhx93VfpSLeLeZ0yfJpjqg/h2/xNoiYWJCPURe89JMiBgAC50ClLlqXRb-pqcaYbL38FA), ASAP
**Thank you again for all of your support!
** **Join our Discord server for real-time campaign updates!:[https://discord.gg/9UjU8Y7p](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0nWHUsOVq_DGdzjTL9xXXSDoorCc1Dm1BPlFX9tpeDS2HtEbe8EvPwnjm2uehS8A9x13brkpajPqFeR2_WIoLacLu2vSVpTHwhQwSLYEkg8fcMkOpqXAT5isIp0PI4z2RhjfRgjwE_2uF1_ImUsqzDE8FJvC0OrdcMeuLK6a0AUT9gykyb7Vsw_FJcElbLOTK9ML29uvLjzrgDhCMzKHwtglT5CjaK3-Kaqbzfj6t37xXxrlaREAXFzK6eD1Q5cdGQ/3mm/xhx93VfpSLeLeZ0yfJpjqg/h3/CZIoOPtZNXHRxv820s8_qZZwm4so6n1thdeXH5DjrYI)** | | David Yung Ho Kim is an immigration attorney, author, and community activist in Los Angeles. body:
This email is only meant for YOUR eyes | I came across three of my favorite photographs and immediately...

Peter,

I have something special for you.

I came across three of my favorite photographs and immediately knew I wanted to send YOU a copy of one of them. The problem is... _**I can't decide WHICH photo I want to send you (they're all so spectacular).**_

So, I thought, why not let YOU, one of my BEST supporters, decide. But, I need you to know that these are not just any photos, Peter. **I plan to write you a personalized note and sign the photograph.**

Below are three of my favorite photos, and I want YOU to decide which you want ME to sign for YOU:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60516312:6bE8ytoYN:m:1:3253819041:DD3BD4C9DDA0167BFB7C5E60AB565525:r)

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

subject: quick question for you

body:
Hey Patriot,
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's new social media app? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's app?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
__
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60516358:JuJdytoEN:m:1:3299561967:E56340ECD1C7F68123FE09D097C59554:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60516358:JuJdytoEN:m:1:3299561967:E56340ECD1C7F68123FE09D097C59554:r)**
President Trump promises some incredible things for his new app:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This app is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60516358:JuJdytoEN:m:1:3299561967:E56340ECD1C7F68123FE09D097C59554:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m forever grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60516321:63PSyto5N:m:1:3317145305:083CFAD404657AD6559FD3A5FC706BE6:r)

I'll be quick because I know I've reached out to you a lot already.

This time I first and foremost just wanted to thank you for all that you've done to support me and my re-election campaign. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point Action
subject: Yours FREE: President Trump's latest book
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point Action (www
body:
I have a limited number of copies of President Donald Trump’s newest book, Our Journey Together, and I want to send one to YOU
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze7hj5tdstk2es565dc2qjbe82epk80r2eqr78go_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqn6dtimqqeatjlclq38c3ks3jjap32elhjas3kegor6t74c9o72s36mlpn1pln6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj30sljcdjreoj662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgmcpj3c3h68oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4l2jglfhk2s3lj71g3dals52p3gnh1s0ojpnpro_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o72chh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I have a limited number of copies of President Donald Trump’s newest book, _Our Journey Together_ , and I want to send one to _YOU_... ... for **_FREE!_** All I ask is that you cover the cost of shipping, which is just $15. This book is selling for **_more than $67 on Amazon_** right now — _when it’s in stock_ — but I was able to secure a handful of copies for the very best conservative grassroots activists, including _YOU_. [**Click here right now to get your copy before they run out!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr99h2hnsla3r0h5lok90chn5k3tuorul4ts3u70_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o72chh2bs)
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z92sekifcis74q7ft4oj4frps21d5ii41ajdm9co_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o72chh2bs)
---
**This beautiful photo book was personally compiled by President Trump himself.** It contains hundreds of color photos encapsulating some of the most defining moments of the Trump presidency, along with engrossing captions — some of which are even hand-written by President Trump himself! I can’t think of a better way to commemorate one of the greatest periods in modern American history than to add this volume to your personal library. As you flip through the pages, you’ll feel that surge of pride in America all over again as you relive moments like President Trump’s historic tax cuts, the construction of the southern border wall, the appointment of three originalist Supreme Court Justices, and much, much more. It’s a trip back in time to a moment when true American greatness shone — and it can be yours for just the cost of shipping, while supplies last. [**Just click here to claim your copy!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjmt7iguup8qp6oitl71nvp26p4crerq4mrb9t5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o72chh2bs) As a friend and fellow patriot, I know that you care about America, and especially America’s future. I know that you’re as furious as I am at the Biden administration’s radical efforts to roll back President Trump’s America-first legacy and infringe on the freedoms of Real Americans like you and me. **_Here at Turning Point Action, we’re working to stop them, to right the ship, to restore our freedom, and ultimately, to put true conservatives back in charge._** That work starts in the lead-up to this November’s midterm elections, and it continues into 2024. But until then, I invite you to join me in commemorating what was, in many ways, the most profound resurgence of American greatness we have seen in our lifetime by adding a copy of this stunning photo book to your personal collection. [**Click here to get it shipped to your home for less than 25 percent of the retail price!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp9gh2gsm23bet8a0k5vlbaio1ao4vv8ap13h39g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o72chh2bs)
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za68t83gm8m2drier9fgkeu2malmtg5v3nlqj0tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o72chh2bs)
---
And I should mention -- many friends have asked if they can purchase multiple copies. The answer is **_YES_** \-- you can order as many as you want -- and the more you order, the better the value! I hope you’ll consider getting a copy for your family members, your friends... and maybe even that woke neighbor down the street that loves to give you a hard time! [**Just click here to get started.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9l19kjabm9d05rjinvmkfe9auqmh53jtvb5vp10_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o72chh2bs) Thank you for your continued partnership in the fight for American greatness. Together, we’ll make President Trump’s time in office just the first chapter of the greatest American success story the world has ever seen!
---
For liberty, Charlie Kirk President Turning Point Action
---
---
Paid for by Turning Point Action (www.tpaction.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. 4930 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6huafv36ksi89c7urbq6ij2ilobd6gcn4kjftv0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr70sjlc6p69dljmapmccth6mqr8thnc2r6ddb4ehj7ac3n69obctr5clg75cln6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj30sljcdjreo366aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgmcpj3c3g69oh5u)
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znsoe54gbup82nguoro317r6e87651nllgm3hd7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o70cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv3n2ddckgha9i2geu5fr849afkrtb731tmtsbeo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o70cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0rbgckr7r8nf0mb9q4rbusms9n17uosbukui7r0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o70cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2z6ed4oqimdlsjiqb3mm6c9oam4chq5ln5gea0lgo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoi4m7a4331h3pacski9mpbgur75tcil43ackj68_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o70cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9dhlqh5pkbf8k9otdkpc13ag823h7l18f0j6jr8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o72chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6d3465q6bdjlcppb6pllmthj6tdn6hpr1d5imhij6tj0mprjddb269gb8p9jc1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooreddm61pbcphmc2pm1ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgmksmkt7ljqpctqlis0ct5nb1cii7m45t8hs1m0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o72chh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc5t6gtch3d1vadea434gbtbt1q23f8u3f03jvu0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o72chh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhccpt7gvpi68a3sbnhmp3ciga3kd83oep9bcn2o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o72chh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zspifmks75oji228ognh0htotrq8l1tlct085240).

clean_body: Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. You can get started right now using this secure link: Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: FREEDOM is the threat?
body:
Typically, it’s alongside a dishonest legacy media headline misrepresenting my agenda, insulting the people of Florida, or imp
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjl0ll01ri3c6fuu1nasc2qai94d3j8caf3pqffg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sbk69q71c3j6kp76o75mjh7ct1gc9pr4ob7m6o76o5lc4oe8d3kc5prdcdm6ooefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dplmoo75dj66pib6or7m2qmash5u)
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0vtcra238a5ecik8o0ipcvs4c03p89ekv5fu2q8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)
---
Friend, if you turn on the news, there's a good chance you'll hear my name. Typically, it’s alongside a dishonest legacy media headline misrepresenting my agenda, insulting the people of Florida, or implying FREEDOM is the latest and greatest threat to America. It is an insulting and absurd way to distort the truth and mislead you, the American public. Their attempts at intimidation won’t work on me though. I am not backing down. Not even a little bit. I welcome the "insults" and the hard work to refute them because I know the importance of strong leadership in a time like this. That is why I’m running for re-election, and I hope you’ll **_[pledge your support for my campaign.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaa0vc6mmvfrk4l5nbjtnuqsaon0jkg6t2f2duhg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)_** If you’re still hesitant about getting involved, I’d like to remind you what we’re up against. It is evident how far to the left the media has gone by looking at how they define “radical.”
* Allowing grown men and women to assess personal risk and decide to wear a mask or not: **RADICAL**.
* Allowing CHILDREN under 9 years old to make life-altering, sometimes irreversible, decisions about their "gender identity": **__JUST FINE!__**
* Encouraging an educational environment focused on learning and preparing students for the real world: **RADICAL**.
* Encouraging students to hate themselves, their peers, and our country: **__JUST FINE!__**

The stakes could not be higher.

These out-of-touch liberal elites are so threatened by rational thought that they will call me radical for standing with everyday people on the side of common sense and sanity. If that makes me a radical, so be it.

I will always defend our liberty, protect our children, and promote the ideals of our Constitution which make our country the greatest on earth. No amount of intimidation or petty name-calling is going to change that.
_**[>> SUPPORT RON DESANTIS NOW >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0cr85q39n7mt75pivlpjsi1rshcf6c0ba6nnadg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs "SUPPORT RON DESANTIS NOW")**_
From my time in the Navy to my time in Congress, I have always been committed to preserving our freedom and building a better future for our children.__
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmqmlita6136a4ob6magut0mc07ti1obgj7jj3i8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)
---
I have three children, and I worry every day about the consequences that progressive policies could have on their lives. We have open borders inviting millions of illegal aliens, potential criminals, and thousands of pounds of illegal drugs into our country. At the same time, liberals try to defund our police forces and appoint judges who are soft on crime. We’re experiencing record-high inflation which threatens families with higher costs at the pump and the grocery store, all while the Biden administration spends your tax dollars into oblivion. We have kids – who are just trying to get an education – being injected by the anti-American agenda of woke corporations, woke politicians, and fraudulent media elites who have lost their grip on reality. I will never let these out-of-touch fanatical liberals win. _**[JOIN RON DESANTIS NOW!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdjde8g0veqbabq1ls7dbdgtb68vb4gcqu5mlp0o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)**_ As a federal prosecutor, I dedicated my time to convicting child predators and removing dangerous criminals from our Florida streets. I continued my mission in Congress by authoring bills that ended the secret taxpayer-billed slush funds members of Congress were using to pay off those who accused them of sexual harassment. Our law enforcement, prosecutors, judges, and elected officials should work to protect us - not to protect criminals. Now, as Governor, I am standing by our law enforcement officers and holding the Soros-funded, soft-on-crime prosecutors accountable to keep our communities and our families safe. I took immediate action to end the COVID theater which crippled our nation and focused on empowering small businesses with common-sense tax policies which made it easy to hire American and fuel our Florida economy. _**Florida is in a better place now than it was before the pandemic - and that’s not something liberal governors can say today.**_ I’m also leading the fight for parents and students against the poisonous, WOKE elitists to ensure our education system is NOT an indoctrination camp. It’s simple: **we’re not going to tell kindergarteners they are racist or they are oppressed.** And we’re not going to force-feed our children progressive ideologies that are confusing and wildly inappropriate for their age. We will prepare the next generation **for greatness** by teaching real history instead of perverting our past to serve the ideological goals of far-left activists who would like our children to hate America and each other. Every student should feel empowered to succeed - and together, we can make sure that they do. If all this is “RADICAL,” then friend, I think you and I have something in common: we’re both _**RADICAL**_. I could use your help continuing what we started here in Florida. Will you chip in now to become an official supporter of my campaign? **_[YES, I WILL: $100](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvf2snhq0928k504iqvhl7cmusnrvfksmki47v80_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)_**
**_[YES, I WILL: $75](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z23tt9nthg31tjuihp1npbovm5nir7mg1g8jorl8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)_**
** _[YES, I WILL: $50](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z20ma4jdksukb19tpss6l2j8idqa3do57rrtr36o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)_**
**_[YES, I WILL: $35](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4t331405c3b516lt4kkd3j6spll0oj3u2ut5bp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)_** Make no mistake: this race won't be easy. We know liberals will do anything to win when they’re afraid of the opposition. And they’re VERY afraid of me. They’ve already proven they’ll try anything to keep me out of the Governor’s mansion.
Since I became Governor, we have made big moves to ensure Florida’s election laws are free and fair. **We made it HARDER TO CHEAT by banning ballot harvesting, strengthening voter ID, and prohibiting "Zuckerbucks."** I have no doubt they’ll try harder to make sure we don’t outsmart and outfight them in 2022. That’s why I need the support of patriots like you, to make sure we’re prepared to win whatever battles we face next.
**_[URGENT DONATION: $35](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zna31g6iiv01kkbkm6e8coqh9864f0ktle6s8ipo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)_** Friend, I've seen what we can accomplish in just a short period of time. I've watched us win and lay the foundation for future successes. _But I also know that this is just the beginning._ That's why I am asking you for your help now. It’s time for patriots like you and me to come together and ensure this “radical” freedom we’re fighting for continues for another four years.
In an election year like this one, we cannot afford to give one inch. We cannot lose Florida to the woke progressives who would destroy everything we've worked so hard for. _Are you with me?_ **Please donate to my campaign today using this secure _[link](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlb2c2irgscos03ivbphjr6io0berh7b7cuj6kgg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)_.** I appreciate you reading my whole letter, friend. Thank you for your time.
Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlhdl3qdae2057iao3bgkeg82lr720rt96l44t98_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)
---
|
---
| | Ron DeSantis __
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhget6of6va3ug74j4299hoq297svpcfhqq56vo8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh2bs)
---
|
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk8q8mnlpbgiu8pfhule0t3geiipotqe2n5a413o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj66o74cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:

This time I first and foremost just wanted to thank you for all that you've done to support me and my re-election campaign. Without your support, I wouldn't be able to fight for a secure Southern Border, fight for ALL unborn lives, fight to stand up to Communist China, and all the radical schemes that Nancy, Chuck, and the rest of the Social Left are trying to push.

So, in short, I'll never be able to thank you enough for all you've done.

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrfrsindcq584rim0m2gro8pss5muu7sgvf7llo0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj61or4c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboj1odksaq60p1j6spb2p1jc9h37d5hcqp7apbn6io73c5he5hjcclmedor4ppgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj30sljchjr4sb66pgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2v6693eif4smpct3gd0igr4dmg8b10a3jtkd5mo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj61or4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt3dpvvssieihg7adr8j6da37b36r5hbprlo2n5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj61or4c3h2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z39u4apm86fc7rn4c2t29uu9qde554dmj34u5noo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj61or4c3h2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1duqeebuu5ntsaudvoblk282cnjvn317teo01ig_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpj61or4c3h2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Where should I send this?
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeqvbeoo2romi2hc7dg06e6gqt07q9758gjqvio0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgm0ob6c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfac33mpoe4djgcao72tdkshi38tlge8on6d356th34cri6ioe2tj2egp7cor2esrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8q6cc3n6mo6fchjcoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi1pea9k7gu1dmc0cp74e5gs3ide7b10pblb9ucg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgm0ob6c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z64e3qck42mht1qe49uaq3epvma3j547lqo64nho_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgm0ob6c5h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5n4895tkv4q8a8h3tm5b6dms3k5utdnmg7ccnig_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgm0ob6c5h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z220gt6l6jrct3ls6stfjtv2n3fg2vv7nd0qf900_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgm0ob6c5h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znoagfjic5g7hd05k8cjsa09v3a5n8hpeaj19rvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgm0ob6c5h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd5a2l652nm6n6tfngennuckn3m7l5fnrm8c5f5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgm0ob6c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

### _Friday, June 3, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take the popular actors of the screen and breakdown ideas that can help you become a better leader. ### _Wednesday, June 1, 2022_
Today on The Doug Collins Podcast, I take a deep dive into the recent discussions by the Biden Administration to forgive up to 10,000 dollars of Student Loan debt. ### _Monday, May 30, 2022_
Today is a very Special podcast. I talk about the real meaning of Memorial Day and how the faces of those that we honor today still are fresh in my mind. Fellow Patriots,

**We did it.**

After a very long wait, I am officially the Republican candidate for Senate in Pennsylvania. **I am honored, but we have a lot of work to do to get back on track.**

My radical and VERY Far-Left opponent John Fetterman has been fundraising for 17 days and has already RAISED OVER A MILLION DOLLARS. We need to catch up if Conservatives want any chance of winning in November.

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Patriot,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Patriot, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60517045:JloXutolN:m:1:3299561967:CBC22BC3C2055B972F710CEE9A201F6C:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60517046:JloXutolN:m:1:3299561967:CBC22BC3C2055B972F710CEE9A201F6C:r "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Patriot, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60517046:JloXutolN:m:1:3299561967:CBC22BC3C2055B972F710CEE9A201F6C:r "Please click here to donate now")**

name: John Gomez  - Campaign Manager
subject: Chabot for Congress - Update from the Campaign Trail 6/3
body:
Events in the 1st District, This Week's Blog, and Ways to Get Involved
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-r/)
# Update from the Campaign Trail 6/3/22
Good evening,This week we're remembering those who have laid down their lives in defense of our nation. Even though Memorial Day has passed, we should never forget the sacrifices of those who have served our country. Congressman Chabot continues to work hard, traveling throughout Ohio's 1st Congressional District, and talk about everything he's doing to fight back against Nancy Pelosi's disastrous agenda. **_Congressman Chabot on the Trail_** _Deer Park/Sycamore Township GOP Club_ Last week, Congressman Chabot spoke to the Deer Park/Sycamore Township GOP Club at their annual Spaghetti Dinner. The Congressman discussed the state of the country, the race in Ohio's First Congressional District, and several other pressing issues. This group is motivated to take back the House this November! _Warren County Lincoln Reagan Day Dinner_ Last night, Congressman Chabot spoke at the annual Warren County Lincoln Reagan Day Dinner. There was a tremendous turnout and a great group. It was great to see so many friends, new and old. _Landsman Supported by Defund the Police Groups_ Greg Landsman continues to proudly tout endorsements from defund the police groups. Landsman, who authored a bill to defund Cincinnati's police amidst record homicides, would be a disaster for public safety in our community. We need to support our law enforcement and ensure our neighborhoods are safe for all of us. Read the release [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-y/). _Join the Team!_ As the Election begins to heat up, we'll need volunteers to help us carry our campaign's message across Ohio's 1st Congressional District. Volunteering is a great way to help us ensure that we're able to win this race and keep Nancy Pelosi's former staffer out of Congress. This year we'll need help with the following:
1. Knocking doors
2. Making phone calls
3. Letters to the Editor
4. Walking in parades

If you are able to help, please [sign up here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-j/) or reply to this email and let me know! _This Week 's Blog - "The Leftists Are Coming"_This week's blog is about the state of our race and the fight for Ohio's 1st Congressional District _" We'll run a high intensity, hard fought campaign, emphasizing issues that will counter the failed Biden policies that have so harmed this nation. A campaign which will emphasize policies to strengthen our economy, create jobs, make our communities safer, lower devastating inflation and high costs, lower taxes, and strengthen our position on the international scene."_Read the blog post [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-t/). Have a great weekend.Yours truly,John GomezCampaign Manager - Chabot for Congress [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-i/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-k/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-u/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-o/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-n/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-p/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tyidkyit-l-z) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. [Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-tyidkyit-961825B2-kujkulhluu-v) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-tyidkyit-kujkulhluu-e/)

name: Admiral Franken
subject: I pulled the plug on Fox News

Hello,
As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton.
As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.”
And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. **Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump.**
As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices.
Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president.
Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. **My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation.
**The polls show we can win.** The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.
**We need to raise another $100,000 before midnight tonight to win, but right now, we’re still falling dangerously short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can spare before our critical deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46103601/348848607/-42398318?refcode=em20220604am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWY5MjZlMC1mZGUzLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=karAp2oC6x4zHAoMsDti-2zjw5qPxMGXZ1NBnQ8TCt0=)

Team Ettinger ****=** **=** Learn more at: Follow along: | | ** ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 741 AUSTIN, MN 55912 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:

---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTU1LTY4ZDk2NzQ4ZDM1YTRlNjdiNWFkM2FhMTJmMDQ0MTFmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMG1ueGlndmpmcj9zcmM9RkZPMjgzMDQifQ/LKd4CVjJNN4Ev2fJfAZYyw)

Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States to save America**.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTU1LTY4ZDk2NzQ4ZDM1YTRlNjdiNWFkM2FhMTJmMDQ0MTFmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMG1ueGlndmpmcj9zcmM9RkZPMjgzMDQifQ/4ude7lDwsvdaw4X9J7l2qA) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V Convention of States. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTU1LTY4ZDk2NzQ4ZDM1YTRlNjdiNWFkM2FhMTJmMDQ0MTFmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMG1ueGlndmpmcj9zcmM9RkZPMjgzMDQifQ/tULDjjWgblTsTT8bOcVDWg)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTU1LTY4ZDk2NzQ4ZDM1YTRlNjdiNWFkM2FhMTJmMDQ0MTFmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMG1ueGlndmpmcj9zcmM9RkZPMjgzMDQifQ/LGOguar1wfFADQPDfwAINA)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher — nor has our deficit. And the politicians in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ A Convention of States is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a Convention of States to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country — along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots — believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a Convention of States for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V Convention of States right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTU1LTY4ZDk2NzQ4ZDM1YTRlNjdiNWFkM2FhMTJmMDQ0MTFmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMG1ueGlndmpmcj9zcmM9RkZPMjgzMDQifQ/4Wq-7Brkb6XJsZyvuHW2Pw) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed the COS Resolution through the state legislatures in 19 states, including four since the start of this year alone — bringing us over __HALFWAY__ to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** This year alone, the Resolution has passed out of committee in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Iowa, and Kansas — paving the way for the next round of states to pass! With dozens of states currently considering the COS Resolution, _NOW_ is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **A Convention of States is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the D.C. Swamp, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V Convention of States. [**Simply click here to sign and we'll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTU1LTY4ZDk2NzQ4ZDM1YTRlNjdiNWFkM2FhMTJmMDQ0MTFmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMG1ueGlndmpmcj9zcmM9RkZPMjgzMDQifQ/L_9psKtxLv2eqmiM5PFa1A) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and the politicians are too invested in its growth. We the people must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call a Convention of States. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTU1LTY4ZDk2NzQ4ZDM1YTRlNjdiNWFkM2FhMTJmMDQ0MTFmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvMG1ueGlndmpmcj9zcmM9RkZPMjgzMDQifQ/SKC7M1fSWAzekKLlZ0ahqg)

Peter, it's Young Kim again.
I'm coming to you for a lifeline.
My **LAST** extended end-of-month deadline before my primary election is just **HOURS** away! My team and I tried to reach you **SEVEN TIMES...**
Radical Democrats are kicking it into **HIGH GEAR** to defeat me. **They just launched an eleventh-hour smear campaign to block me from the final ballot.** It would mean a Liberal would replace me in the House and Republicans would **FAIL** to take back the House.
_Without you, I'm worried they 'll pull it off..._
[**STOP NANCY >> PROTECT YOUNG'S SEAT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60516520:6F3g2toZN:m:1:3253819041:08A93D19B3EBE857EE81CE15931BB681:r)
---
This is a make-it-or-break-it moment, Peter. I need to fundraise at least another $1,239 to reach my goal. Let me be very clear: I'm **NOT** asking you for that much. _I 'm humbly asking you to make a small contribution before my midnight deadline to save my campaign. _
[**If everyone on this list sends just $10 or $25, we 'll make it:**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60516521:6F3g2toZN:m:1:3253819041:08A93D19B3EBE857EE81CE15931BB681:r)

If we fail, I'm going to lose and Pelosi will rejoice.
I'm really hoping I can count on you.
\- Young Kim

__

_We 'll get straight to the point, Peter: _

_We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats._
__
__YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she 's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations.__
__

subject: This weekend, we honor victims of gun violence by wearing orange and demanding change.

body:
Please join me in demanding change. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46105159/348854535/823540626?refcode=ea.e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2Y4MWY0Ni0wNmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F7w2ulbppzKeGKtEy4ZRNO6fIaVOKZhtXb0iNQ2luI=&emci=f2ebda5f-66e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
**[During National Gun Violence Awareness month, join me and demand action on gun violence prevention>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46105162/348854537/2086582502?refcode=ea.e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2Y4MWY0Ni0wNmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F7w2ulbppzKeGKtEy4ZRNO6fIaVOKZhtXb0iNQ2luI=&emci=f2ebda5f-66e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)** Peter, This weekend across North Carolina and around the country, community members are gathering together to honor victims of gun violence and demand change from leaders. In the wake of so many recent tragedies, in Oklahoma, in Texas, in New York — and many shootings that don’t make the headlines — these calls for action are more important than ever. **So let me be crystal clear: I hear your calls to action. I stand with you. I have taken Executive Action to add thousands of criminal convictions to the background check database to reduce the chance of a person buying a gun who shouldn’t be able to. And I will do everything I can to make our communities safer from gun violence. But what we need is state legislative action to make our laws stronger.** State legislators should close North Carolina’s permit loophole for these weapons. **Pass it and I’ll sign it.** I’ve proposed a red flag law that lets judges take guns away from violent criminals and people who are severely mentally ill. **Pass it and I’ll sign it.** I’ve had gun advocates tell me that the problem is not assault weapons, but mental health. Well, there’s a bill right now in the legislature that will provide billions of dollars for mental health through Medicaid expansion. **Pass it and I’ll sign it.** North Carolinians deserve to go to school, roam their neighborhoods, attend their places of worship, run to the grocery store, and attend a music festival or nightclub or movie without fear. **[Please take a stand with me and demand action on gun violence prevention, because that’s what our state deserves>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46105163/348854541/2086582502?refcode=ea.e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2Y4MWY0Ni0wNmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F7w2ulbppzKeGKtEy4ZRNO6fIaVOKZhtXb0iNQ2luI=&emci=f2ebda5f-66e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46105165/348854544/2086582502?refcode=ea.e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2Y4MWY0Ni0wNmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F7w2ulbppzKeGKtEy4ZRNO6fIaVOKZhtXb0iNQ2luI=&emci=f2ebda5f-66e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=e7f81f46-06e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
---
Thank you,
Roy

name: Mo Brooks
subject: what conservatives are watching 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mo Brooks for Senate Committee |
body:
For once, you are receiving a campaign email with GOOD news! Let me cut to the chase...
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt6o1ohpdbvunnn560ug6bmri79dpng9duoe9c0g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbom8pr3m8oe7cjn6lhmcpr6cmpb6t33eapm4phmcdh32crjmmq76d9lmdpj6tj0sv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj30tplmkrr4t366hgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgmcob7cdgm0oh5u)
| | | Friend, For once, you are receiving a campaign email with GOOD news! Let me cut to the chase... **Conservatives are on-track to get a NEW, proven conservative U.S. Senator from Alabama! ** **We can help build our “Red Wall” in the Senate of true conservatives like Sen. Ted Cruz and Sen. Rand Paul **(both of whom endorsed me, by the way), as long as we win our primary. __Our campaign has got the momentum — but we need your help to get across the finish line.__
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za0bu29r9rd8m5d5ev7fc6fit6j0gru0dheond1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)
---
Let me explain why it’s so critical for me to get your help NOW. I’ve just clinched my spot in the run-off election for the Republican nomination to United States Senate, and even then, it was a close shave — because**Mitch McConnell and his buddies in the Swamp poured**** $17 million****of their beltway bucks to fight my nomination.****
**
**The joke’s on Mitch, patriot, because I am STILL STANDING. ** And now that Alabama conservatives are uniting behind me in the final showdown against his handpicked candidate...****_it’s about to get REALLY ugly._
**All I need to do is keep fighting these next few weeks until our run-off election on June 21**. [**But I can’t do it without the support of grassroots conservatives like you****.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z20tdd3375j41t7uajb550el3a17p4brpaiaslqg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)
---
[**STAND WITH PROVEN CONSERVATIVE MO BROOKS**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z833eslg6jgutngfvnkt6dbtdbv0t2epi54l4b1g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)
---
**Friend, there’s a reason Mitch McConnell and the Swamp hate me: I’m a proven conservative with a track record of doing**** _exactly_****what I say I’m going to do – and I have the accolades to back it up:**
* A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List
* 100% rating from the National Right to Life
* A+ rating from NumbersUSA, an immigration watchdog group
* 98% rating from Heritage Action for America
* 93% rating from FreedomWorks
* 93% rating from the NRA
* A+ rating from Gun Owners of America
* 91% lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union
* U.S. Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award
* 2018 American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America

I’ve received endorsements from well-respected conservative hard-hitters:
* Sen. Ted Cruz
* Sen. Rand Paul
* Congressman Jim Jordan
* House Freedom Caucus Chairman Scott Perry
* Dr. Kelli Ward
* Mark Levin

And endorsements from organizations fighting for conservative principles:
* Alabama Republican Assembly
* Eagle Forum
* FreedomWorks for America
* Alabama Citizens for Life
* National Rifle Association
* Gun Owners of America
* National Association for Gun Rights
* Senate Conservatives Fund
* Americans for Legal Immigration PAC

---
[**JOIN THEM: SUPPORT MO BROOKS **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc2423cu5ddgfgju75d43q9ilktkj0il218tb6n8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)
---
I’ve fought for the America First agenda in the House of Representatives, but I know there’s more work to be done... this time in the Senate. And I know I’m the man for the job.
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlko91h93250jbq4aivos7ini480v50onl17k8fo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)
---
The countdown is on until the runoff election in a few weeks. We need _every grassroots conservative_ __ to chip in and help us counter Mitch McConnell and the Swamp’s attacks. [**_Can I count on your support? >>_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zouv883hheje6i0l3126i43ms4u9lg8eukl302tg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)
---
[**COUNT ME IN: $100**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt8cjae8pug5jce2io84f6igpr8lvg352nhhtnm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)
---
[**COUNT ME IN: $75**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlkkc8lo85ijfqpe6eh9v5e76u30itk2mo4ns5r0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)
---
[**COUNT ME IN: $50**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi55u1118a8pp4o1gd4n482jvt8qs7qc803g8k10_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)
---
[**COUNT ME IN: $25**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4b0vevojqg82alhftqa8b66gpn5u8k01ki5ss88_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)
---
[**COUNT ME IN: ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqhhuortn7blhuvcqktmuh1m711iq1l07ma45uug_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)
---
Thank you for your help,
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv3sulsudv1sbb2828bilf709c48grs5gkn19ah0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cpgmeor1c1h2bs)

name: Cortez Masto, Catherine
subject: Have you heard my story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Friend, my story is one of community. It made me who I am today, and it's why I fight so hard for Nevada in the Senate.
| | |
---
The little girl in this photo has no clue what a wild ride life has in store for her. Right now, all she knows is the joy of weekend camping with her family, tearing into her mom’s homemade meatballs and begging her dad to buy her a dirt bike.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46106124/348858558/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1778-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDI0YTFhNC0wN2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibbqdGWkpu6mB8IdytUW3YE8FKXNHYW54kV84PdNiGQ=)
Her dad raised her on three principles: work hard, be honest and respect everyone. She spent her life watching him pour his heart into bettering his community, and she became a first-generation college graduate and pursued a career in law to protect that community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46106125/348858559/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1778-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDI0YTFhNC0wN2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibbqdGWkpu6mB8IdytUW3YE8FKXNHYW54kV84PdNiGQ=)
She went on to be elected Nevada’s attorney general just as the 2008 financial crisis wreaked havoc on America’s middle-class families and our economy. She took on the Big Banks with a fellow attorney general from California and secured $1.9 billion in relief for Nevada homeowners.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46106126/348858560/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1778-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDI0YTFhNC0wN2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibbqdGWkpu6mB8IdytUW3YE8FKXNHYW54kV84PdNiGQ=)
In 2016, she would make history as the first woman from Nevada and first Latina ever elected to the United States Senate. The odds were stacked against her, and many said she had no chance of winning. Mitch McConnell and the GOP spent nearly $50 million to defeat her, but her grassroots team stood by her every step of the way.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46106127/348858561/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1778-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDI0YTFhNC0wN2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibbqdGWkpu6mB8IdytUW3YE8FKXNHYW54kV84PdNiGQ=)
Friend, my story is one of community. It made me who I am today, and it's why I fight so hard for Nevada in the Senate. People doubted that a Latina could compete and overcome the odds to win. I’ve proven them wrong every time, and I know that with your help, I can do it again.
**But right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate is leading me by 3 points in the polls, and FiveThirtyEight's Nate Silver says I’m in serious danger of losing this toss-up race. Protecting my Democratic seat in Nevada is _crucial_ for defending our Senate majority. That's why GOP outside groups have already spent more than $4 million to defeat me, and it's why I have to ask:**
**[Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Jacky Rosen and me – to help defeat my Trump-endorsed opponent, defend my seat in Nevada and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46106128/348858562/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1778-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDI0YTFhNC0wN2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibbqdGWkpu6mB8IdytUW3YE8FKXNHYW54kV84PdNiGQ=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46106129/348858563/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1778-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDI0YTFhNC0wN2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibbqdGWkpu6mB8IdytUW3YE8FKXNHYW54kV84PdNiGQ=)

name: Great America Update
subject: Where should I send this?
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6005%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Ko1paLPa0ezc32xROpoIQQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62001%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KUgCwApXEPY2u0pjbH5fBg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62002%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CAAPyNT1AdwDDMmToIaVSQ&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62003%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f7LAxEA0FxxXS3EK2Jcz3w&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62004%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ysx53Lmgax4YFE5xNSByOA&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62003%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f7LAxEA0FxxXS3EK2Jcz3w&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62015%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6Eo3u%2finv3UZ2yN%2fo%2bahqA&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
