[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46125573/348915515/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmUxNmY2NS0xZmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHgUhiyRPpkO_lxCb_2g5PuQ1M46aevchs1vLHz_2qI=&emci=05e1b9bc-b7e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=f6e16f65-1fe4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.”
Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well.
Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over.
January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. **To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy.** An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur.
The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, **I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors _like you_.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, donate $5 or more to my campaign right now – every dollar you can before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46125575/348915519/-42398318?refcode=em20220604mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmUxNmY2NS0xZmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHgUhiyRPpkO_lxCb_2g5PuQ1M46aevchs1vLHz_2qI=)

clean_body: Hello, It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.” Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well. Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over. January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy. An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur. The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection. I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors like you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We can – and we must – protect our democracy. Thank you for always being a part of the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

Joe Biden made an urgent plea.

Raphael Warnock broke his silence.
Jon Ossoff asked for help.
Amy Klobuchar sounded the alarm. I don’t know how else to say this, so I’ll be blunt: [_**All these top Democrats would not be sounding the alarm if our democracy wasn’t in immediate danger of falling to Republicans in this election. I need 4,463 patriots to step up before time runs out, rush $15, and help me close the fundraising gap before the Midnight Deadline in 12 hours >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46126017/348917252/1694517773?refcode=20220604_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGUxNmY2NS0xZmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ByixwXE7kPEjw4L9ghYVNM4NIgtWvIlzsGfJXQtNOi0=) As I write this, Republicans are raking in MILLIONS of dollars to take back power. \-- Kevin McCarthy just hauled in **[**$9.5 MILLION**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46126018/348917253/1694517773?refcode=20220604_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGUxNmY2NS0xZmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ByixwXE7kPEjw4L9ghYVNM4NIgtWvIlzsGfJXQtNOi0=)** to retake the House

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6003%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=zfbKSpjWsLRHG6XdJhnVUg&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62023%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=blpFnVk%2bKPJve5BpI%2f5AiQ&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62024%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XaJEFcABj2EO7H4Y73aoKw&sysid=1) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62035%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YJKlg3EL9iECQHAerZEBUw&sysid=1)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6003%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=zfbKSpjWsLRHG6XdJhnVUg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6003%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=zfbKSpjWsLRHG6XdJhnVUg&sysid=1)

name: Susan Daggett Bennet
subject: “Someone you love may need a choice”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
Grab your Pride merch today! |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46126874/348921714/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODEwYWYyOS0yM2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jy8Rz4mun0LZbw24hCoTbqR8CSa46qvr8QE9HfTar5M=)
Folks — My husband and I believe that a woman’s health care decisions are both personal and private – and best kept between herself and her doctor. A half-century ago, the Supreme Court agreed, establishing in their _Roe v. Wade_ decision that women have a constitutional right to an abortion. Unfortunately, attacks on women’s autonomy to make these private decisions have escalated over the years. Last month, a Supreme Court leak exposed the heart-wrenching draft decision to overturn _Roe_ and roll back these rights, opening the door for the government – rather than patients and their doctors – to determine under what circumstances women must bear children. This decision would potentially subject women in about half our states to extreme abortion bans or restrictions, threatening women’s health and their lives. Fueled by frustration, we got to work. While Michael was back in D.C. fighting for new laws to protect women’s freedom, I got busy with his team to design some campaign gear to allow us collectively to raise our voices in support of women and their right to be the boss of their reproductive health and, consequently, their lives. Michael and I both understand that the decision to have a child, or not, is deeply personal and that people sometimes find themselves in circumstances that make a pregnancy, or raising a child, untenable. Regardless of why a woman chooses to terminate her pregnancy, the freedom to make that decision is fundamental. We are committed to doing everything we can to ensure that women can continue to control this aspect of their lives... and that means we are fighting, in the Senate and on the streets, to protect the constitutional rights outlined in _Roe v. Wade_. The majority of Americans — and a large majority of Coloradans — believe women should have this fundamental right. But in order to show the strength of our movement, we need to spread our message visibly and proudly. **[That’s why I hope you’ll wear your support for the right to choose and make a purchase from our Reproductive Freedom line today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46126875/348921715/-1704673047?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220604_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODEwYWYyOS0yM2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jy8Rz4mun0LZbw24hCoTbqR8CSa46qvr8QE9HfTar5M=&emci=947923eb-64e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9810af29-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1295540)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46126876/348921716/-1704673047?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20220604_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODEwYWYyOS0yM2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jy8Rz4mun0LZbw24hCoTbqR8CSa46qvr8QE9HfTar5M=&emci=947923eb-64e3-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=9810af29-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=1295540)

body:
| Hi there, I wanted to make sure you saw our **_[General Election Priorities Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46126927/348922020/1037140675?refcode=ea.d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2VlZmU5OC0yM2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EapituWK4AVL7gBWwD3Cq8nNIOPJ6tYbcLEIMxe0Snk=&emci=ea1dd04f-ade2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=21938367)_** where you can let me know what issues matter most to you as we head into the next phase of this campaign. **[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46126929/348922022/1037140675?refcode=ea.d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2VlZmU5OC0yM2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EapituWK4AVL7gBWwD3Cq8nNIOPJ6tYbcLEIMxe0Snk=&emci=ea1dd04f-ade2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=21938367)** Whether you’re focused on gun safety, defending reproductive rights, childcare costs, increasing economic opportunity, or something else, I’d love to hear about it from you. I’m passing along our survey one more time — it should only take a minute or two to fill out, and we need your response by midnight. **_[Click here to share what issues you’re thinking about right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46126931/348922024/1037140675?refcode=ea.d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2VlZmU5OC0yM2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EapituWK4AVL7gBWwD3Cq8nNIOPJ6tYbcLEIMxe0Snk=&emci=ea1dd04f-ade2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=21938367)_** Thanks! Rochelle [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46126933/348922026/1037140675?refcode=ea.d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2VlZmU5OC0yM2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EapituWK4AVL7gBWwD3Cq8nNIOPJ6tYbcLEIMxe0Snk=&emci=ea1dd04f-ade2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=21938367) **[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46126934/348922028/1484719371?amount=25&refcode=ea.d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.d7eefe98-23e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2VlZmU5OC0yM2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EapituWK4AVL7gBWwD3Cq8nNIOPJ6tYbcLEIMxe0Snk=)**
**\----Original Message----**
**From:** Your Response Requested (via Team Rochelle)
**Date:** Jun 3, 2022, 12:15 PM

body:
Hey Peter --
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's new social media app? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's app?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
__
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518666:6YEHDtoQN:m:1:3317145305:B72475035061319442CA8F546764AE5E:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518666:6YEHDtoQN:m:1:3317145305:B72475035061319442CA8F546764AE5E:r)**
President Trump promises some incredible things for his new app:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This app is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518666:6YEHDtoQN:m:1:3317145305:B72475035061319442CA8F546764AE5E:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Optimistic about America – update from Mississippi’s free market think tanK
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/jxncrime-8132440?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Three out of four Americans believe our country is heading in the wrong direction.** It's not hard to see why.

Prices are soaring from gas to groceries. Paychecks aren't keeping pace. Many Americans are starting to feel poorer.

At the same time, 'woke' ideology has started to sap America's confidence. How can we feel good about ourselves if we're being told that America is always wrong?

**Much more important than any of that, however, is the fact that millions of Americans are starting to mobilize to do something about it. **

At Heritage this week, for example, I met the founders of Moms for Liberty. They are mobilizing ordinary parents across the country to stand for school boards and ensure that there is common sense in the classroom.

I listened to Ian Rowe, who has run schools in the Bronx for over a decade, explain how we can teach young Americans that they have agency and to reject the victimhood narrative.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=22f83706bf&e=5703353baa)
---
| **Speaking at Heritage, I talked about some of the things that we have done here in Mississippi to put us on the right track.**
* **Tax breaks:** While Washington raises taxes, Mississippi cuts them. We have just achieved the largest tax break in our state's history. Our state is set to have a 4-percent flat income tax - I believe we will move toward full income tax elimination.
* **Combating Critical Race theory:** Radical progressives might push 'woke' ideology. Here in Mississippi, we have taken the lead in responding with a bill to combat Critical Race theory. Other states are now following our lead.
* **Opportunities:** To increase opportunities, Mississippi recently passed a law to reform occupational licensing, making it easier for people accredited outside of our state to work here. This is the sort of practical reform that America needs to grow the economy.

It was great to be able to tell the audience at Heritage about concrete wins for liberty in our state. There is a lot of interest in what Mississippi is starting to achieve.

**If you feel that America is heading in the wrong direction, take comfort in the fact that you are not alone.** Millions feel the way you do, that they are starting to come together in a mass movement to put America back on track.

**We need to make America more like Texas, Tennessee and Florida -- and less like Chicago, New York and California.** The Mississippi Center for Public Policy is part of this national movement here in the Magnolia State.
---
| |
---
Have a wonderful weekend!

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| |
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

We support her not only because she is a competent, results-oriented public servant, well qualified for the governorship, but also because Maryland benefits from a vibrant two-party system.” --- | --- **The Washington Post** **Editorial Board** **June 4, 2022** “Kelly M. Schulz, a Republican running for her party’s gubernatorial nomination in next month’s primary, is a down-to-earth, even-keeled pragmatist with broad experience in state government who would be a viable candidate in November’s general election ... “The Post endorses Ms. Schulz in the July 19 primary. We support her not only because she is a competent, results-oriented public servant, well qualified for the governorship, but also because Maryland benefits from a vibrant two-party system. Ms. Schulz would further that agenda. Her chief rival in the primary, Del. Daniel L. Cox of Frederick County, would render Republicans electorally irrelevant in a state where registered Democrats outnumber the GOP 2 to 1. ... “She is no lightweight. Having dropped out of college at age 19 while pregnant with her first son, she waited tables and tended bar before embarking on a career as a community activist, small business owner, state delegate representing Frederick County and, under Mr. Hogan, the head of two state cabinet-level agencies: the Labor Department and, for three years, the Commerce Department. In the latter job she played a key role keeping businesses afloat during the pandemic and was the state’s chief economic development officer, learning firsthand the challenges of recruiting businesses to relocate in Maryland. ... “A vote in the primary for Mr. Cox is a vote for Republican oblivion in Maryland. A vote for Ms. Schulz is a vote for sanity.” --- -###- --- --- --- | [ name: Emily Mellits
subject: June will be crucial
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend!

I know, I’m popping in a bit early this month but I have an important message and I figure it’s better to get it to you ear
lier, rather than later. (Full disclosure, I had to bump an email from Dan, but don’t worry you’ll hear from him early next week.)

I’m writing because June is a crucial time for Jocelyn’s campaign. We’re planning our summer budget and we need to know exactly how much money we can spend to let people know that it doesn’t matter if you are a Democrat, a Republican or an Independent - Jocelyn will make sure our elections are safe and secure and that your vote counts. After all, safe and secure elections are the basis of our democracy.
If all goes well, (and so far it's going really well) we’ll have the campaign resources to make sure Jocelyn’s re-election campaign has everything it needs to finish strong on Election Day. That means this month, we’re increasing our goal and working hard to make sure we hit it.

This month we need to raise $30,000 from our grassroots supporters to ensure Jocelyn has the resources she needs to get re-elected in November.

Donate today and help us meet this goal, friend.

Donate >> [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=060422

]I’ll be checking-in periodically this month to let you know where we stand. I appreciate all you’re doing for our campaign and the fight to protect our democracy.

-Emily Mellits
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

name: Hillsdale College via Backing America
subject: The problem of progressive education
body:
You’ve probably noticed the spread of anti-American ideology into every area of American life.

[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=f589060ee7dc45b4b9d5af43cdebdc11&_t=blgEa-w4q-SQz09_fmWCPWxAvbQ3YNllZPOcLmtE2mT_KZuk0VHW6gpImVs-DjTMjFsExbstiElpnfpgwp2jQwUbseFQ5xRLT69qlHxu2dBJaEEn03TsIxsHty9oURpdDBwUpt_VqDq3DuG2LstHcvHKAwrkH6LWJYcU_yle9iYeXRhWfg4n3yvR4NFlpyy1vfB83su-qXK_DTrv9kgp_A4_wVHc5fYjkn9y4DoXk3I%3D)
_Please see a message from our sponsor:_
---
| | | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=f589060ee7dc45b4b9d5af43cdebdc11&_e=-XAK12ssjEzZafHeqV1BOaf_E6mkTTagmIZ9eav2jfSg-ihg1OFnkbZafGEcZa4h5PaX3QLQu1-ZPvaL_ArynsV6KBEnq7hYe2PvfIpoBC00aLr5o2DYz51YgWJZc1Qs04q4Kh8_aWtSwsYHTAWN915EfObf2WfJZ5TjIgvouBGAlHYODJdG8csbg2ez7VBcEEggF696hFuphf1BXBknVL9CdENMqq2MkjcbRW5pO7H1HgY9Hn2AdGNP0hYjVn1fe9UEQQhnzdprd-snC6xTTLVZrj-EOCXzKsjwaPnitMeUcqw9BY3fFW0gXqVrfd_tbzpkHOW42oX2VdA5F0-Zewj9Yjt-YwGeXhr6jWx8CgFFVcIetJyzUugj-UfZFPfxQwRNXa_G4Ik6U42hO4jyKqLvrlxnf05HiU-qMTLaRKBjIVXE5tSwc6bN4Mh_T9BDcEGk9rIENgY75GCpHV5C_KEfPPUNvUbPJc7wN4gsKW4%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
You’ve probably noticed the spread of anti-American ideology into every area of American life.
---
| | Consider the 2019 controversy surrounding the Betsy Ross flag. Even though this was three years ago, you still may have heard of it.
Shortly before Independence Day, Nike announced its plans to release an athletic shoe featuring the Betsy Ross flag. Then Nike spokesman Colin Kaepernick objected, condemning the flag as a symbol of racism and slavery.

You won’t be surprised to learn that a social media storm followed, with Nike announcing that it was halting the production of the shoe.
---
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=f589060ee7dc45b4b9d5af43cdebdc11&_e=-XAK12ssjEzZafHeqV1BOaf_E6mkTTagmIZ9eav2jfSg-ihg1OFnkbZafGEcZa4h5PaX3QLQu1-ZPvaL_ArynsV6KBEnq7hYe2PvfIpoBC00aLr5o2DYz51YgWJZc1Qs04q4Kh8_aWtSwsYHTAWN915EfObf2WfJZ5TjIgvouBGAlHYODJdG8csbg2ez7VBcEEggF696hFuphf1BXBknVL9CdENMqq2MkjcbRW5pO7H1HgY9Hn2AdGNP0hYjVn1fe9UEQQhnzdprd-snC6xTTFUOdRRZnrQEeksLvKCYyQ_UvmCsEcNIefJ5nTgmRnzlJcdliDxrkxBFDY_f_22ne45S2fGxqd9M6pXU44YXfxcHxjFESCJ9XMoD-ohHPnFe3JCymAn041rLYiJcjJ_fQNkQ0BfWQjWKW7cj25jkpuSgylK9JzWjt13wO1zXCNPJLz3c41Ry-7gMbFb_iGcUHSqXt66UKKyI4TApBqN2RQo%3D)
---
| | The Kaepernick episode illustrates the problem of progressive education, which seeks to rewrite our nation’s history, and undermine the kind of informed patriotism essential to preserving liberty.

Now that you know what a few others think of the Betsy Ross flag...

...I hope you will give us your thoughts about the teaching of American history, including the American Revolution and the Declaration of Independence, by taking a short survey.

Just follow this link to share your opinion:

clean_body: You’ve probably noticed the spread of anti-American ideology into every area of American life. Please see a message from our sponsor: | | | | | Dear Fellow American, You’ve probably noticed the spread of anti-American ideology into every area of American life. | | Consider the 2019 controversy surrounding the Betsy Ross flag. Even though this was three years ago, you still may have heard of it. Shortly before Independence Day, Nike announced its plans to release an athletic shoe featuring the Betsy Ross flag. Then Nike spokesman Colin Kaepernick objected, condemning the flag as a symbol of racism and slavery. You won’t be surprised to learn that a social media storm followed, with Nike announcing that it was halting the production of the shoe. | | | The Kaepernick episode illustrates the problem of progressive education, which seeks to rewrite our nation’s history, and undermine the kind of informed patriotism essential to preserving liberty. Now that you know what a few others think of the Betsy Ross flag... ...I hope you will give us your thoughts about the teaching of American history, including the American Revolution and the Declaration of Independence, by taking a short survey. Just follow this link to share your opinion: Like the frenzy for tearing down statues that we witnessed in cities not long ago, the Nike shoe controversy is the bitter fruit of the progressive educational agenda. I hope I can count on you to help us confront this destructive ideology with the truth about American history. Please share your thoughts with us today! Bill Gray ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: How concerned are you about rising gas prices in America?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztnlogndoplnqfvdt6r94lj95asb7ei40hidfdpg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm4o34c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onhc4r6co5kekqj5cb3muor3cpgs9in9p7168p3edpj6pgectj7clj3dd1lmpirfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdn6mr3fcjicoq69cr4cuobapbi4no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhf0gkqu5qij0u9svv3h32kd25df1su9g3acbtmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm4o34c3h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zla7hse8sok0skcjumis2adb6uh9ptpddssstr08_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm4o34c3h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think--and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3emn989rffb75u01me810r685lc664vpj5tj7lg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm4o34c3h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zmmrraeecc05ordshpclt3ph4bcq7cl5r98ae13g).

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Democratic efforts to protect reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XJfZ0obzz4OvHlIcsDLJIg5jmTx%2B3U2o&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Extremist Republican abortion bans - and the U.S. Supreme Court's indication it will overturn _Roe v. Wade_ - aren't simply attacks on abortion and women's healthcare more broadly. They are attacks on fundamental human rights and individual liberty.
We have to fight these attacks at every level of government. Just recently, Connecticut led the way by passing and enacting legislation to expand abortion-related care. The new legislation also makes Connecticut a safe haven for those traveling from out of state seeking an abortion.
Across the country, Democratic leaders are taking action to protect the fundamental civil and human rights of American women.
**They need our support urgently:** Just recently, Oklahoma enacted the nation's strictest abortion ban into law. In Wyoming, a clinic planning to become the only one to offer abortion care in the state was set on fire before it could even open. This year alone, Republicans have introduced nearly 550 laws that would restrict abortion. This is a crisis.
**We must show the country grassroots Democrats won 't stand for it, which is why I need you and 80 other members of this team to take action by answering a simple question: [ Do you support efforts to protect reproductive freedom at every level of government? If you do, click here to add your name before my 11:59 p.m. deadline.](http://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-june-repro-1qs?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1183-su-nd)**
This is one of the most urgent moments our country has ever faced - one where the health and lives of women are on the line. Thank you so much for doing your part and taking action.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=T1A9qOOno%2F2%2FRrQcVHZgyw5jmTx%2B3U2o&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Mark Takano
subject: I won’t stand down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I’m exhausted, but still fighting

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46128733/348930137/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzg5OTZiMy0yYmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nygWgQCIk8FMKomBrCIGGB_r3gO_Sm-aIxAdaG0Qx54=)
---
Peter, it’s hard to believe that my primary election is 3 days away.

There’s so much work to be done — and _I know together, we can enact progressive change in California and beyond!_

**But far-right forces are sinking their teeth into CA-39. They know this district is KEY to protecting our slim Democratic majority.**

[**So with 3 days to go, can I count on you to chip in $3? I’ve set a lofty $7,500 pre-primary goal, and we need every dollar to rise above the noise and win this thing on Tuesday »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46128734/348930138/653852622?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220604_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzg5OTZiMy0yYmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nygWgQCIk8FMKomBrCIGGB_r3gO_Sm-aIxAdaG0Qx54=) | [3 DAYS LEFT! CHIP IN $3 TO ELECT MARK TAKANO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46128735/348930139/653852622?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20220604_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzg5OTZiMy0yYmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nygWgQCIk8FMKomBrCIGGB_r3gO_Sm-aIxAdaG0Qx54=)
---
Frankly, Peter, I’m exhausted with all that’s going on in this country.

_Senseless gun violence. The pandemic. Attacks on women’s rights._

**But we can’t stand down when Republicans are destroying our hard work and progressive agenda.**

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: 3 things
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Everything we've been fighting for – from voting rights to affordable health care – is on the line in Georgia.
#
Peter, I need to share these 3 quick things with you:
1. NBC News reports that Georgia is "the most important swing state" in the November elections, which means Senate control could be decided by our race.
2. Republicans have funneled nearly _$15 million_ into my GOP opponent Herschel Walker's campaign to defeat me – and he just launched a new TV ad to turn Georgia red.
3. **Our people-powered movement is falling short of the resources we need to fight back. If we don't see an immediate surge of grassroots support,** **we could be outraised and outspent right before our critical midnight deadline.**

Everything we've been fighting for – from voting rights to affordable health care – is on the line in Georgia. **With recent polls showing me 1 POINT BEHIND Walker we can't afford to miss a single fundraising goal. So I'm counting on you to help us close our budget gap now** :
**[Please, Peter, will you give before midnight a split $5 between my campaign and Patty Murray's so we can pull ahead, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46128821/348930482/-329467975?refcode=pm_em_220604_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDUyMjZmNi0yYmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9AQT9jOG2pf4pql1KCSoM2HifgUeXvfuf07Rd6qbe0=)**
I appreciate you, Peter – thank you.
Thanks,
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46128822/348930483/-329467975?refcode=pm_em_220604_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDUyMjZmNi0yYmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9AQT9jOG2pf4pql1KCSoM2HifgUeXvfuf07Rd6qbe0=)****

**Here's the truth:**

Folks are beginning to realize that McCarthy has been terrible for our community. While he defends Trump and the far right, the Central Valley suffers. Residents here are struggling, and McCarthy isn't doing a damn thing about it.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: Start Strong, Finish Stronger.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
Just like that, June is off to a roaring start! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f307394365a6/start-strong-finish-stronger?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=895d251477&e=10c1db3257)
---
|
---
| Friend,
---
| | On the campaign trail, **the start of each month brings new opportunities;** opportunities for **more excitement,** **more connection, and more success.** But with just **four weeks until the Republican primary,** this month brings us our**biggest opportunity yet. **

**The Republican primary is on June 28th,** and it will be our moment to **stand up for Utah's future and unseat Sen. Mike Lee.** Every moment we've spent **talking to voters,** every mile we've driven **traveling the state,** and every second we've taken **listening to Utah voices** has brought us here!

The Republican primary is undoubtedly the **biggest event of the month,** but there are a few **important dates to keep in mind** so we can **get out the vote** and end this month with a **victory. **
---
|
---
| If you are **unaffiliated or not yet registered to vote,** it's not too late! You can **affiliate Republican online by June 17th** to receive your mail-in ballot, or you can **register and affiliate in-person at the voting booth through election day,** June 28th. To register or affiliate in person, **please bring at least two forms of identification** to your polling location.

For **more information on how you can participate** in this month's Republican primary, **head to[vote.utah.gov](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=645b5742a7&e=10c1db3257). **
---
|
---
| With all of the exciting opportunities a new month has to offer, the first few days are crucial for **building momentum and setting the tone** for the coming weeks, and so far, **June is off to a roaring start! **

This week, I had the opportunity to **speak to voters** on the Utah Debate Commission and Utah Republican Party debate stages.

Although Sen. Mike Lee **decided against taking the stage with me** at the Utah Debate Commission event, it has always been my top priority to **give voters an opportunity to have their questions answered** —any time, any place. This week, **that commitment paid off,** and both nights of debate were a **monumental success!** In case you missed it, **here are some of the highlights: **
---
| |
---
At Wednesday's debate with the Utah Republican Party,**I took the stage with Sen. Mike Lee,** and viewers took their seats in a **sea of Team Becky!**

The debate tackled issues ranging from **election integrity** to **public lands management** to **drought** and the **water crisis.**
---
| The debate was held at Draper Park Middle School, and although school was out for the summer,**I couldn't help but think of the students** —our future generations—as I gave my **closing statement.**
---
| |
---

"It is not lost on me that we are standing in a **middle school auditorium.** "

"These issues **impact the kids who will show up in this very auditorium next fall.** These answers are about more than this stage, they are about **ineffective leadership.** "

"Utahns are tired of **ineffective leadership in Congress**...I know **things can be better;** that's why I'm in this race."
---
|
---
| At Thursday's debate with the Utah Debate Commission, I took the stage with **Sen. Lee's empty podium** and Ally Isom at**KSL Studios.**
---
| |
---
The debate tackled issues from **inflation and energy** to **national security** and my experience **working across the aisle.**** **

Although we did not have a live audience in attendance, **Sen. Mike Lee's absence** was felt by viewers at home and **across the country. **
---
|
---
| |
---
These debates allow voters to hear candidates' vision for Utah's future, **but it's more than that. **I shared my thoughts in my **closing statement:**

"At the end of the day, this election is not about me, Ally, or even Mike Lee. **It's about you** —the voters and **people of this great state.** "
---
|
---
| |
---
"Utahns are tired of politicians who have **broken promises** and contribute to a **broken congress."**

"We need leaders with a **track record of actual legislative work and effective leadership** on the issues that **make a difference in our country."**
---
|
---
| Thank you to the**hundreds of supporters** who attended, streamed, and followed this week's debates!

Utahns deserve a Senator who will **show up, answer tough questions, and pursue proactive and productive solutions.** I was thankful for the opportunity to do **all three** on the debate stage.

**If you haven't already,** you can watch Wednesday's **[GOP debate](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=ddd383d806&e=10c1db3257)** and Thursday's **[Utah Debate Commission](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=52059defff&e=10c1db3257)[ debate](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=1808fdcdf7&e=10c1db3257)** to **hear more about my plan** to bring **productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions** to Washington. You can find Team Becky's **debate coverage** on Twitter **[@beckyforutah](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=9aa97c4221&e=10c1db3257)! **
---
| As always,**thank you for your support. **Between **summer vacation, family barbeques, and all of our great state's outdoor recreation,** June can be a busy month for Utah families. But, with your support, we can **work, play, and succeed** **together** —all month long.
---
|
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a613301e4a&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE NOW")
---
| | | | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a534f0b87d&e=10c1db3257)
---

clean_body: Just like that, June is off to a roaring start! | | | | | | | Friend, | | On the campaign trail, the start of each month brings new opportunities; opportunities for more excitement, more connection, and more success. But with just four weeks until the Republican primary, this month brings us ourbiggest opportunity yet. The Republican primary is on June 28th, and it will be our moment to stand up for Utah's future and unseat Sen. Mike Lee. Every moment we've spent talking to voters, every mile we've driven traveling the state, and every second we've taken listening to Utah voices has brought us here! The Republican primary is undoubtedly the biggest event of the month, but there are a few important dates to keep in mind so we can get out the vote and end this month with a victory. | | If you are unaffiliated or not yet registered to vote, it's not too late! You can affiliate Republican online by June 17th to receive your mail-in ballot, or you can register and affiliate in-person at the voting booth through election day, June 28th. To register or affiliate in person, please bring at least two forms of identification to your polling location. For more information on how you can participate in this month's Republican primary, head to. | | With all of the exciting opportunities a new month has to offer, the first few days are crucial for building momentum and setting the tone for the coming weeks, and so far, June is off to a roaring start! This week, I had the opportunity to speak to voters on the Utah Debate Commission and Utah Republican Party debate stages. Although Sen. Mike Lee decided against taking the stage with me at the Utah Debate Commission event, it has always been my top priority to give voters an opportunity to have their questions answered —any time, any place. This week, that commitment paid off, and both nights of debate were a monumental success! In case you missed it, here are some of the highlights: | | At Wednesday's debate with the Utah Republican Party,I took the stage with Sen. Mike Lee, and viewers took their seats in a sea of Team Becky! The debate tackled issues ranging from election integrity to public lands management to drought and the water crisis. | The debate was held at Draper Park Middle School, and although school was out for the summer,I couldn't help but think of the students —our future generations—as I gave my closing statement. | | "It is not lost on me that we are standing in a middle school auditorium. " "These issues impact the kids who will show up in this very auditorium next fall. These answers are about more than this stage, they are about ineffective leadership. " "Utahns are tired of ineffective leadership in Congress...I know things can be better; that's why I'm in this race." | | At Thursday's debate with the Utah Debate Commission, I took the stage with Sen. Lee's empty podium and Ally Isom atKSL Studios. | | The debate tackled issues from inflation and energy to national security and my experience working across the aisle. Although we did not have a live audience in attendance, Sen. Mike Lee's absence was felt by viewers at home and across the country. | | | These debates allow voters to hear candidates' vision for Utah's future, but it's more than that. I shared my thoughts in my closing statement: "At the end of the day, this election is not about me, Ally, or even Mike Lee. It's about you —the voters and people of this great state. " | | | "Utahns are tired of politicians who have broken promises and contribute to a broken congress." "We need leaders with a track record of actual legislative work and effective leadership on the issues that make a difference in our country." | | Thank you to thehundreds of supporters who attended, streamed, and followed this week's debates! Utahns deserve a Senator who will show up, answer tough questions, and pursue proactive and productive solutions. I was thankful for the opportunity to do all three on the debate stage. If you haven't already, you can watch Wednesday's and Thursday's to hear more about my plan to bring productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions to Washington. You can find Team Becky's debate coverage on Twitter ! | As always,thank you for your support. Between summer vacation, family barbeques, and all of our great state's outdoor recreation, June can be a busy month for Utah families. But, with your support, we can work, play, and succeed together —all month long. | | | "DONATE NOW" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate P.O. Box 1467 Bountiful, UT 84011 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . Paid for by Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate.

name: Maggie HQ
subject: Now more than ever, we need a voting rights leader in office.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
Our rights are on the line.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46129062/348932096/-532505380?refcode=EM_F_220602Primary3_E_HQ_30DO180DD_7_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzY2YTYyYS0zMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2f2IgYNKOVDxNBlhuI8JZU4nOfMPGXRidP71C6HV2Q=)
Let’s talk about what’s on the line this year:
* **Reproductive Rights:** We are the only state in the region that will continue to protect abortion care once Roe v. Wade is overturned. We need to ensure our rights remain protected.
* **Gun Safety:** New Mexico is an "open carry" state, which means that it's legal for most adults to openly carry guns and other deadly weapons in public without a license. We are home to a strong gun culture, but we also have thousands of parents that are terrified not knowing if their child’s school may be the next target of a mass shooting. Our voters will likely have to decide where we stand on our current gun legislation.
* **Voting Rights:** The New Mexico Voting Rights Act would expand and protect voting rights by making Election Day a state holiday, restoring voting rights of those who were previously incarcerated, extending early voting, creating a permanent absentee ballot list for absentee voters, and more. Maggie will use her voice as Secretary of State to lobby for this and similar legislation.

[**_The fate of all these issues and more will be decided at the ballot box in November. But with just 2 days left before the primary election, we must make sure our only pro-democracy candidate for Secretary of State is ready to win. clean_body: Our rights are on the line. = Let’s talk about what’s on the line this year: Reproductive Rights: We are the only state in the region that will continue to protect abortion care once Roe v. Wade is overturned. We need to ensure our rights remain protected. Gun Safety: New Mexico is an "open carry" state, which means that it's legal for most adults to openly carry guns and other deadly weapons in public without a license. We are home to a strong gun culture, but we also have thousands of parents that are terrified not knowing if their child’s school may be the next target of a mass shooting. Our voters will likely have to decide where we stand on our current gun legislation. Voting Rights: The New Mexico Voting Rights Act would expand and protect voting rights by making Election Day a state holiday, restoring voting rights of those who were previously incarcerated, extending early voting, creating a permanent absentee ballot list for absentee voters, and more. Maggie will use her voice as Secretary of State to lobby for this and similar legislation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = It’s never been more important for New Mexicans to have a Secretary of State who will stand up for the right to vote and defend our elections. Maggie has been a fierce advocate for voting rights her entire career. Now, it’s on us to help her stay in office and continue that great work. = Thank you, Maggie HQ Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >> _____=** Friends of Maggie PO Box 473 Albuquerque, NM 87103 United States | Paid for by Friends of Maggie Contributions or gifts to Friends of Maggie are not tax deductible. _

name: Tom Brennan
subject: Quick Update: Critical June 7 Deadline
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
In case I haven’t had a chance to meet you yet online or at our events, I’d like to introduce myself: I’m Tom, and I’m Peter Franchot’s Finance Director. I live in Towson, where I have deep family roots, and I am so excited to be part of the grassroots movement to secure a stronger future for Maryland’s communities.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0604?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0604?amount=20.22]
Our team is just days away from our critical June 7 fundraising deadline. This is the deadline ahead of one of our last major finance reports before the July 19 primary election – and we’re in a race against time to make sure that our team comes out on top.
I’ve been reviewing the books, and here’s my quick update: we’re making steady progress towards our fundraising goal of $20,000 – but we must pick up the pace if we want to stay on track! If you are able, can I count on you to chip in anything you can spare to help us get to the finish line?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0604?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0604?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0604?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0604?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0604]
I’ve known Peter for many years now. He transformed the Comptroller’s Office from a typical government bureaucracy into a nation-leading model of results-oriented service. He understands that state government must get the basics right for our working families, and as Maryland’s next Governor, he’ll bring the experience, the vision, and the leadership needed to get it done.
Peter is leading the rest of the field in the polls, and he’s gained more endorsements than any other candidate for Governor. We have the momentum in this race – and meeting our $20,000 fundraising goal will be critical towards maintaining our lead! Click here to power our movement to victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0604?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Tom
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june7deadline_0604?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

The midterms are almost here, and it's critical that we keep building momentum if we're going to retake our majority.

That's why I'm asking you, Friend, to take the **[Official 2022 Congressional District Canvass survey](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60267514:Wl8DP8hMN:m:1:2532013465:9A1D3719E9DBE15569C6FB87B0F36CDD:r)** \- the largest canvass ever taken for a midterm election.

Newt Gingrich

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: pics from the early 2000s
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
the stakes have never been higher than they are this time around.
| | |
---
Hi there,

I lost the very first election I ran in. It was 2002, and I was running for New Hampshire State Senate.

I’ve run in many other races since then, and together with people like you, we’ve won many of them. I don’t take the privilege of serving Granite Staters for granted.

As we look ahead to this coming Election Day – the most important one we’ve faced since that first campaign in 2002 – I wanted to share a few pictures from campaigns over the years:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46129861/348935391/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1120-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhmMzJkYy0zMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hMBXKAIX-JbRh8FHHiCyRSr7LcqQzkS2bhaUyzLnNb4=)
I’ll say it again: the stakes have never been higher than they are this time around.

Democrats hold the narrowest majority possible in the Senate, a recent public poll shows me down by two points, and Mitch McConnell is chomping at the bit to roll back the progress we’ve been fighting for since that first race in 2002. **Just last week, his dark money super PAC just announced a $4.7 million ad buy in New Hampshire.****McConnell is targeting me because he knows every single one of my opponents would be a rubber stamp for his anti-choice agenda. **

Look, I really need your help. Our campaign needs the funds to take the lead in the polls. If we don’t get a surge in grassroots donors, we could lose in New Hampshire – and the Senate majority. **[Will you please pitch in $3 or whatever you can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46129862/348935392/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1120-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhmMzJkYy0zMGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hMBXKAIX-JbRh8FHHiCyRSr7LcqQzkS2bhaUyzLnNb4=)**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5arh28d2oplim19nkgjic2ulne56jrmfh60csto_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqrad1km5p30spl6uqj3c34mjj7fdb6murb6chjcgp62tb4m8on7c3k6qp74ohn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6hj30s5lmgrr4sr66hgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clgmcor5cdj60oh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zok47ceuj0ufh0u0h7pl458o46qktpmqni5k94ro_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphmaor6c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlf1n7ip4rvuev8k5vq9dnr032g00hkb8i3sgg70_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphmaor6c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfu652aofqaojkgmpaqaebt032k9dco08j8t95ng_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphmaor6c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Are the Biden administration’s energy policies affecting you?
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb1gedntfpm55o6ir49vi4vemc2lmof9vb01j78g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphmaor2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t5imkrm6ddnc2p70t5hekpn2c5ksmpj8o5mmlhmcolic2omas766crb9clj62oefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dplmorr4tb664ob6p1nm2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z54n43mqs2nfudh4jchmg1hk9adre66uusirvnd0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphmaor2clh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlitmndg19bsn03e9kvbhau2ls88lkcghv314heg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphmaor2clh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd2d7qdnuq4vhula2quink90lh6lgqstnctsurq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphmaor2clh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

subject: re: Roe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
We can still protect abortion rights
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/9121?t=6&akid=1141%2E564421%2EmZytAn) Friends,

I’m Nikki Fried, and I’m running for Governor to defeat Ron DeSantis.

We all know that Roe v. Wade is on the brink of being overturned.

But, what you may not know is that, unlike a lot of states, Florida doesn’t have a trigger law that will immediately ban abortion once Roe is overturned.

**We still have a small window to win this fight and protect abortion rights — but only if we defeat Ron DeSantis this November.**

[ ****We’re getting down to the wire, team. Can you split a $3 donation between me and Ron Be Gone to help us defeat DeSantis, take back our freedoms, and secure abortion rights? »****](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/9101?t=8&akid=1141%2E564421%2EmZytAn) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Nikki Fried and Ron Be Gone immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/9127?t=14&akid=1141%2E564421%2EmZytAn)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/9128?t=15&akid=1141%2E564421%2EmZytAn)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/9129?t=16&akid=1141%2E564421%2EmZytAn)
I’ve never wavered on this issue. I’ve spent my entire life standing up for women’s rights and abortion rights, and I’m running for Governor to continue my fight for Florida women.

But first, we have to stand together and defeat Ron DeSantis.

[ ****It’s going to take all of us to win this fight, friend. So today, I’m asking you to split a donation between me and Ron Be Gone to help us get rid of Ron DeSantis and take back our reproductive freedom. Click here to chip in now. »****](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/9101?t=18&akid=1141%2E564421%2EmZytAn)

Thanks!

\-- Nikki Fried
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1141%2E564421%2EmZytAn). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1141%2E564421%2EmZytAn).**

name: Josh Harder
subject: water, snacks, sunscreen, oh my!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/YWOM-6rfv2Eqav5pKUX7Ql4GYHcuckZiPc01h7WkXMA=/5CjrpEYTgIqgdJdKl2jZzZwxIJbKV5R7TMjvhN36QHg=?refcode=E16015-20220603-GOTV-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Hey all, I'm writing this email in the air conditioning of our campaign HQ - we just got back from knocking doors. The scene here in the office is incredibly energizing: we have volunteers picking up door knocking packets, a bunch of people on the phones and we've had people walking in all day asking for yard signs. It's exactly what we need to be doing 4 days out from the top 2 primary on Tuesday. It's all hands on deck! **One thing we didn 't quite plan for however, is how bloody hot it is outside (climate change anyone?). I really thought we had everything covered with our fundraising goal, but we've had to purchase a bunch more supplies - water, snacks, even sunscreen - to make sure this influx of volunteers have everything they need. A good problem to have I guess?** [**So I 'm reaching out for your help: Will you chip in right now to help us cover these additional expenses and get out the vote so we can beat the Republicans?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YWOM-6rfv2Eqav5pKUX7Ql4GYHcuckZiPc01h7WkXMA=/5CjrpEYTgIqgdJdKl2jZzZwxIJbKV5R7TMjvhN36QHg=?refcode=E16015-20220603-GOTV-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) [****](https://act.myngp.com/el/YWOM-6rfv2Eqav5pKUX7Ql4GYHcuckZiPc01h7WkXMA=/5CjrpEYTgIqgdJdKl2jZzZwxIJbKV5R7TMjvhN36QHg=?refcode=E16015-20220603-GOTV-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$9](https://act.myngp.com/el/YWOM-6rfv2Eqav5pKUX7Ql4GYHcuckZiPc01h7WkXMA=/5CjrpEYTgIqgdJdKl2jZzZwxIJbKV5R7TMjvhN36QHg=?express_lane=true&refcode=E16015-20220603-GOTV-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=9)**

I really thought we had everything covered with our fundraising goal, but we've had to purchase a bunch more supplies - water, snacks, even sunscreen - to make sure this influx of volunteers have everything they need. A good problem to have I guess? If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We're putting everything we've got into this get out the vote effort because we know this top 2 election is our first chance to show how strong our movement to keep CA-9 blue really is. I promise you Kevin McCarthy is watching our election Tuesday as a barometer for his chances to become the next Speaker. We 're going to prove to him we're not giving up this seat - and we're going to do that by showing up in huge numbers on Tuesday! Your support means everything, \- Josh * = =

name: Liz Mathis
subject: Happy Pride Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46130196/348936862/-471267517?refcode=em_msg_2022.06.04_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjZmMWMxMC0zNWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ur1wJ5YrV2s2kXdmCOEHzViLrdPHyI_pNwe-yHPUSSE=) Happy Pride Month, Peter! This month, I’m proud to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community here in eastern Iowa and across the nation. This is a time to honor the history of the LGBTQ+ community in this country, but also a reminder of how much there is still to fight for. As states across the country propose harmful and discriminatory anti-gay bills, we must stand united in our efforts to create an inclusive, safe environment for our LGBTQ+ neighbors, friends and family. As your next Congresswoman I will support legislation that protects Iowans against unlawful discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity. I will prioritize policies that protect the dignity and freedom of all Iowa families. **And I will make sure the next generation of LGBTQ+ Iowans doesn’t have to fight the same battles as so many who have come before.** It’s clear, no one should be denied the fundamental right to be who they are or love who they love. clean_body: = Happy Pride Month, Peter! This month, I’m proud to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community here in eastern Iowa and across the nation. This is a time to honor the history of the LGBTQ+ community in this country, but also a reminder of how much there is still to fight for. As states across the country propose harmful and discriminatory anti-gay bills, we must stand united in our efforts to create an inclusive, safe environment for our LGBTQ+ neighbors, friends and family. As your next Congresswoman I will support legislation that protects Iowans against unlawful discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity. I will prioritize policies that protect the dignity and freedom of all Iowa families. And I will make sure the next generation of LGBTQ+ Iowans doesn’t have to fight the same battles as so many who have come before. It’s clear, no one should be denied the fundamental right to be who they are or love who they love. Together, let’s work towards making a more equal and inclusive future for all of us. I will be a champion for equality and a voice for all Iowa families in Congress and would appreciate your support to help me get there. | = \- Liz Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. body:
Right now, the stakes couldn’t be higher.
#
Peter,
**[I’m up for re-election this November and hoping I can count on your support to defend this Senate seat and keep Illinois blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46130202/348936897/-1306447847?refcode=dd_em_220604_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODM0NWQzZC0zNWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPukw3gKLw6_XTJenXcZjSaSHHBZPbfoUkxIQrdgZOE=)** But first, I was hoping to take a minute to explain why this election is so important.
When I was in high school, the company my dad worked for was sold. My dad lost his job and we struggled to get by. My brother and I relied on reduced-price meals at school. Our family used food stamps to put dinner on the table.
That assistance made the difference for our family during a tough time. We got through it because leaders who cared about working families made sure we got the help we needed.
Right now, so many families like mine are struggling. Prices are high and wages aren’t keeping up. People are counting on the Senate to help with things like affordable housing and child care, job creation and investments in key areas like public transit and infrastructure.
I’ve been working with Senator Durbin to deliver for Illinoisans. But we know there’s more work to be done–and we’re certainly not backing down now.
**[So please, Peter, will you help me win this re-election campaign and continue advocating for working families across Illinois by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Senator Durbin’s? A contribution of $5, or whatever you can spare, could make all the difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46130203/348936898/-1306447847?refcode=dd_em_220604_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODM0NWQzZC0zNWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPukw3gKLw6_XTJenXcZjSaSHHBZPbfoUkxIQrdgZOE=)**
Thank you for your support,
Tammy Duckworth

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46130204/348936899/-1306447847?refcode=dd_em_220604_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODM0NWQzZC0zNWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPukw3gKLw6_XTJenXcZjSaSHHBZPbfoUkxIQrdgZOE=)****

| | | Hey there Peter,

I'm following up with you for Kellyanne Conway regarding her new memoir _Here 's the Deal._

You see, President Trump's former Senior Advisor Kellyanne Conway emailed you earlier because she's telling her story of President Trump's time in the White House in her new memoir Here's the Deal.

_**And right now, I 'm looking at a signed copy for you, Peter. But it looks like you haven't claimed it yet, so I am unable to send it out. **_

**[So if you'd like me to ship this signed copy to you, can you please claim it by CLICKING HERE >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518677:JIDEcto0N:m:1:3317145305:1C5E7E0F4AF8A121B6EC8031632BFD7B:r "So if you’d like me to
ship this signed copy to you, can you please claim it by CLICKING HERE >>>")**

Thank you in advance for your prompt response,

Tim
House Republicans HQ

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Kellyanne Conway **
Subject: [Special Offer] Get a signed copy of my new memoir

Peter,

As President Trump's former campaign manager and Senior White House Advisor, there's been a lot said about me these last five years by the Fake News media.

But now I'm telling my story, in my own words, and I think you'll want to read it, Peter. From the 2016 campaign to the halls of 1600 Pennsylvania Ave, I'll give you the true and uncensored account of my time working for President Trump.

But these are selling out fast, we only have **100 books left!**

body:
#

Friends —
Trump just endorsed Blake Masters, so we need to know: Is there ANYTHING AT ALL we can say to convince you to make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign today?
What if we told you that Blake Masters supports cutting taxes for billionaires so they don't have to pay their fair share, all while increasing the retirement age?
What if we told you that Blake Masters supports a national abortion ban that would criminalize abortion entirely in this country and imprison abortion providers?
What if we told you that Blake Masters has said it’s not true that women are paid less than men in this country, and that men are the only ones who work dangerous jobs?
And what if we told you that if we miss our fundraising goals we could end up with that MAGA extremist representing Arizona in the Senate?
Blake Masters is too extreme for Arizona, and we can’t afford to lose Mark’s voice in the Senate. So, we’re asking:

clean_body: Friends — Trump just endorsed Blake Masters, so we need to know: Is there ANYTHING AT ALL we can say to convince you to make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign today? What if we told you that Blake Masters supports cutting taxes for billionaires so they don't have to pay their fair share, all while increasing the retirement age? What if we told you that Blake Masters supports a national abortion ban that would criminalize abortion entirely in this country and imprison abortion providers? What if we told you that Blake Masters has said it’s not true that women are paid less than men in this country, and that men are the only ones who work dangerous jobs? And what if we told you that if we miss our fundraising goals we could end up with that MAGA extremist representing Arizona in the Senate? Blake Masters is too extreme for Arizona, and we can’t afford to lose Mark’s voice in the Senate. So, we’re asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** It isn’t even about how much you can give today. It’s about how many people are chipping in. That’s how we reach these goals, defeat Trump and Masters, and keep Mark in the Senate. Thanks for your support, Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Patty Pansing Brooks
subject: [Response Requested] 2022 Inflation Survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PATTY FOR CONGRESS
body:
How are you and your family doing? Have you been affected by the rising costs of gas and groceries – and how can I help?

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46130580/348939074/333259033?refcode=em_220604_costsurvey&sourceid=1030989&ms=em_220604_costsurvey&refcode2=9de6468b-38e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGU2NDY4Yi0zOGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MA5YeVS-dOL_6wzKM4APeCTuXHPAEqvaymQzbrU6hNo=)
---
| | Hi friends, Right now, working families across the nation are struggling to keep up with the rising costs of living. Many families in our district, including my own, are feeling the increased strain. **So I wanted to check in with you about how you and your family are doing.** How have you been affected by the rising costs of gas and groceries — and how can I help? Where have you been affected the most, and what would you like me to prioritize? **[My team has put together a form that you can use to let me know your thoughts.
