name: Laura Loomer
subject: We can’t let them win . . .
body:
I already know the strategy of these expensive Big Tech lawyers, and they're going to stretch this out until I can no longer afford to keep going.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/n92P177a42MuOltBZv0I6g/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/n92P177a42MuOltBZv0I6g/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg)Big Tech's legal teams are assembling against me in my lawsuit against Facebook, Twitter, Zuckerberg and Dorsey.

Facebook and Zuckerberg have retained Sonal Mehta as their legal counsel. Sonal is a graduate of UC Berkley School of Law - which should already give you a hint as to what her political ideology is. **Sonal is also still an adjunct professor at Berkley** and has been since 2011 - working through the Berkley Riots when Antifa communists decided to destroy their own campus with violent outbursts in opposition to Free Speech.

Because I've previously sued Big Tech, I already know the strategy of these expensive Big Tech lawyers, and they're going to **stretch this out until I can no longer afford to keep going**.

That's why I need your continued support, so if you can, [please donate to fund my lawsuit against Big Tech today.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/n92P177a42MuOltBZv0I6g/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg)

We need to raise $48,700 in June, [so every dollar you can donate will help me get closer to the goal and help me continue to pay attorneys, paralegals, travel costs and our process servers.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/n92P177a42MuOltBZv0I6g/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg)

Right now, I'm sitting on a $2,300 legal expense that was just billed this week. **If you can help with anything,[please help me cover that bill](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/n92P177a42MuOltBZv0I6g/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg).**

Here's the reality, Facebook is worth $524 billion, while Twitter is valued at a "paltry" $28 billion.

My net worth isn't anywhere close to that! And they know that!

But they underestimate my passion and your passion to hold Big Tech accountable for silencing our voices and meddling in our elections!

**I don 't care how big of a Goliath I have to face; I'm going to fight!** [And I need you by my side to do just that!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/n92P177a42MuOltBZv0I6g/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg)

So please, [chip in whatever you can today to help me hit our June fundraising goals and keep fighting!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/n92P177a42MuOltBZv0I6g/dG2grUvcnzxbhzwKoiE763Jg)

Thanks for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: GOP ALERTS
subject: This is how we save America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tarkanian for Nevada |
body:
Establishment hacks are helping them at every turn, pushing radical policies instead of fighting for our conservative American v
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjjjifn2044lukjuvv8gdpt0q7pn2uj2h2jejh18_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2sjgetj77d74m6prcoj7cdhb7dj6ccob8c71c2oj6p9nm6r6edb166pm1dpjcsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooreddm6up72pjks2pm1ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqvj337pgmq9he3b0rvit8u039t0ekhrdcnaa8v0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
Friend, Left-wing extremists are destroying our country. _But they aren’t doing it alone... _ **Establishment hacks are helping them at every turn, pushing radical policies instead of fighting for our conservative American values.** I know this because my opponent Mark Amodei is one of them. He voted with Congressional Democrats more than his own party! Our country is on the brink and we don’t have much time left to save it. Our only hope now is to send as many **__strong conservative leaders__** as possible to Washington in November. That’s why I’m reaching out to you, friend. **My primary is less than two weeks away, and we are down to the wire.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z22f2ls5k8c63iv34a7l414kl5pksdaitp1on6h0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
I’m giving this fight all I’ve got because the people of Nevada deserve better than RINO Mark Amodei. But my opponent has deep pockets, so I could really use some help in these _**_CRUCIAL_**_**** final days. **[Can I count on you to pitch in a few bucks and help send a TRUE CONSERVATIVE to Washington who isn’t afraid to stand up to the radical Left?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbmnaj5udq2lqb8h62h1ubhhoojn0trba68gcm68_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)**
---
[**SUPPORT A TRUE CONSERVATIVE: PITCH IN $15**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z00r7el4on97pqu0um6mt73por7qf53nd7uils98_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj3u9clihlhp12o1nfbrfb1h62j4qkq4r5a6f7eg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
**My name is Danny Tarkanian. I’m currently a Douglas County Commissioner, and I’m running to represent conservatives in Nevada’s 2nd Congressional District.** I’ve lived in Nevada with my family for close to 50 years. My wife, Amy, is the former Nevada Republican Party Chairwoman. Together, we have four beautiful children that we’ve raised right here in Gardnerville. We want to provide our young children with a better atmosphere to grow and develop in their formative years. I want my children to have the same childhood experience I had growing up in a small, close-knit community with traditional Nevada culture and values.
---
[**STAND WITH DANNY TARKANIAN**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdaj2cuoll974a2jqffbqh6qq5uto2c14ivjh8m0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
**The values that make Nevada so great are the same values my grandmother, Rose, instilled in us.** She escaped the Armenian Genocide and came to America for a better life for her family. She persevered through the early death of her husband and the Great Depression. Her son, Jerry, became the greatest basketball coach in NCAA history. My mother, Lois, founded the first private school for the deaf in California and currently serves on the Nevada Board of Regents. **My family’s story is proof the American Dream is achievable for anyone and everyone.**
And a smaller government means _every_ American has the freedom to achieve their dreams, whatever they may be.
---
[**CHIP IN TO FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztk5q98qhq7pejirkrs0t0s7kbj9ge7omtadrv3g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
friend, I carry my grandmother Rose’s story close to my heart because I’ve seen first-hand how _truly amazing_ America is. I’ve seen first-hand the opportunities our nation has. **And because of those opportunities, I, too, have achieved my own version of the American Dream.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlj2pr3k2nipkoiv1fdfdomrn7pih4keockc5m0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
[**MAKE AMERICA PROSPEROUS AGAIN**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs8cbfmvgbpe4o6j895lvuoim1mk9092oh9md1m8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
In fact, I successfully developed the Tarkanian Professional Center, a 100,000-square foot commercial real estate center that has thrived even through our state’s real estate downturn. And I founded a successful non-profit youth basketball organization. We teach young children the life lessons they learn through playing sports, like hard work, commitment, and sportsmanship. Since the start of the program, thousands of kids have participated and it’s something I’m incredibly proud of.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zis30ul2jgvlhpfurrsuhhtm1imllhrbe0sid448_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
I don’t believe our nation is living up to our greatest potential, Friend. The American Dream is harder for so many to achieve because of Big Government, the liberal Left, and the DC Establishment. _**I’m running for Congress because I want to get back to the America First policies that make our country – and our citizens – prosperous.**_ **[Can I count on you to join my team? >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqs7ia9aest3okkna4o4dferc4dquqh7moievlbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)**
---
[**DONATE: $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcgcf6esvii4tv69ge60kgtt72130pqdcq0j9168_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
[**DONATE: $75**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8em7bta4eea0k3q22oqf9qal67mj4tv46ck7rbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
[**DONATE: $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7c2la85ieh1r83sbjrjfi6iu7voo02rf632v7a0_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
[**DONATE: $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdej7fjv6367bf5oj9dgfrlsqla39gh319jluito_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)
---
[**DONATE: ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3fqeopgfjcrts5b0pb7f51ohqk3712p4nuk5pe8_rp22sh2s8i66pb1cphm9oj2chh2bs)

Thank you for fighting alongside me,
---

clean_body: Establishment hacks are helping them at every turn, pushing radical policies instead of fighting for our conservative American v | | | Friend, Left-wing extremists are destroying our country. But they aren’t doing it alone... Establishment hacks are helping them at every turn, pushing radical policies instead of fighting for our conservative American values. I know this because my opponent Mark Amodei is one of them. He voted with Congressional Democrats more than his own party! Our country is on the brink and we don’t have much time left to save it. Our only hope now is to send as many strong conservative leaders as possible to Washington in November. That’s why I’m reaching out to you, friend. My primary is less than two weeks away, and we are down to the wire. I’m giving this fight all I’ve got because the people of Nevada deserve better than RINO Mark Amodei. But my opponent has deep pockets, so I could really use some help in these CRUCIAL** final days. My name is Danny Tarkanian. I’m currently a Douglas County Commissioner, and I’m running to represent conservatives in Nevada’s 2nd Congressional District. I’ve lived in Nevada with my family for close to 50 years. My wife, Amy, is the former Nevada Republican Party Chairwoman. Together, we have four beautiful children that we’ve raised right here in Gardnerville. We want to provide our young children with a better atmosphere to grow and develop in their formative years. I want my children to have the same childhood experience I had growing up in a small, close-knit community with traditional Nevada culture and values. The values that make Nevada so great are the same values my grandmother, Rose, instilled in us. She escaped the Armenian Genocide and came to America for a better life for her family. She persevered through the early death of her husband and the Great Depression. Her son, Jerry, became the greatest basketball coach in NCAA history. My mother, Lois, founded the first private school for the deaf in California and currently serves on the Nevada Board of Regents. My family’s story is proof the American Dream is achievable for anyone and everyone. And a smaller government means every American has the freedom to achieve their dreams, whatever they may be. friend, I carry my grandmother Rose’s story close to my heart because I’ve seen first-hand how truly amazing America is. I’ve seen first-hand the opportunities our nation has. And because of those opportunities, I, too, have achieved my own version of the American Dream. In fact, I successfully developed the Tarkanian Professional Center, a 100,000-square foot commercial real estate center that has thrived even through our state’s real estate downturn. And I founded a successful non-profit youth basketball organization. We teach young children the life lessons they learn through playing sports, like hard work, commitment, and sportsmanship. Since the start of the program, thousands of kids have participated and it’s something I’m incredibly proud of. I don’t believe our nation is living up to our greatest potential, Friend. The American Dream is harder for so many to achieve because of Big Government, the liberal Left, and the DC Establishment. I’m running for Congress because I want to get back to the America First policies that make our country – and our citizens – prosperous. ** Thank you for fighting alongside me, Danny TarkanianCandidate, NV-02 | | | | | Paid for by Tarkanian for Nevada | | 1026 Sun Crest Ct, Gardnerville NV, 89460 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: Both of my opponents came out for Roe being overturned, and then promptly forgot how to speak when asked if Joe Biden legitimately won the presidential election. | | = Friends, on Tuesday night I debated the two Republican candidates running to represent California’s 3rd District. Both of my opponents came out for Roe being overturned , and then promptly forgot how to speak when asked if Joe Biden legitimately won the presidential election. Assemblyman Kevin Kiley said “ it depends on what you mean by legitimate ” and Sheriff Scott Jones said “ I don’t know, it depends who you watch, which newscaster you watch. ” Yep, these are both actual elected officials — who want to represent us in Congress. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = — Dr. Kermit Jones P.S. To be clear: reproductive rights need to be protected, Joe Biden is the real president, and we’re going to win this election by being the only campaign actually willing to say what we believe. Are you in? | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. As a military veteran, Ashley understands what it means to bear arms, and she has witnessed firsthand the damage and toll of using AK-47s and AR-15s overseas — weapons of war do not belong here in our communities.

Thank you for all you do. Team Ehasz (P.S. Read more about the protest featured in The Reporter at this.) = | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. subject: quick question for you

body:
Hey there --
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's new social media app? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's app?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
__
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518643:JBBc3toNl:m:1:3253819041:A520D906BCE5750246C8F0AFB56F5A71:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518643:JBBc3toNl:m:1:3253819041:A520D906BCE5750246C8F0AFB56F5A71:r)**
President Trump promises some incredible things for his new app:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This app is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518643:JBBc3toNl:m:1:3253819041:A520D906BCE5750246C8F0AFB56F5A71:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

I was born in Peoria, Illinois.

My grandpa was a union painter, and my grandma was a public-school teacher. They built honest, middle-class lives with those jobs.

Because of them, I’ve spent my entire career on issues that support working people instead of big corporations.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46131278/348942129/161715760?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220604_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTUxYmViZS0zY2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLFUv9BtwpKZ9-V3gXgdPA4AIBE2H3G8AlJ0A4dHQaE=)
↑ _That’s me!_
**One of my proudest accomplishments was helping lead the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in our state.**

I’ve traveled the country fighting to get hardworking people the pay and workplace safety conditions they deserve, and I’ve seen firsthand the challenges that today’s working families face.

**And for far too long, I’ve witnessed the middle class life afforded by my grandparents slip away for countless Illinois families.**

That’s why I worked for the labor movement and why I’m running–to fight for working families and to make sure that the voices of Central and Southern Illinois are heard in Washington.

[**But this is shaping up to be the fight of my life, and I need all hands on deck right now. This is already one of the top most competitive swing-districts in the entire country, so if you’re with me, can you chip in a $3 donation right now? I’m counting on your grassroots support to help me take this fight to Washington »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46131279/348942130/161715760?amount=3&refcode=NBFC_20220604_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTUxYmViZS0zY2U0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PLFUv9BtwpKZ9-V3gXgdPA4AIBE2H3G8AlJ0A4dHQaE=)

Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country.

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

clean_body: Here’s why this campaign means so much to me. | = Hi, Today, I wanted to take a moment to share my story about why I’m running with you and why this campaign means so much to me. = | = I was born in Peoria, Illinois. My grandpa was a union painter, and my grandma was a public-school teacher. They built honest, middle-class lives with those jobs. Because of them, I’ve spent my entire career on issues that support working people instead of big corporations. = ↑ That’s me! One of my proudest accomplishments was helping lead the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in our state. I’ve traveled the country fighting to get hardworking people the pay and workplace safety conditions they deserve, and I’ve seen firsthand the challenges that today’s working families face. And for far too long, I’ve witnessed the middle class life afforded by my grandparents slip away for countless Illinois families. That’s why I worked for the labor movement and why I’m running–to fight for working families and to make sure that the voices of Central and Southern Illinois are heard in Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Nikki | | Paid for by Nikki For Congress P.O. Box 5171, Springfield, IL 62705 www.nikkiforcongress.com Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country. Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan. Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead. Please, consider making a =. Don’t let Republicans that voted to overturn the 2020 election and refuse to cooperate with the January 6 committee take the House. Donate to help Derek Marshall flip CA-23. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pl_derekmarshall?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220604_01]
House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy is refusing to comply with a subpoena from the January 6 Committee.
And even as he tries to hide what he knew during the insurrection, he wants to become Speaker of the House.
We can stop election-overturning Republicans from taking the House by defeating McCarthy’s allies like Rep. Jay Obernolte.
Derek Marshall will defend our democracy, and our movement is funded by thousands of grassroots donors like you. Donate to STOP McCarthy, DEFEAT Obernolte, and help Derek Marshall win! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pl_derekmarshall?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220604_01]
On January 6, 2021, Rep. Jay Obernolte cast one of his very first votes in Congress to overturn the 2020 election.
After armed Trump supporters stormed the U.S. Capitol, Obernolte voted NO on impeaching Donald Trump, and NO on a bipartisan committee to investigate the attack.
We must hold those that tried to stop a peaceful transfer of power accountable.
We must defend our democracy by stopping Republicans from taking the House.
Stop Kevin McCarthy. Defeat Jay Obernolte. Join thousands of donors to Derek Marshall’s progressive campaign to flip CA-23 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pl_derekmarshall?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220604_01]

| | Organized labor is one of the greatest collective achievements our country has ever made. **I am proud to stand with working Washingtonians, both in my district and across our state, and I am deeply honored to have won the support of the Washington State Labor Council, AFL-CIO in this 2022 campaign.** We must recommit to supporting organized labor. We are facing a crisis across America, where some of our hardest workers struggle each day to feed their families and afford the basics. This is a direct result of corporations siphoning their investments away from their workers and redirecting them to their shareholders – raising prices on the backs of hard working Americans all the while. Unions are the first and best line of defense on the assault on America's working class. That is why I am proud to stand with unions in our grassroots campaign to restore the economic dignity of the working class. **[Donate $15 now and join our pro-union grassroots movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46131386/348942525/1596212816?refcode=2022-06-03-unions&recurring=0&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8787f870-3de4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzg3Zjg3MC0zZGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcMVITeSmLG-5zHWx0vhHQjXNTNAooVNwMw1AHOqH44=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46131387/348942526/1596212816?refcode=2022-06-03-unions&recurring=0&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8787f870-3de4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzg3Zjg3MC0zZGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcMVITeSmLG-5zHWx0vhHQjXNTNAooVNwMw1AHOqH44=) **Unions represent the good that comes from us banding together to demand more of each other.** For generations, workers have forged better lives through stronger wages, benefits, and protections thanks to their ability to collectively take a stand. **And, as we struggle through a particularly divisive time in our country's history, I cannot think of a moment in my lifetime when union values have been more needed: a sense of togetherness, asking the most of each other, and a commitment to hard work.** As your representative in Congress, I will always be a voice for working families in Northwest Washington. That is not negotiable. **I wholly believe organized labor is the backbone of our country that will see us through this especially challenging time.[Donate $15 today if you agree that we need unions now more than ever.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46131388/348942527/1596212816?refcode=2022-06-03-unions&recurring=0&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8787f870-3de4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Nzg3Zjg3MC0zZGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcMVITeSmLG-5zHWx0vhHQjXNTNAooVNwMw1AHOqH44=)** Stay strong, friends. subject: Sign on If you believe in Keystone XL project ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
America deserves total energy independence
Peter -- In light of new records almost every week, the time has come to send a message that will echo throughout the halls of Washington: **Americans are TIRED of skyrocketing gas prices and our new dependence on foreign oil.**
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518691:69CnJtoNj:m:1:3317145305:B7655BA1D07F03EF2E5D132ADD88C716:r)**
**Under President Trump, America was ENERGY INDEPENDENT!**
_Under Joe Biden, he greenlit a massive Russian pipeline and canceled the Keystone XL project ..._
You have two choices. [**1) You can sign onto our petition to restore American energy independence and lower gas prices for ALL of us...**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518691:69CnJtoNj:m:1:3317145305:B7655BA1D07F03EF2E5D132ADD88C716:r) _Or 2) You can watch prices go EVEN HIGHER._
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518691:69CnJtoNj:m:1:3317145305:B7655BA1D07F03EF2E5D132ADD88C716:r)**
[**If you believe in American Energy Independence, Democracy, and the Keystone Pipeline, sign your name onto our petition right now.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518691:69CnJtoNj:m:1:3317145305:B7655BA1D07F03EF2E5D132ADD88C716:r)
Your signature today is important, Peter.
Thanks,
House Republicans

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: WATCH: My conversation with Tucker Carlson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
You need to see this to believe it. |
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=ac31b21aec&e=8a657725d1)
---
| | Peter,

I just had the opportunity to speak with Tucker Carlson on Fox News about the scourge of illegal immigration in California after I caught more than a dozen illegal immigrants landing on Laguna Beach on video!

I wanted to make sure you had the chance to watch the interview and see the video:
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=3ae67a3c56&e=8a657725d1)
---
| If we haven’t had the chance to meet yet, my name is Scott Baugh, and I’m running for Congress against Katie “Open Border” Porter who has put out a welcome mat for illegal immigrants by promising them cash payments, free education, free healthcare and even a plane ride across the country!

**As Tucker said in our conversation, Katie Porter is truly “one of the craziest people in the whole United States Congress,” and I urgently need your support to defeat her. Please, will you join Tucker in helping to defeat this Progressive Caucus leader?**
---
| [DEFEAT KATIE PORTER](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=4644f017ef&e=8a657725d1 "DEFEAT KATIE PORTER")
---
| [DONATE $20](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=3e2a31d179&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE $20")
---
| [DONATE $70](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=13f2dc6593&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE $70")
---
| [DONATE $150](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=3dddd12fe0&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE $150")
---
| What’s most scary is that we have no idea who these people coming across our border are. They could be drug runners, human traffickers or worse. Yet, Katie Porter, Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden have no interest in enforcing the rule of law.

That’s why we must flip the House of Representatives from Nancy Pelosi’s control to the Republicans, and our race in California’s 47th Congressional District has been identified as one of the most important races in the entire country to make that happen. So, if you want to secure our border, eliminate catch and release and get rid of Open Border Porter’s welcome mat, I need you to make a donation ASAP:
---
| [DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN AFFORD NOW](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=5968a71c0c&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN AFFORD NOW")
---
| Thank you in advance for watching this critically important interview with Tucker Carlson and for answering the call to defend our country! Sincerely,
Scott Baugh

clean_body: You need to see this to believe it. | | | | | Peter, I just had the opportunity to speak with Tucker Carlson on Fox News about the scourge of illegal immigration in California after I caught more than a dozen illegal immigrants landing on Laguna Beach on video! I wanted to make sure you had the chance to watch the interview and see the video: | | If we haven’t had the chance to meet yet, my name is Scott Baugh, and I’m running for Congress against Katie “Open Border” Porter who has put out a welcome mat for illegal immigrants by promising them cash payments, free education, free healthcare and even a plane ride across the country! As Tucker said in our conversation, Katie Porter is truly “one of the craziest people in the whole United States Congress,” and I urgently need your support to defeat her. Please, will you join Tucker in helping to defeat this Progressive Caucus leader? | "DEFEAT KATIE PORTER" | "DONATE $20" | "DONATE $70" | "DONATE $150" | What’s most scary is that we have no idea who these people coming across our border are. They could be drug runners, human traffickers or worse. Yet, Katie Porter, Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden have no interest in enforcing the rule of law. That’s why we must flip the House of Representatives from Nancy Pelosi’s control to the Republicans, and our race in California’s 47th Congressional District has been identified as one of the most important races in the entire country to make that happen. So, if you want to secure our border, eliminate catch and release and get rid of Open Border Porter’s welcome mat, I need you to make a donation ASAP: | "DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN AFFORD NOW" | Thank you in advance for watching this critically important interview with Tucker Carlson and for answering the call to defend our country! Sincerely, Scott Baugh | | "Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. FEC ID# C00798322" | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Scott Baugh for Congress, All rights reserved.

clean_body: Hello, This is incredibly urgent: Tucker Carlson just announced that he is coming to Iowa! Tucker Carlson’s show is just Russian propaganda at this point, but he has millions and millions of loyal viewers who listen to his right-wing nonsense. Admiral Mike Franken is running against Chuck Grassley, and we have an historic chance to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue. But if we’re going to fight back against Tucker Carlson and Fox News’ lies, we need your help now. We have to raise another $100,000 before midnight to keep our new TV ads up on the air, and right now we’re falling dangerously short. | | Team, I just stepped off stage at the MassDems Convention, and I couldn’t be more excited to roll out the next phase of our campaign together: **Courage Over Politics.** [**Watch our new _Courage Over Politics_ video from the Democratic Convention and support our campaign. Click here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46131660/348945639/893877080?refcode=06_04_22_courageoverpolitics_fs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE1NDdmNi00MGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HwXgwO13o4RFHTqhp5MUB1HBWVksYdxcfYfsnyy884=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46131662/348945640/893877080?refcode=06_04_22_courageoverpolitics_fs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE1NDdmNi00MGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HwXgwO13o4RFHTqhp5MUB1HBWVksYdxcfYfsnyy884=) I’ve spent my career pushing for change, and the reality is, that can make those in power uncomfortable. And sometimes you pay a price for that. But that’s a price I’m willing to pay because we know the cost of inaction is so much higher. We know what we need to do to meet this moment for working families: Medicare For All because no one should have to choose between filling their prescriptions and keeping the heat on, debt-free public college because every student should have a quality education without getting crushed by student loans, fare-free public transit because it’s long past time to stop balancing the books on the backs of our poorest neighbors. I am the only candidate in the race who supports these policies, and I am here to tell you that we can get there — but we have to be clear-eyed. The reason we haven’t achieved these things yet isn’t due to a lack of resources, or public opinion, or even Republicans in our state. It’s because too few of our political leaders display the same acts of courage that working people do every day. So here’s my promise to you: when I am elected Governor, we won’t just talk about these ideas in our platform - we will make them the policies of our Commonwealth. [**We will choose courage over politics.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46131663/348945641/893877080?refcode=06_04_22_courageoverpolitics_fs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWE1NDdmNi00MGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HwXgwO13o4RFHTqhp5MUB1HBWVksYdxcfYfsnyy884=) Thank you for being on this team. Saludos, Sonia

name: House Republicans
subject: Tell Biden: Reinstate the Keystone XL Pipeline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
America deserves total energy independence
Peter -- In light of new records almost every week, the time has come to send a message that will echo throughout the halls of Washington: **Americans are TIRED of skyrocketing gas prices and our new dependence on foreign oil.**
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518645:JnXqatoNE:m:1:3253819041:7A795EBA033395002E3B05E981F8FFD7:r)**
**Under President Trump, America was ENERGY INDEPENDENT!**
_Under Joe Biden, he greenlit a massive Russian pipeline and canceled the Keystone XL project ..._
You have two choices. [**1) You can sign onto our petition to restore American energy independence and lower gas prices for ALL of us...**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518645:JnXqatoNE:m:1:3253819041:7A795EBA033395002E3B05E981F8FFD7:r) _Or 2) You can watch prices go EVEN HIGHER._
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518645:JnXqatoNE:m:1:3253819041:7A795EBA033395002E3B05E981F8FFD7:r)**
[**If you believe in American Energy Independence, Democracy, and the Keystone Pipeline, sign your name onto our petition right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518645:JnXqatoNE:m:1:3253819041:7A795EBA033395002E3B05E981F8FFD7:r)
Your signature today is important, Peter.
Thanks,
House Republicans

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Primary Day is this Tuesday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I’m in between events and only have a few minutes, so I’ll make this brief.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=312%2E5257348%2EAE060e)
Hi Derek, it’s Adam.
I’m in between events and only have a few minutes, so I’ll make this brief.
I'm about to kick off a weekend full of get-out-the-vote events across California's newly-drawn 30th congressional district. Tens of thousands of voters have never seen my name on the ballot until now, and I need to make sure we have the resources we need to get the word out about this campaign before our jungle primary this Tuesday.
**[Can you pitch in to make sure we’re in a strong place for this final stretch? Every little bit helps.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220604_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=312%2E5257348%2EAE060e)**

name: Team Never Again
subject: Rainbow logos and bad analogies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
We wanted to take a moment to talk about what Pride Month means to us and our movement. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46132046/348948783/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5ODcyNTBmLTQ1ZTQtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i18uqfNqOgBp5f0aLFn4_02KOk6ZWeAWYMxXSoa7Z5c=&emci=6462e832-bce2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=f987250f-45e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=16335001) Team,

As June begins, we wanted to take a moment to talk about what Pride Month means to us and our movement.

We know your inbox is probably flooded with emails from companies and organizations wishing you a happy Pride Month with rainbow logos, bad analogies, and empty promises. **We won't do that.** We are taking this opportunity to recommit ourselves to the fight for equal rights and unseating the people who have historically fought against the advancement of these rights.

Even if our democracy was not created by the founding fathers to serve everyone, it has come a long way since then. Through the sacrifices of fearless leaders like Marsha P. Johnson, Billie Jean King, Audre Lorde, Harvey Milk, and many more, our country has made strides in the fight for equality and ensuring that people can live their truth under the law.

But the work is _not_ finished, and we have a long way to go until we can truly say that we are a nation of equality.

The members of the Treason Caucus have a long history of attacking the rights and lives of the members of the LGBTQ+ community and the onset of the Trump administration only emboldened this blatant homophobia. From spreading dangerous rhetoric equating sexual abuse with queerness like Lauren Boebert did, to Ted Cruz fully opposing and attacking marriage equality, and Donald Trump passing discriminatory policies like banning transgender people from serving in our armed forces, for example, electing extremists like them into office have resulted in major setbacks in LGBTQ+ rights.

We'll be clear here, we are not and will not pretend to be a leading voice in the fight for LGBTQ+ rights. **However, we refuse to ignore the fact that the actions of elected leaders have consequences, and we promise to do everything we can to ensure that the dangerous members of the Treason Caucus are not only held accountable for their homophobic attacks on LGBTQ+ rights, but that they never have the opportunity to attack them again.**

Thank you,

Team Never Again

P.S. One of the most important things we can do is support and uplift the organizations and voices that ARE leading the charge for LGBTQ+ rights. The Human Rights Campaign is doing groundbreaking work to create a future where people can live in truth and free of fear by mobilizing, educating, and advancing pro-equality policy and litigation. [**If you are ready to support their mission with a charitable donation, click here >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/46132047/348948784/2116303659?ea.tracking.id=or_gnr_hrc_homepage2022&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5ODcyNTBmLTQ1ZTQtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i18uqfNqOgBp5f0aLFn4_02KOk6ZWeAWYMxXSoa7Z5c=&emci=6462e832-bce2-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=f987250f-45e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=16335001)

| PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
---

PO Box 2153
Purcellville, VA 20134
United States
---
If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://action.neveragainpac.com/p/URGJswsiqkemaLro4bZFCg2?unsubscribedata=xk7y%2B6pYWwxssooEUB7CWoSXBwCTcVs9kwTyUYfg0VBcogSeO1TZM5S%2BpKNWimRrhsoGX9%2FmfiPrrMYfjEMetGGZo0eviQYe%2FRd0rkeNh6Hn1IWWjeXfU9VsgSthMNggNjEsUj%2BsBTfrTpBQ542GN6%2FntlDdMt6aSTbGllLWJHgNwLyEUykOAUZsysuToNo75Me1fNodznA4uug8KQ4f02%2FVdaHBGGdv2qx6BYN4nlhjpaetVGh4Pz6g3Anrgtm0NenX72ss9HPfh3R1MCwrdRGbhTRlLu8Qk0LK3NkCo0wr9CgS%2FF7eZzRdKx85jPvnexpW9nboWQnpY92frDejEeu12vuQ4rHnL0ZzHVsh%2BYJjDkX2LvqkzzLmtwJoUGS2%2B0pWWKjSLqq929ZcfAFLcfqlDb3mGpJ6QfrFavHnXJA%3D).

The Human Rights Campaign is doing groundbreaking work to create a future where people can live in truth and free of fear by mobilizing, educating, and advancing pro-equality policy and litigation. | PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: It’s official. Dr. Oz won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Friend,

Did anyone predict that a quack celebrity TV doctor was going to run for
U.S. Senate in 2022?

You know, I wouldn't believe you if you said you did.

But here we are. Dr. Oz is now the *official* Republican nominee for U.S.
Senate in Pennsylvania.👇👇👇

ALL the online support possible now that Dr. Oz is officially our
Republican nominee in the #1 Most Likely to Flip U.S. Senate Seat of 2022.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

John

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Lol
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Dr. Oz is officially the nominee on the Republican side. We put together a little something to welcome him to the race.
#
Derek,
In case you missed it: Dr. Oz is the official nominee of the Republican Party for U.S. Senate in his home state of New Jersey**Pennsylvania!?**
Accordingly, we created a little something inspired by classic 90s campaign bumper stickers to welcome Dr. Oz to the General Election.
Wouldn’t it be just simply delightful if we started seeing these plastered all over PA (and maybe even NJ)?
[**_Here’s the deal, Derek. Send John Fetterman a contribution of *any* amount right now, and we’ll send you back one of these stickers in the mail. Most folks are chipping in $6._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220604-1-sticker?refcode=em20220604-6102&refcode2=6102_434096_5s7Omp&akid=6102%2E434096%2E5s7Omp)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220604-1-sticker?refcode=em20220604-6102&refcode2=6102_434096_5s7Omp&akid=6102%2E434096%2E5s7Omp)
**[Get a sticker →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220604-1-sticker?refcode=em20220604-6102&refcode2=6102_434096_5s7Omp&akid=6102%2E434096%2E5s7Omp)**
Look, the sticker is all in good fun. And we hope to raise a lot of money off of these stickers (because we’ll need it).
But what’s not funny is that a Hollywood guy like Oz can move to another state and spend millions of his own dollars to buy himself a Senate seat.
And his policy positions are no joke, too. **Dr. Oz supports a nationwide ban on abortion, with no exceptions for rape or incest.**
In the most important Senate race in the nation (Pennsylvania NOT New Jersey), we can’t let the GOP take this seat. And CANNOT let Dr. Oz win.
[**_So, chip in $6 or whatever you can to help us elect John Fetterman. We’ll send you an exclusive Dr Oz for NJ sticker in the mail._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220604-1-sticker?refcode=em20220604-6102&refcode2=6102_434096_5s7Omp&akid=6102%2E434096%2E5s7Omp)
**[Get a sticker →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220604-1-sticker?refcode=em20220604-6102&refcode2=6102_434096_5s7Omp&akid=6102%2E434096%2E5s7Omp)**
Got friends and family who’d want a sticker too? Forward them our email — anyone who donates any amount on the link will get one in the mail as soon as we can send them out. 😁
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220604-6102-footer&t=1&refcode2=6102_434096_5s7Omp&akid=6102%2E434096%2E5s7Omp)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=6102%2E434096%2E5s7Omp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=6102%2E434096%2E5s7Omp)

name: Charles Booker HQ
subject: Did you see our video?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, this is a
big moment for us.

Our momentum is on the rise. People have taken note of Charles' bold
message about why we need to replace Rand Paul and push back against his
politics of hate.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220604.r0kbNk&refcode=em20220604-other-2022&t=1001&akid=2022%2E346206%2EN4xAdZ ][IMG]We need to keep this energy up all the way until Election Day by
making more videos like this and sharing our ads in as many places as we
can.

To be honest with you, creating ads is a huge undertaking for our
campaign. It’s a major expense, but we know that these sorts of messages
are an important part of our strategy to fuel our work.

That’s why we’re setting a goal to raise $10,000 today for our Campaign
Ads Fund. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220604.r0kbNk&refcode=em20220604-other-2022&t=1002&akid=2022%2E346206%2EN4xAdZ ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to
help us show our ads to as many voters as we can? This is how we’re going
to build a winning grassroots movement to replace Rand Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220604.r0kbNk&refcode=em20220604-2022&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=2022%2E346206%2EN4xAdZ ]Donate $5 now →

Our volunteer team has done tremendous work texting and calling voters,
making sure folks have the resources they need to cast their ballots, and
sharing Charles’ big vision for Kentucky.

This kind of grassroots outreach is the reason why we’ve been able to
build our historic movement to replace Rand Paul.

But now with just over 5 months until the election, it’s urgent we crank
up the heat and double down on our efforts to reach out to voters.

That’s why we’re rushing to invest as much money as we can into our ads.
We know there’s still voters who don’t know who Charles is, but would
strongly resonate with his people-first message.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220604.r0kbNk&refcode=em20220604-other-2022&t=1022&akid=2022%2E346206%2EN4xAdZ ]Please help us raise at least $10,000 today so we can raise the funds
we need to run our ads. Giving even $5 makes a huge difference in a
make-or-break moment like this.

Let’s do this,

Team Booker

name: Peter Welch
subject: re: Vermont and New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Republicans have targeted both Vermont and New Hampshire as opportunities to take back the Senate:

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=492%2E61531%2ED_4XGo)
Hello,
There’s a lot at stake this November.
Republicans have targeted both Vermont and New Hampshire as opportunities to take back the Senate. If they are successful, it would mean not only losing our Democratic majority, but even greater threats to some of our most fundamental rights: reproductive freedom, the right to vote, the right to affordable health care, and so much more.
My friend Maggie Hassan and I have been champions to deliver on these things that make a real difference in people’s lives. But if we’re going to continue fighting for our progressive agenda, we both need to win in November—and that starts now with a strong showing against our Republican opponents.
[**That’s why I’m asking: Can you chip in a $5 contribution or anything you can to power both our campaign and Senator Maggie Hassan? Together, we can take on the GOP and hold our Senate majority.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2923?t=3&akid=492%2E61531%2ED_4XGo)
[CHIP IN ](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2923?t=7&t=8&akid=492%2E61531%2ED_4XGo)
---
Maggie and I are working to create a Vermont and New Hampshire where there are lower prescription drug prices, affordable child care, access to broadband in rural America, and where our democracy is protected, allowing for all of us to participate. But this all depends on whether we have the support we need through Election Day.
[**Democrats can’t keep the majority without winning here in Vermont and in New Hampshire. Please consider splitting a $5 donation or anything you can between our campaign and Maggie Hassan for New Hampshire to protect our Democratic majority.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/2923?t=4&akid=492%2E61531%2ED_4XGo)
We can’t do this without you.
Thanks so much,
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-hassan?refcode=em_20220604_f_p_hassan&refcode2=492_61531_D_4XGo&akid=492%2E61531%2ED_4XGo)
---
---
| [ ](https://www.facebook.com/welchforvermont) | [ ](https://twitter.com/WelchForVT) | [ ](https://www.instagram.com/welchforvermont/)
---|---|---
PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe here](https://act.welchforvermont.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=492%2E61531%2ED_4XGo).

body:
| Have you seen J.D. Vance's latest plan to "save Ohio families," team? Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46132187/348949679/55609811?refcode=em22_220605_JDporn_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220605_JDporn_fnd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzZlNGE1MS00OWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I6rMfF6mQcire6P3R3Grt7EtEXehz7I4bvNdVDUCFTQ=) Tim Ryan has been a life-long advocate for working Ohioans – he understands the issues that our state faces. He's running for Senate to get our economy back on track, protect Medicare and Social Security, and raise wages.

**J.D. Vance on the other hand? Well, he's now focused on banning pornography. Really.**

And in one of his most recent statements on the tragedy in Uvalde, Vance cited the absence of "strong family values" – **not easy access to guns** – to explain why 19 children and two teachers were senselessly gunned down in their place of learning.

Here's the bottom line: Vance has proven time and again that he's not fit to fight for Ohio in Congress. He has a track record of abandoning us when things get tough, cares more about increasing birth rates than the actual children living in our state, and believes Ohio workers are to blame for their hardships – all while absolving free trade deals and giant corporations that outsource our jobs, and devastate our communities.

This November, there could not be more on the line, and we refuse to let extremist politicians like DeWine and Vance make life or death decisions on behalf of hard-working Ohioans.

Fellow American,

You may or may not watch “**The View** ,” but undoubtedly, you’ve heard of the daytime talk show owing to the many outrageous things their hosts have said throughout the years. Let me remind you of a few examples:

“ _**If you kick out all of the Latinos who’s going to clean your toilets?**_ ” – Kelly Osbourn on illegal immigration

“ _**It was a Halloween party. I went as a beautiful African woman.**_ ” – Joy Behar on wearing blackface to a Halloween party

Or when Whoopie Goldberg last year had this to say when talking about the Holocaust: “ _**Well, this is white people doing it to white people. So, this is y’all go fight amongst yourselves.**_ ”

Well, now things have gotten political once again. Recently co-host Sunny Hostin said on air that she “ _**doesn’t understand black Republicans,**_ ” and that a black Republican is “ _**an oxymoron**_.”

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=94a5d8f59dd9455080213d1c570571ed&_e=OJlmEKdlysU9LGT6pzd8YlxBSwsVfk6TPGFvHopp69Zr0k2HfM9ljogS_JXWsovBE9fsnvT2qdB9CoAAt5wCvvNZgqxy9V8624pyVVvmzqHhOhm5SAFWaaMMil_JDCVvzPswXV8h96skHxh0hRoEhTS3m62wlDrgwT371oCTZGGpb19dig2-pKx6FRr5YhemAfh_lnxNLgOsnKBEfnvWJb9thhdAVy0yhFgoI4jcifL-apS_40Hi0n9K6pejiRECFpyLEGcvBBOWSqQiHNeXouuUMTr6tYHvom9p2jnUsTuxxwxILq90rSPykk4lHJzTJxYNXs9dD3J-N-578HoqUhYFsDvHvOcHkh3aFoU9fpfWswn-49RoOYJYr4dy7jPIxl3m551cTioet0HKESo5-GghQ2MSdQ9cutEtQMjVDA_tuVztqe0sQXAxyTrbOo_mcVAW8-ZxzaqfVfxZJ54ZqA%3D%3D)

TO THE LADIES OF THE VIEW>>**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=94a5d8f59dd9455080213d1c570571ed&_e=OJlmEKdlysU9LGT6pzd8YlxBSwsVfk6TPGFvHopp69Zr0k2HfM9ljogS_JXWsovBE9fsnvT2qdB9CoAAt5wCvvNZgqxy9V8624pyVVvmzqHhOhm5SAFWaaMMil_JDCVvzPswXV8h96skHxh0hRoEhTS3m62wlDrgwT371oCTZGGpb19dig2-pKx6FRr5YhemAfh_lnxNLgOsnKBEfnvWJb9thhdAVy0yhFgoI4jcifL-apS_40Hi0n9K6pejiRECrohE4ihiyJ3jDK_n6L6Pt6Cynj0Nw3xklhLCExCMuH-jbb7a3iHXFDwrBR59s0UQ32f9hMfZhdbpJgCRjU94ZH3hHJRJ1XNvM9cR-FICBTj-34jMI3-5qd9idn5eGiQVs93U7Tmg2Dt5d20S4wOSmfVll-H-VFDyMUd7Y9vLXoH_dCcY9E9F0yB5iCF_0oaH7rST1cHKlyy5NdIfLG9L3g%3D%3D)

Fellow American, my name is Rod Dorilás and I’m not an oxymoron. I’m a trained lawyer, military veteran, 1st generation American and **proud Black Republican**. I’m a free thinker and advocate for smaller government, a robust judicial system and free and fair elections. **I believe that everyone should have the opportunity to hear the arguments both sides make to win over votes and that no one’s support** – regardless of race – should be assumed by Democrats or Republicans.

Fellow American, it’s impossible to deny that there isn’t enough African American representation in the modern Republican Party. **[That’s exactly why I’m running for Congress for a House seat representing Florida](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=94a5d8f59dd9455080213d1c570571ed&_e=OJlmEKdlysU9LGT6pzd8YlxBSwsVfk6TPGFvHopp69Zr0k2HfM9ljogS_JXWsovBE9fsnvT2qdB9CoAAt5wCvvNZgqxy9V8624pyVVvmzqHhOhm5SAFWaaMMil_JDCVvzPswXV8h96skHxh0hRoEhTS3m62wlDrgwT371oCTZGGpb19dig2-pKx6FRr5YhemAfh_lnxNLgOsnKBEfnvWJb9thhdAVy0yhFgoI4jcifL-apS_40Hi0n9K6pejiRECPGAZcD2g1o9aagVuWfcLaUk9AE_woO-5NeFp9udMNBZcXmwH3S0q-wZCqb07w-KBpGJtPCEyZ6Q2HTvzlSERw6YT9Xmv2t6YR8O995NqTB2lw5ZnpstnFHBUWfTb8p4FHfUGTBSkCJxcuOjV_Zm7TbmJsBg7h3P9YBvvsqw262qZex7039TdQdjv6pEAgiJgx_F1KPyyvHWRiOm94cbjdQ%3D%3D)**. I know money is tight for a lot of folks right now, but today I’m writing to see if you’d **[help me send a message to the ladies of “The View”](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=94a5d8f59dd9455080213d1c570571ed&_e=OJlmEKdlysU9LGT6pzd8YlxBSwsVfk6TPGFvHopp69Zr0k2HfM9ljogS_JXWsovBE9fsnvT2qdB9CoAAt5wCvvNZgqxy9V8624pyVVvmzqHhOhm5SAFWaaMMil_JDCVvzPswXV8h96skHxh0hRoEhTS3m62wlDrgwT371oCTZGGpb19dig2-pKx6FRr5YhemAfh_lnxNLgOsnKBEfnvWJb9thhdAVy0yhFgoI4jcifL-apS_40Hi0n9K6pejiRECI9DPlbjmhF6VcxN3EY9nLq2-U2-bddFAAwzIZdXqy0HRylCY5H2sbGFI0QAiOoVx-1JwU1ObOi0GY8otefQG9Tx2uEQyqTNKtmaaVTOH1pec75ZkyRXj3vZ4iYxH3S1uyKyUCflzUogKA2haZjKFQmhhlyjAmKs4M26BtgDdKs88WcdenDK2g8XKYzvxNDwEd20K-V8NiXUHiGHk3P1sAw%3D%3D)** that there are a lot of Black Republicans in the U.S. – and we’re not an oxymoron.

[** HELP ME SEND A MESSAGE
TO THE LADIES OF THE VIEW>>**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=94a5d8f59dd9455080213d1c570571ed&_e=OJlmEKdlysU9LGT6pzd8YlxBSwsVfk6TPGFvHopp69Zr0k2HfM9ljogS_JXWsovBE9fsnvT2qdB9CoAAt5wCvvNZgqxy9V8624pyVVvmzqHhOhm5SAFWaaMMil_JDCVvzPswXV8h96skHxh0hRoEhTS3m62wlDrgwT371oCTZGGpb19dig2-pKx6FRr5YhemAfh_lnxNLgOsnKBEfnvWJb9thhdAVy0yhFgoI4jcifL-apS_40Hi0n9K6pejiREC554IeBj3nf9TeaHcGO3ubC-9dLgOcgsnIB-cop6dh-C5-CBcaRom5iFWGJgItRvLeW9W_XB7VN0EeC9_O_RxkBIVbvd9SRqM458gnvenhKBnmVgyD8uKgjZ5yd2QbZzyPJ9DePyqlei8HgYOPhuELt_owIbXfuxHaNTLeZgdWp1CqeylCBaGhce70hF61bPpoB17pWnXtnGT_ZSOJ9yk9w%3D%3D)
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=94a5d8f59dd9455080213d1c570571ed&_e=OJlmEKdlysU9LGT6pzd8YlxBSwsVfk6TPGFvHopp69Zr0k2HfM9ljogS_JXWsovBE9fsnvT2qdB9CoAAt5wCvvNZgqxy9V8624pyVVvmzqHhOhm5SAFWaaMMil_JDCVvzPswXV8h96skHxh0hRoEhTS3m62wlDrgwT371oCTZGGpb19dig2-pKx6FRr5YhemAfh_lnxNLgOsnKBEfnvWJb9thhdAVy0yhFgoI4jcifL-apS_40Hi0n9K6pejiRECj5u3FEgRRjUCiVxeXLQpDLmGFTT8R4hmuWg085kb0SiI-FTMWcavoB0fmayhV-Rvtaf5tYT1ip_kYrO3SswFaQZZUZeGIeptqMmisb1dEqDV973UwtqQ-tNcjiqmrMD0s1rcaYIsXmKdp6_b4N-_4lldxnMYIs0AEg-ZfdbJ0SaOge1xfpK059fAsEeN4C3cpmSCEM6AYimghYKYTjIXgQ%3D%3D)
I believe that if voters are able to be reached equally by Democrat and Republican campaigns, Republicans would win every time. I won’t deny that my opponent is much more well-funded than I, which is why I’m making this special ask of you today.**[If you could find it in your budget to send $2 ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=94a5d8f59dd9455080213d1c570571ed&_e=OJlmEKdlysU9LGT6pzd8YlxBSwsVfk6TPGFvHopp69Zr0k2HfM9ljogS_JXWsovBE9fsnvT2qdB9CoAAt5wCvvNZgqxy9V8624pyVVvmzqHhOhm5SAFWaaMMil_JDCVvzPswXV8h96skHxh0hRoEhTS3m62wlDrgwT371oCTZGGpb19dig2-pKx6FRr5YhemAfh_lnxNLgOsnKBEfnvWJb9thhdAVy0yhFgoI4jcifL-apS_40Hi0n9K6pejiREC1pkVOfB08gZp19pbshOEA8nLHr_9LiF6joqbhkmclXHl8HpVlQgd09JIaCQpESAtUmxOuaw4-r7l9iX92M3ug_hmV0cHsRrfw0hnOrGpdLZPEhGCal2gDbjLB3y5A8X0yAZNwetMiaeyBDt9tWJn4w4HLFTKWDSvb0mVlt3ocZK92bVzLM3G-LF_-uHshgQk1Vcwd5cuajGGm2OQwhdsbA%3D%3D)** to my campaign today, I’m certain I can flip this South Florida House seat on behalf of our party.

Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** CHIP IN $2 >> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=94a5d8f59dd9455080213d1c570571ed&_e=OJlmEKdlysU9LGT6pzd8YlxBSwsVfk6TPGFvHopp69Zr0k2HfM9ljogS_JXWsovBE9fsnvT2qdB9CoAAt5wCvvNZgqxy9V8624pyVVvmzqHhOhm5SAFWaaMMil_JDCVvzPswXV8h96skHxh0hRoEhTS3m62wlDrgwT371oCTZGGpb19dig2-pKx6FRr5YhemAfh_lnxNLgOsnKBEfnvWJb9thhdAVy0yhFgoI4jcifL-apS_40Hi0n9K6pejiRECJugXbVIPhYYFk4iGPUes6sV4obPnBhY6OOpWFvPUV8w0lV_6Bt15acj1YRfhVhBoKsyS6SMEwAVU4JLPOcQINu0tUNff_AEyF_559HLoKjTt_3Meuk-Hz5EbhsTwn-BHX3i3C51s-9dha_MCaxdzQP4CtUwulLk9cvw4eZnaQPI0T9TZK9i1RlHEbvE4SJo9U-bBq4w0owpkJDnnhRVfQg%3D%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=94a5d8f59dd9455080213d1c570571ed&_e=OJlmEKdlysU9LGT6pzd8YlxBSwsVfk6TPGFvHopp69Zr0k2HfM9ljogS_JXWsovBE9fsnvT2qdB9CoAAt5wCvvNZgqxy9V8624pyVVvmzqHhOhm5SAFWaaMMil_JDCVvzPswXV8h96skHxh0hRoEhTS3m62wlDrgwT371oCTZGGpb19dig2-pKx6FRr5YhemAfh_lnxNLgOsnKBEfnvWJb9thhdAVy0yhFgoI4jcifL-apS_40Hi0n9K6pejiREC-GoTuITYO2PIZHmg8Xww8_97iZs9wVyY9VQ4pixebAdFwT0Ro5E5u1ArFY6kiH95gRF7KkAGIxDc4oLa0-MVs2LOLltj8jk-jpj03elISDyaamM58IUo3muLKmfFjDIGdTJ6G2mh8mtlbYSfioK9YbVeNZOIUz1tEMaF9dhjmK5uHXGrX8Y74ZL0NoJc3s6JSAxz7dGlAV5PYXf3Gvmacg%3D%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.americansfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_s=94a5d8f59dd9455080213d1c570571ed&_t=xNwuy46CSt-VW_JfnSHKJFeQKVHUv_Tx0JJ0gRYCbjN4fCULtRUc2lY_ZWC_WxgGoY23TczmYOcZcbQXK6NsFJ2HZM80UiQ0nz0AM4fb-Uv9D2Av6E3HC6zG2zDFarsGhvR9sP1RtsajWCuOFtZ53bhqi9WczUmdjy4b2Sc3jDI%3D).

We wanted to send along a short recap of some of what leaders from all across Kansas are saying about Derek’s choice of Katie to lead our state as its next Lt. Governor!

During her time as my State Director, Katie and I have done over 300 town halls and hundreds of roundtables together with Kansans - she has her finger on the pulse of Kansas and she knows exactly what they’re talking about at their kitchen tables. A_ _Schmidt_ _-__Sawyer_ _ticket is poised for victory and I look forward to turning the page on years of Kelly-Biden lockdowns and failures. I’m excited and look forward to supporting Katie and her family in this next chapter.”_ **U.S. Senator Roger Marshall** _“As I’ve said from very early on in this race, Derek_ _Schmidt_ _is the trusted conservative leader who will move Kansas forward into a better future. Elevating millennial female voices in the conservative movement is an issue near and dear to my heart, and Katie is a true public servant!”_ **Kansas State Senator Kristen O’Shea** We’ve also continued to add endorsements for Derek’s run for governor. He will take those values and principles to the Governor’s office at a time when we badly need new leadership at both the state and national level. He has my full endorsement and I encourage all voters to support him in the race for Governor.” _**Sumner County Sheriff Darren Chambers** _“The Washington County Republican Committee has endorsed Attorney General Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas. Attorney General Schmidt has the track record, knowledge on the issues, and most importantly the Kansas values to get our state back on the right track after four years of little to no progress or accomplishments under Laura Kelly. Derek has earned widespread support among Kansas and national Republicans because he has been a defender of individual liberty and freedom as attorney general in these trying times. He’s fought vigorously against mandates, lockdowns, and all of the government overreach that are the hallmarks of the Kelly and Biden administrations. As governor, Derek will - as he likes to say - “grow Kansas, not the government.” He will make our state a more attractive home for small businesses and families to grow and thrive. He will make sure rural communities are just as much of a priority as the urban and suburban parts of our state that have seen much greater advancement in recent years. He will fight for Kansas families and values, and he will oppose Joe Biden’s liberal agenda rather than support it like Laura Kelly does. We hope all Kansans will support Derek Schmidt in the race for Governor this fall.”_ **Washington County Republican Central Committee**

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsjmiM8hyN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osjmiM8hyN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

You are
an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love
this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to
stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty
that define our nation.

Your
leadership and knowledge are needed today…

We need
more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a
turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold
thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
can't let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of
Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN
FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are
the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and
teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal
of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand

WHAT
the Constitution says;
HOW
it relates to current issues and events; and
WHY
the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to
liberty.

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people,
that our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just
haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history
in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank
you for reading my email!

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/

For our
children,

Bill Gray
Class of
2001
Associate
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I'm furious
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
There’s no end to what DeSantis will do to advance his own political career. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46132405/348950697/-1259897921?amount=25&refcode=20220604_f_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTExZjViNi00YWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VUAOXaOixgQmEjl74pKLSiXpG-TPIiywWR85irXq_d4=)
---
Friend,

I won’t lie: When I think about all the terrible things Ron DeSantis has done to Florida and her people during his time as governor, my blood pressure rises. It seems there’s _no end_ to what he’ll do to advance his political career.

He’s vowed to **eliminate background checks and gun permits** across Florida, putting our children and our families in greater danger.

He signed the **most restrictive anti-choice legislation** in Florida’s history since _Roe v. Wade_ , with no exceptions for horrible situations like rape or incest. It’s a monstrous law, but it won him points with Presidential Republican primary voters, so he supports it.

DeSantis signed legislation **targeting LGBTQ+ kids in the classroom** , outright banning any discussion of gender issues and further marginalizing already vulnerable students. We should be nurturing _all_ of Florida’s future leaders, not tormenting them for political gain.

He’s determined to silence _anyone_ who opposes him. One autocracy expert recently claimed in _Politico_ that **DeSantis is trying to turn Florida into his own personal “mini-autocracy.”** He’s even created an “elections police” unit that people fear will be more about voter intimidation than voter protection.

And now he’s **banning math textbooks!** Sadly, you can’t make this stuff up.

Suffice to say, the stakes could not be higher in this November’s election. With DeSantis eyeing a run for president in 2024, there’s no telling what he’d do with a second term as governor if he thought it would help him get to the White House.

**The good news: a recent Listener Group poll shows me outright BEATING the governor in November. But I’ll need your help to maintain that lead and get Florida back on the right track. Will you pitch in right now to help keep up the momentum?**

clean_body: There’s no end to what DeSantis will do to advance his own political career. | | | | = Friend, I won’t lie: When I think about all the terrible things Ron DeSantis has done to Florida and her people during his time as governor, my blood pressure rises. It seems there’s no end to what he’ll do to advance his political career. He’s vowed to eliminate background checks and gun permits across Florida, putting our children and our families in greater danger. He signed the most restrictive anti-choice legislation in Florida’s history since Roe v. Wade , with no exceptions for horrible situations like rape or incest. It’s a monstrous law, but it won him points with Presidential Republican primary voters, so he supports it. DeSantis signed legislation targeting LGBTQ+ kids in the classroom , outright banning any discussion of gender issues and further marginalizing already vulnerable students. We should be nurturing all of Florida’s future leaders, not tormenting them for political gain. He’s determined to silence anyone who opposes him. One autocracy expert recently claimed in Politico that DeSantis is trying to turn Florida into his own personal “mini-autocracy.” He’s even created an “elections police” unit that people fear will be more about voter intimidation than voter protection. And now he’s banning math textbooks! Sadly, you can’t make this stuff up. Suffice to say, the stakes could not be higher in this November’s election. With DeSantis eyeing a run for president in 2024, there’s no telling what he’d do with a second term as governor if he thought it would help him get to the White House. The good news: a recent Listener Group poll shows me outright BEATING the governor in November. But I’ll need your help to maintain that lead and get Florida back on the right track. Will you pitch in right now to help keep up the momentum? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, friend. Together I know we can end DeSantis’ cruelty and make Florida a place that works for ALL Floridians. Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

clean_body: | Friends, The Pennsylvania Primary was a very competitive race but we can finally say WE WON! It was so tight the entire way, but thanks to you we got the job done. This is only the beginning of our fight to take back the US Senate in November. John Fetterman has already raised over $1.5 Million dollars since his victory on Tuesday night and WE HAVE TO MAKE UP GROUND! | As the Republican nominee for US Senate in Pennsylvania, we have to keep our foot on the gas. The Senate Majority will be determined by this race, and as we saw in the primary it could come down to just a handful of votes. Are you going to sit back while John Fetterman crushes fundraising goals and destroys our shot at retaking the Senate majority? The US Senate election in Pennsylvania is the most CRUCIAL race in the entire country. A lot is riding on us but I know we are poised to get the job done. Thanks for your support, Dr. Mehmet Oz Dr. Mehmet Oz is a Trump-endorsed, America First Conservative running for U.S. Senate to reignite our divine spark, fight for freedom and return the power to you. to ensure that he has the support he needs to become Pennsylvania’s next Senator. Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate If you would like to donate by mail, Our mailing address is: Doctor Oz For Senate 2771 Philmont Ave Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006

name: Diehl for Governor
subject: Game On!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
body:
Help Geoff defeat Maura Healey and save our state from her radical progressive agenda
| | | |
---
Dear Friend,
It's official -- Massachusetts Democrats have endorsed Maura Healey to be their party's preferred candidate for Governor.
I say: GAME ON.
---
| | [Show your support for Geoff!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cNeAVHCvjQy7QrfgftpDg87BzAk9A0kYBDuccyAnZE119Cae0eOQnlqjfpC_WXEQyA6dFCDzE0AW7OR4Wa0onkBEEypVRiC3fJYNYVbF6J-wJd2Vu0fYI0u2F8RkKEr0xVXz31P_ZIkhspB534nhFPTQM6a_SCkEQMk0lyLXgWyBxy5Q5Do6iQ==&c=s4lZTEmN2wcPVvV7hZDaNeokXM9CMPPRcyjaIbKM2xtRKPov30u9VQ==&ch=TsDEOd9tay0prfEZunlknX6FgLBzjRUzME-uAcM2-7VinWPtD0Zi5A==)
---
Make no mistake about it...
This is now a race for the future of Massachusetts.
If elected, Maura Healey and the radical progressive agenda she embraces would severely threaten the safety, freedom, and economic prosperity of every Bay State resident. She would become the most extreme, far-left Governor ever elected in our state's history.
Alongside a Democratic supermajority in the state Legislature and the abject failure of the Biden Administration in Washington, having Maura Healey in the Governor's office would be crippling to our economy and our way of life.
Maura Healey has spent years politicizing the Office of the Attorney General. In the process, she...

* repeatedly and flagrantly sued the previous administration to score gratuitous political points...

* drove businesses and jobs out of our state in the name of promoting her political agenda...

* abused her prosecutorial discretion to help advance her political career...

None of this has worked to the benefit of Massachusetts and its residents. Now, despite these failures, Maura Healey wants to be our next Governor?
---
| HELP DEFEAT MAURA HEALEY!
---
| | [Donate now!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cNeAVHCvjQy7QrfgftpDg87BzAk9A0kYBDuccyAnZE119Cae0eOQnlqjfpC_WXEQyA6dFCDzE0AW7OR4Wa0onkBEEypVRiC3fJYNYVbF6J-wJd2Vu0fYI0u2F8RkKEr0xVXz31P_ZIkhspB534nhFPTQM6a_SCkEQMk0lyLXgWyBxy5Q5Do6iQ==&c=s4lZTEmN2wcPVvV7hZDaNeokXM9CMPPRcyjaIbKM2xtRKPov30u9VQ==&ch=TsDEOd9tay0prfEZunlknX6FgLBzjRUzME-uAcM2-7VinWPtD0Zi5A==)
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cNeAVHCvjQy7QrfgftpDg87BzAk9A0kYBDuccyAnZE119Cae0eOQnqFPzk8MnJSrcorwHruN4AhMtYo7XdlygKVc-kvaE32jA-h4W9oP_3qelRh31Kqz71hb8ltJLy-HZ_B1ZBNXEAeavjV6RFxxbQ==&c=s4lZTEmN2wcPVvV7hZDaNeokXM9CMPPRcyjaIbKM2xtRKPov30u9VQ==&ch=TsDEOd9tay0prfEZunlknX6FgLBzjRUzME-uAcM2-7VinWPtD0Zi5A==)
---
| The message to Massachusetts voters heading into this fall's election is clear:

* If you want higher taxes, higher government spending, and even higher prices and hyper-inflation that make it impossible to live and do business in Massachusetts...

* If you want our state to hand out driver's licenses to illegal immigrants flooding through our nation's porous borders...

* If you are okay with power-hungry government bureaucrats telling you what you can and can't do, notwithstanding your sincerely-held religious beliefs, just to fuel their authority over you and even though it infringes on your Constitutional rights...

* If you are okay with your kids endlessly wearing masks in school and being taught to be ashamed to be American...

If all that is your vision for Massachusetts and its future, then Maura Healey is your candidate. Vote for Maura Healey and you can rest assured Massachusetts will plunge deeper into a progressive quagmire than ever before and that it will make our state unlivable for those who prize freedom, law and order, and economic prosperity.
However, it's your future, and you have a choice:

* If you prize freedom and equality of opportunity...

* If you think parents have a right to make decisions about their kids' education and healthcare...

* If you want someone with a track record of standing up to Beacon Hill and fighting for Massachusetts taxpayers...

* If you want to ensure the integrity of our elections....

* If you want Massachusetts to grow jobs and be a state where people want to live, not leave...

If you want this vision for our state and the success, prosperity, and freedom that comes with it, then I am your candidate. I am uniquely qualified to take on Maura Healey and the progressive wing of the Democrat Party and to save our state from the brink.
I look forward to a spirited campaign that emphasizes the profound contrast between Maura Healey and her extreme progressive politics, and the mainstream conservative principles I will bring to the Governor's office in the name of the People of Massachusetts.
---
| HELP GEOFF SAVE MASSACHUSETTS!
---
| | [Donate now!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cNeAVHCvjQy7QrfgftpDg87BzAk9A0kYBDuccyAnZE119Cae0eOQnlqjfpC_WXEQyA6dFCDzE0AW7OR4Wa0onkBEEypVRiC3fJYNYVbF6J-wJd2Vu0fYI0u2F8RkKEr0xVXz31P_ZIkhspB534nhFPTQM6a_SCkEQMk0lyLXgWyBxy5Q5Do6iQ==&c=s4lZTEmN2wcPVvV7hZDaNeokXM9CMPPRcyjaIbKM2xtRKPov30u9VQ==&ch=TsDEOd9tay0prfEZunlknX6FgLBzjRUzME-uAcM2-7VinWPtD0Zi5A==)

| Thanks for your support.
