body:
We need all the help we can get in these final 72 hours. Get the info you need to cast your ballots here >> | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46132487/348951393/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjFlMzY5Yi00ZGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_jrnrbkD7RI6aRGtTpcIurSrPh2PsVywqLzOkC13mSM=) Friend, On Thursday, I dropped off my ballot at the County Elections Office. It feels like just yesterday that I first decided to enter this race, and being able to cast my vote in this primary election feels a little surreal. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46132488/348951394/-10092236?refcode=em-6.4.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjFlMzY5Yi00ZGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_jrnrbkD7RI6aRGtTpcIurSrPh2PsVywqLzOkC13mSM=) **With just 3 days left until ballots are counted, I wanted to send through some important reminders to folks voting in Montana.**
* If you’ve still got your absentee ballot, you should **drop it off at your county elections office, or take it with you to your polling place on Election day** (June 7th!) between 7am and 8pm. **It is now too late to mail it back – there’s no guarantee it arrives on time to be counted by Tuesday!**

* **The deadline to register or change your voter registration is Monday June 6th at noon.** To register, visit your County Election Office.

* If you’re voting in person on election day, **remember to bring your photo ID with you** to your polling place.

[**To find more information about where your polling place is located, where your county elections office is, or to check the status of your ballot click here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46132489/348951395/-1163856670?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjFlMzY5Yi00ZGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_jrnrbkD7RI6aRGtTpcIurSrPh2PsVywqLzOkC13mSM=&emci=8a886204-4ae4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=3b1e369b-4de4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=37373330) | **[MT Voting Info](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46132490/348951396/-1163856670?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjFlMzY5Yi00ZGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_jrnrbkD7RI6aRGtTpcIurSrPh2PsVywqLzOkC13mSM=&emci=8a886204-4ae4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=3b1e369b-4de4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=37373330)**

These final 72 hours are our final push to show Montana what a strong, grassroots movement can do in this race.
**Your support these past few months have been critical to helping us meet this moment. But right now, my opponents are running nasty attack ads backed by super PAC cash trying to smear my name and steal this seat. **
Our campaign is choosing to rise above and stay focused on getting people to the polls, but we need your help in these final few days to help get out the vote:
[**Can you chip in $5, $35, or even $50 to help us in this final push to election day? Every dollar donated makes a difference in these final 3 days. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46132491/348951397/-10092236?refcode=em-6.4.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjFlMzY5Yi00ZGU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_jrnrbkD7RI6aRGtTpcIurSrPh2PsVywqLzOkC13mSM=)

_Cora_

If you’ve still got your absentee ballot, you should drop it off at your county elections office, or take it with you to your polling place on Election day (June 7th!) between 7am and 8pm. It is now too late to mail it back – there’s no guarantee it arrives on time to be counted by Tuesday! The deadline to register or change your voter registration is Monday June 6th at noon. To register, visit your County Election Office. If you’re voting in person on election day, remember to bring your photo ID with you to your polling place. | These final 72 hours are our final push to show Montana what a strong, grassroots movement can do in this race. Your support these past few months have been critical to helping us meet this moment. But right now, my opponents are running nasty attack ads backed by super PAC cash trying to smear my name and steal this seat. Our campaign is choosing to rise above and stay focused on getting people to the polls, but we need your help in these final few days to help get out the vote: = Thank you friend, I believe we can do this! Cora =** Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cora for Montana PO Box 428 Bozeman, MT 59771 United States

body:

Peter,

I came across three of my favorite photographs and immediately knew I wanted to send YOU a copy of one of them. The problem is... _**I can't decide WHICH photo I want to send you (they're all so spectacular).**_

So, I thought, why not let YOU, one of my BEST supporters, decide. But, I need you to know that these are not just any photos, Peter. **I plan to write you a personalized note and sign the photograph.**

| | Peter, Thanks to the Biden administration and do-nothing career politicians in Washington, Alabama families have been struggling to put food on the table and gas in their tanks for months. Overspending in Congress and fiscal irresponsibility has led to record-high inflation, and every hard-working American is paying the price. Katie is standing UP to tell Biden to STOP catering to the radical left and _PUT AMERICAN FAMILIES FIRST!_ **WATCH:**

body:
Every single article that talks about the Senate majority mentions Georgia. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0c17636afa63409cbf01af318e2ac9cf&_e=9sGcCV0z6MwM7PEeFpjAAxblaSFAgT2NhzYUdDq4ge_r09htm4zeZTpRNt8ke3gANXtfUC3lCDpUErsd4A2RjXfr4PTjN0xBmgROHK_sQ0SF12Z1JY_oXLbNeXdbVWyJQVetmqVey8V90LAoGqDv37TFI9wS2MhsJbv22k6qOk_4bZkRyGbhDjYhDa0O89JNjXXQ35xxcIjHRFhd7t-UYzD8ClvBIxmIy_M6eYho6FuiORunOjqVKM6QhVqQKkl09wjv4q0JKwjtw09KZu5Lii81_EuL_PmJVajxx016DZeORCVXKvLM_olRjBpprMVrc0NWSpezOtTouKSESqc2kP46VavcslQDxZrNa1MgyU3-K7pQ2NEOxStcA0mKRlgAhSd36xUfjUzVd-_5llTMdbmQo2hZ2AqChMIuTvgqmQSTh8dFrgPDvbRNMw08lnlseJtM-d2xBDQnTiyYTDKd9aufG3bAzhiMTrZkmK2-EiyIfw4tQlCV-8mtaY9TvJol)

---
Peter,

Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia.

Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination.

**That very night, Democrats _officially_ began their barrage of attacks against me.**

We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues.

**This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States.**

**This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track.**

Peter, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - **total spending will likely exceed $200 million.**

As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden.

clean_body: Every single article that talks about the Senate majority mentions Georgia. | Peter, Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia. Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination. That very night, Democrats officially began their barrage of attacks against me. We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues. This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States. This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track. Peter, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - total spending will likely exceed $200 million. As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden. Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - I know what it's like to be in the big leagues. Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. Instead, they are focusing on disgusting and racist attacks against me. If you share our belief that the voters in a swing state like Georgia need to know just how dramatically Democrats have messed things up in the year since they took power, Help us make this a referendum on Biden and Warnock's policies, Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Abbott’s response to mass shootings in Texas has been to make it easier for the next one to happen. Our response must be to vote him out and prevent the next mass shooting. Make the choice to help elect a governor who is going to save the lives of Texans. [ - ]Please, donate $3 or more right now to elect new leadership in this state. [ - ]Contribute $3 —Beto for Texas

name: BilldeBlasio.com
subject: listening
body:
It starts with talking to people and hearing what they feel, and THEN fighting for them in Washington, D.C.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/150?t=1&akid=158%2E39519%2EKy0RCU)

Friends -
A member of Congress is ultimately a LOCAL official elected to get things done for individuals, a block, a neighborhood, and the entire district they serve.
That starts with listening.
It starts with talking to people and hearing what they feel, and THEN fighting for them in Washington, D.C.
In that spirit, Bill de Blasio wants to hear from you:
[**Can you please take 2 minutes to complete a short issue survey today? We’ll pull the results together and share them with Bill later this week.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/signup/bdb-survey-jun/?source=em-220604-ak&t=2&akid=158%2E39519%2EKy0RCU)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.billdeblasio.com/signup/bdb-survey-jun/?source=em-220604-ak&t=3&akid=158%2E39519%2EKy0RCU)**
What are the issues you care about most?
Is it inflation, gun violence, health care, the cost of gas, climate change, money in politics are something else?
[**Let us know by taking this short issue survey today. It won’t take long to complete and we will review the results.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/signup/bdb-survey-jun/?source=em-220604-ak&t=4&akid=158%2E39519%2EKy0RCU)**
Thank you,
Bill de Blasio for Congress
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.billdeblasio.com/signup/bdb-survey-jun/?source=em-220604-ak&t=5&akid=158%2E39519%2EKy0RCU)**

De Blasio for Congress
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.billdeblasio.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=158%2E39519%2EKy0RCU). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize.

In that spirit, Bill de Blasio wants to hear from you: What are the issues you care about most? Is it inflation, gun violence, health care, the cost of gas, climate change, money in politics are something else? Thank you, Bill de Blasio for Congress De Blasio for Congress

body:
When I write, it’s usually to put a new novel on your bookshelf.
| | |
---
Hi there,
When I write, it’s usually to put a new novel on your bookshelf.
I’m a writer but I’m also a Granite Stater, an unabashed Maggie Hassan supporter, and an advocate for reproductive freedom. So today I am writing for another reason.
The Supreme Court, bolstered by three justices put there by an anti-woman president, just announced its plan to overturn _Roe v. Wad_ e, ripping access to essential care away from millions of women.
**Electing pro-choice leaders is more important than it has ever been.** That starts with Maggie here in New Hampshire. She won her last race by just 1,017 votes, and her opponents are all as anti-choice as they come. Here’s why I’m writing:
**[Please rush $3 or as much as you can to help reelect Maggie Hassan and stop anti-choice extremists from making it to the Senate. With Roe upended, giving Republicans even one more seat is truly the last thing we need.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46133100/348954656/-947982778?&amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=jtk1125-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJhNTQ2NS01MmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Ws54xX9g0p_3M_olVPca9-H3fMLdQ11aFyYeGZRXrE=)**
Maggie has always been a strong fighter for women, and I promise you that this decision will only light a bigger fire under her. That’s why I’m throwing my full support behind her and asking you to join me:

Thank you,
Jodi Picoult

name: Jon Kaiman
subject: June 23rd: Event in Great Neck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lgDqpZv7C9GoL9RRLZ20HgxDtEjAD1ZQDmAeu6hwXB4=/K6tFUucHWtt_oVldck6-41hfJCsVOkbYCgGr6-Hx3-c=)
Peter,
I wanted to remind you that on June 23rd my friend Suffolk County Executive Steve Bellone is hosting a fundraiser in Great Neck in support of my campaign for Congress in New York's 3rd Congressional District.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lgDqpZv7C9GoL9RRLZ20HgxDtEjAD1ZQDmAeu6hwXB4=/wFLbJXbDM7cB5zTh_KxuJYZv7Ult1Zk3x8yrNVxg7mU=)
**[To RSVP, please click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/lgDqpZv7C9GoL9RRLZ20HgxDtEjAD1ZQDmAeu6hwXB4=/wFLbJXbDM7cB5zTh_KxuJYZv7Ult1Zk3x8yrNVxg7mU=).**
We're 2.5 months away from the Primary Election and my campaign is in the process of putting together the resources necessary to win. If you cant make it on June 23rd but would still like to support the campaign, please click [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/lgDqpZv7C9GoL9RRLZ20HgxDtEjAD1ZQDmAeu6hwXB4=/C2wco2FtoN_bBRjwM8r2qfE8BY-HCEhmbkL-07cP9Gs=?refcode=website).
We are facing many challenges in today's world that need to be addressed in a rational, thoughtful, effective manner and they need to be addressed now. I've spent my entire career bringing disparate voices to the table, crafting pathways to solutions and implementing strategies that lead to real results. I am running for Congress to meet the challenges we face as a region and as a country.
Thank you,
Jon Kaiman

Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress
---
Jon Kaiman for Congress
P.O. Box 222061
Great Neck NY 11022 United States

MILLIONS to deceive Floridians with blatant lies
| | |
---
This isn't good, friend. **A Marco Rubio aligned super PAC is unleashing a new SEVEN-FIGURE wave of attack ads to defeat me – right as I'm closing the gap in the polls.**

Rubio and GOP outside groups have no problem shelling out MILLIONS to deceive Floridians with blatant lies. They are TERRIFIED of the grassroots movement we're building together, friend.

So we have ZERO room for error here. The hard truth is that if I don't have the resources to fight back, it could destroy my chances of defeating Marco Rubio and expanding our Senate majority.

**I know you and this grassroots team always come through when it counts, so I just set an ambitious $50,000 midnight fundraising goal that is mission critical. My team pulled your supporter record, so please take a look at where things stand:**
| | **SUPPORTER RECORD**

**Senate control is on the line – and I can't win this race alone. name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Student Mask Mandate Returns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Failed Coup](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqNRslCI2nUoId88Nsb4XNMC1EQxupDveI_2z-XwigChg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june4_final&n=1) Sac City Unified, one of the worst districts in America, has reimposed a mask mandate. This will not happen in any area that I represent. The announcement came amidst a bizarre week. My last post discussed the key events from Wednesday, but I haven’t told you about Tuesday. That’s when the attempt to topple the Speaker of the Assembly failed in slow motion. Shortly after we convened on the Assembly Floor, the Speaker’s allies tried to adjourn the session before he could be ousted. That motion failed, and then the allies of the usurper asked for a “caucus,” where Democrats and Republicans meet in separate rooms outside of public view. So the Democrats took their family feud behind closed doors, while our much smaller caucus was forced to sit around and wait for _six hours._ In the end, the Speaker managed to fend off the coup and remain in power – for now. Just as all this was ending, I left for the KCRA studio for a debate in the race for Congress. You can watch my closing statement [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAwokd60C2hov6JIFDy1Anl8NBKO_DkdWz0llgc0xHOZBQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june4_final&n=2). As I took the debate stage, the day was a reminder of how dysfunctional our government is. California is being ruined by radical, inept politicians – and now, the same is happening to our country. We cannot let it happen. **Election Day is Tuesday!**
_[Every donation received today will immediately be put towards our Get Out the Vote efforts](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june4_final&n=3)_
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=june4_final&n=4).

Dear Friends:
Thank you for your support during my recent campaign for Congress. I truly want to express my deep appreciation for all your assistance. As you will read below, I am returning to the organization I co-founded called The Athenai Institute. I hope you will take a few minutes to review our activities and consider making a [donation here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AmWIZ4KtWPWSBY2g3Qlvxc6XhUyTwkSUElB3OYfjw7O8DwpD5ajZSqx30Im3vOlDg7hvWNbPDpEzVj5Y-L7YWMmSjbfSQ2rWeT3qfWTctBu1Ph-eT_g3rzCTy7AsqW2E2s3_pcBe7FlKu92Btp5mYxp2-l4zhIYRq0Sxn_zJ1u6hriLgerDW2g==&c=7v15_rTJWcBBddvHzxCgzcggxGT0lm8ud8vvbh31VERV3g9GARbteA==&ch=zJmpyq8U3J4nT7aEwVmTzUhdcjSeU0llUtIfvWa1thRlHl5ppFUPUA==) to our educational efforts regarding the human and religious rights violations by the Chinese Communist Party.
Again, thank you for your support both for my campaign and for the outstanding activities at The Athenai Institute. It has been the honor of a lifetime campaigning across the 10th district and meeting thousands of amazing Virginians.
May God Bless, Caleb
P.S. Follow Athenai's active Twitter account ([https://twitter.com/athenaiinst](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AmWIZ4KtWPWSBY2g3Qlvxc6XhUyTwkSUElB3OYfjw7O8DwpD5ajZSqx30Im3vOlDsRJ6hh0kP11fsKd_dibt2Wip0a5exa1CfbU_xQ1chQ3ySVKXje_BR-b27jVbXy4j__-H2Yz9kf9BpcGayYn9e4Da_9iEBodg&c=7v15_rTJWcBBddvHzxCgzcggxGT0lm8ud8vvbh31VERV3g9GARbteA==&ch=zJmpyq8U3J4nT7aEwVmTzUhdcjSeU0llUtIfvWa1thRlHl5ppFUPUA==)).

| FORMER CONGRESSIONAL CANDIDATE CALEB MAX RETURNS TO ATHENAI INSTITUTE
HONORS THOSE CHINESE STUDENTS KILLED AT TIANANMEN SQUARE 33 YEARS AGO
---
| | |
---|---
|
(Leesburg) - The Athenai Institute announced today that its' Co-Founder and the former Virginia 10th Congressional District Candidate, Caleb Max, will return to the organization.

The Athenai Institute is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization founded in May of 2020 to counteract Chinese Communist Party (CCP) influence on college campuses and advocating for universities to divest from entities complicit in the genocide of Uyghurs and other crimes against humanity.

"Today we mark the 33rd anniversary of the Chinese Communists massacre of pro-democracy students and leaders in Tiananmen Square" Caleb Max stated, "Due to the suppression of Chinese citizens by the Communist Party, no candles will be lit and no religious memorial services will be held in Beijing, Shanghai, Hong Kong or elsewhere in China to remember the thousands that were killed on June 4, 1989. The Communist Party ensures that all memories of that horrible event have been erased across the country. These individuals need to be remembered and honored and not removed from history."

"On the campaign trail I talked consistently about the threat of the Chinese Communist Party to our nation. Even though I cannot combat the CCP in Congress I will continue to advocate for the persecuted in China in the private sector. The Athenai Institute continues to be the best organization on college campuses alerting students on a bipartisan level about the Communist threat. I look forward to visiting campuses this Fall and getting universities to divest from the genocide occurring in China." Max added.

The Athenai Institute was formed as a bipartisan educational effort to address CCP's influence through their over 100 Confucius Institutes on US campuses and at over 500 universities worldwide. There has been significant progress in closing those CCP funded entities. In April of this year, the Athenai Institute joined with 31 other organizations as part of the nationwide Uyghur genocide university divestment movement.

The Institute released an [open letter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AmWIZ4KtWPWSBY2g3Qlvxc6XhUyTwkSUElB3OYfjw7O8DwpD5ajZSoxICaDeaqyMWpA1YyPGPOkhJE0NshL7PX3EwbUgwmAYP1AkJf57_rAI83ctBrKV3CH8FgBImZdWcZ57Kk3cq9F2GDs8GMMlbA6uDczQz-0j1SkibwlXVJdi255dEI9D5K7IXGktIw5u0vbICMjJCYjgAEH-RoXgYA==&c=7v15_rTJWcBBddvHzxCgzcggxGT0lm8ud8vvbh31VERV3g9GARbteA==&ch=zJmpyq8U3J4nT7aEwVmTzUhdcjSeU0llUtIfvWa1thRlHl5ppFUPUA==) to the presidents and governing boards of all 50 United States flagship public universities calling on them to divest from entities complicit in the genocide of Uyghurs.

Athenai's letter was co-signed by national political leaders, including former U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley ([coverage here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AmWIZ4KtWPWSBY2g3Qlvxc6XhUyTwkSUElB3OYfjw7O8DwpD5ajZSoxICaDeaqyMPyJnjVTv-rX8b93VslrnsN5NZoS8DL2GYVMLuAvi9kaWtF7EaR4E05NvK-kWGEPkMPvuhKGhezbDHHAEq4BGItwwWSuIQC9q7WKuYnZwK6lHJG4n9_MoWCdBmkaM-vG6bhtVao_eN9KE2N-XqWvRygTXNo91beWJ&c=7v15_rTJWcBBddvHzxCgzcggxGT0lm8ud8vvbh31VERV3g9GARbteA==&ch=zJmpyq8U3J4nT7aEwVmTzUhdcjSeU0llUtIfvWa1thRlHl5ppFUPUA==)), former Under Secretary of State Keith Krach, Congresswoman Claudia Tenney (NY-22), Congressmen Mike Gallagher (WI-08) and Michael McCaul (TX-10), as well as by an ideologically diverse group of 31 other organizations united by their support for divestment. A copy of the letter was sent to each university, along with a specific list of entities targeted for divestment and the text of the Uyghur Genocide Divestment Pledge. The full text of the letter, pledge, and the full list of signatories can be seen [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AmWIZ4KtWPWSBY2g3Qlvxc6XhUyTwkSUElB3OYfjw7O8DwpD5ajZSqx30Im3vOlDPOssG-dboMPFR8DquVgdcSl_Dz1kKdK4m7ZUb78yQRfr0nlEFpIJWWny6WDB6hvuBSvLb6f6vR8kyJ-UGqeH2L5UNYOXHQQMTNy0LBPtAP4HxHMulOkO_QDutrHlQCXdddiwCxmNnBDrPMkQ2LNTT6fdzYidF4BR3xpsLd8PQvfeW_amwv0HLxkDErsWNtmqL7_K01Ec17c=&c=7v15_rTJWcBBddvHzxCgzcggxGT0lm8ud8vvbh31VERV3g9GARbteA==&ch=zJmpyq8U3J4nT7aEwVmTzUhdcjSeU0llUtIfvWa1thRlHl5ppFUPUA==).

Catholic University in Washington became the first university to divest, Yale University is presently under a review process and grassroots student efforts have begun at Georgetown University, George Washington University, the University of Virginia, Cornell and UCLA.

"I look forward to the work ahead with the Athenai Institute and want to express my heartfelt gratitude to all those that participated in our Virginia 10th Congressional District nomination process. It was a privilege being one of the candidates and meeting so many caring individuals. Thank you." Max concluded.

-END-

clean_body: Athenai Educates On Chinese Communist Party Influence | | | | | | | == | The Athenai Institute is a nonpartisan, student-founded movement devoted to removing the influence of the Chinese Communist Party from American college campuses. | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE CONTACT: Ron Wright 703-663-0757 mailto:media@calebmax.com == | == | == | | Dear Friends: Thank you for your support during my recent campaign for Congress. I truly want to express my deep appreciation for all your assistance. As you will read below, I am returning to the organization I co-founded called The Athenai Institute. I hope you will take a few minutes to review our activities and consider making a == to our educational efforts regarding the human and religious rights violations by the Chinese Communist Party. Again, thank you for your support both for my campaign and for the outstanding activities at The Athenai Institute. It has been the honor of a lifetime campaigning across the 10th district and meeting thousands of amazing Virginians. May God Bless, Caleb P.S. Follow Athenai's active Twitter account (==). | | == == == | | FORMER CONGRESSIONAL CANDIDATE CALEB MAX RETURNS TO ATHENAI INSTITUTE HONORS THOSE CHINESE STUDENTS KILLED AT TIANANMEN SQUARE 33 YEARS AGO | | | ---|--- | (Leesburg) - The Athenai Institute announced today that its' Co-Founder and the former Virginia 10th Congressional District Candidate, Caleb Max, will return to the organization. The Athenai Institute is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization founded in May of 2020 to counteract Chinese Communist Party (CCP) influence on college campuses and advocating for universities to divest from entities complicit in the genocide of Uyghurs and other crimes against humanity. "Today we mark the 33rd anniversary of the Chinese Communists massacre of pro-democracy students and leaders in Tiananmen Square" Caleb Max stated, "Due to the suppression of Chinese citizens by the Communist Party, no candles will be lit and no religious memorial services will be held in Beijing, Shanghai, Hong Kong or elsewhere in China to remember the thousands that were killed on June 4, 1989. The Communist Party ensures that all memories of that horrible event have been erased across the country. These individuals need to be remembered and honored and not removed from history." "On the campaign trail I talked consistently about the threat of the Chinese Communist Party to our nation. Even though I cannot combat the CCP in Congress I will continue to advocate for the persecuted in China in the private sector. The Athenai Institute continues to be the best organization on college campuses alerting students on a bipartisan level about the Communist threat. I look forward to visiting campuses this Fall and getting universities to divest from the genocide occurring in China." Max added. The Athenai Institute was formed as a bipartisan educational effort to address CCP's influence through their over 100 Confucius Institutes on US campuses and at over 500 universities worldwide. There has been significant progress in closing those CCP funded entities. In April of this year, the Athenai Institute joined with 31 other organizations as part of the nationwide Uyghur genocide university divestment movement. The Institute released an == to the presidents and governing boards of all 50 United States flagship public universities calling on them to divest from entities complicit in the genocide of Uyghurs. Athenai's letter was co-signed by national political leaders, including former U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley (==), former Under Secretary of State Keith Krach, Congresswoman Claudia Tenney (NY-22), Congressmen Mike Gallagher (WI-08) and Michael McCaul (TX-10), as well as by an ideologically diverse group of 31 other organizations united by their support for divestment. A copy of the letter was sent to each university, along with a specific list of entities targeted for divestment and the text of the Uyghur Genocide Divestment Pledge. The full text of the letter, pledge, and the full list of signatories can be seen ==. Catholic University in Washington became the first university to divest, Yale University is presently under a review process and grassroots student efforts have begun at Georgetown University, George Washington University, the University of Virginia, Cornell and UCLA. "I look forward to the work ahead with the Athenai Institute and want to express my heartfelt gratitude to all those that participated in our Virginia 10th Congressional District nomination process. It was a privilege being one of the candidates and meeting so many caring individuals. Thank you." Max concluded. -END- | | == | Watch Athenai Institute President John Metz on the Hugh Hewitt Show John Metz, President of the Athenai Institute, speaks with Hugh Hewitt on the situation with the Uyghur genocide in China and reviews Athenai's bipartisan advocacy for divestment from the Chinese government's atrocities. == or click above. | | | | | == | | == | | | | | | | Caleb Max | PO Box 4306, Leesburg, VA 20177 | | == Sent by mailto:media@maxforvirginia.com powered by == ==

By mail.
By dropbox.
Early, in-person.
On Election Day. body:
Every single article that talks about the Senate majority mentions Georgia. |
[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=fa4f743b8aa14c58bfbea1369ec317be&_e=86ZAsNwOltgOVThAry5KYuXLk1emkbk89_9Zy4lg2jgaRvIbkPICa4KFkLvPoyXl5FUiQel11fifj9A51mNGBcQPHVfFVf5svIO47ogUd1Ut_58pav_EZehnAw2TluCHt7vj48Oer4aYaIY_50PVA-TX8PGyx2DzNO9vLqDMPRdy0leJl3S3DXuPxfaT80NIyL44eyrsrVL61XixXmCwuBQbJ4v2mDUjkgdSkOUjKfghEZA08OzEWmALHLxVcrN1kd-a-hFbs6NGqYNbeIVLMPI7i9KZ1nf1P3UeGe-fOUBcrP05KfWOJsRCa8APlv4sho4gGgncqRWN6RxlswWx-JFNapjLa2LpX33fkQ0oviOw-o4UzyYJy385pZk8eH6gH2_nWsp51mU-AorPiAtZsqkhP2Xj4qwB79lByfR8WB90VqYqtQ-23WgurrmvIZoGirxWGgRppqAP61G0IeULdyrp3bOP5XtCCSggkLzYFcnfQ0clWLlNKSVAVjpvGtNq)

---
Peter,

Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia.

Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination.

**That very night, Democrats _officially_ began their barrage of attacks against me.**

We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues.

**This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States.**

**This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track.**

Peter, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - **total spending will likely exceed $200 million.**

As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden.

Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. **[Without your support, winning will be much more difficult.](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=fa4f743b8aa14c58bfbea1369ec317be&_e=86ZAsNwOltgOVThAry5KYuXLk1emkbk89_9Zy4lg2jgaRvIbkPICa4KFkLvPoyXl5FUiQel11fifj9A51mNGBcQPHVfFVf5svIO47ogUd1Ut_58pav_EZehnAw2TluCHt7vj48Oer4aYaIY_50PVA-TX8PGyx2DzNO9vLqDMPRdy0leJl3S3DXuPxfaT80NIyL44eyrsrVL61XixXmCwuBQbJ4v2mDUjkgdSkOUjKfghEZA08OzEWmALHLxVcrN1kd-a-hFbs6NGqYNbeIVLMPI7i9KZ1nf1P3UeGe-fOUAN1keRodd4Q2AZZZnWMvqe0jPP__xNArmwQKwJ6Zd9t87kXNa3o7kue8vkpugX-19U78eVapDJeFZW-Onwa7doZpNIwiMuKL37HV5caB1dAJSQ6HiCCpCZpAF8CliVuf0VQpwU0TRhpobwuj884UOwTyG6zpftw2ls4O9Me5NckN8H-XxgmErs5fWu1pxXO2lzif1lCsC6ABNmF5TfjPMa)**

[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $2 -> **](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=fa4f743b8aa14c58bfbea1369ec317be&_e=86ZAsNwOltgOVThAry5KYuXLk1emkbk89_9Zy4lg2jgaRvIbkPICa4KFkLvPoyXl5FUiQel11fifj9A51mNGBcQPHVfFVf5svIO47ogUd1Ut_58pav_EZehnAw2TluCHt7vj48Oer4aYaIY_50PVA-TX8PGyx2DzNO9vLqDMPRdy0leJl3S3DXuPxfaT80NIyL44eyrsrVL61XixXmCwuBQbJ4v2mDUjkgdSkOUjKfghEZA08OzEWmALHLxVcrN1kd-a-hFbs6NGqYNbeIVLMIl3JGn1Hn9-NB82xJOd1Et96rYrFTfPh9WwERVAEai1NCB8XkVn9e-Rt0I54A_7H1Zzf3PMaKr07Hu8em6jDzIM3W2a_EmvZlpTpFAvwIEQhDqC-wnHasWhD2XDbyUdIpCbjftL0_vDHU8iIFerweD23VLnURtOYwB_3HKSvwov51YVfAAQND7DM38ljvE43hYIhMLOw4J8AaDVWr6Nw0RS_vuOo3L1KOQDOXHg_DYgVn3azRSV-gaeXg31u3gM-A%3D%3D)
[** HELP US FIGHT BACK WITH $4 -> **](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=fa4f743b8aa14c58bfbea1369ec317be&_e=86ZAsNwOltgOVThAry5KYuXLk1emkbk89_9Zy4lg2jgaRvIbkPICa4KFkLvPoyXl5FUiQel11fifj9A51mNGBcQPHVfFVf5svIO47ogUd1Ut_58pav_EZehnAw2TluCHt7vj48Oer4aYaIY_50PVA-TX8PGyx2DzNO9vLqDMPRdy0leJl3S3DXuPxfaT80NIyL44eyrsrVL61XixXmCwuBQbJ4v2mDUjkgdSkOUjKfghEZA08OzEWmALHLxVcrN1kd-a-hFbs6NGqYNbeIVLMH4sCpW4qmpDsfw_Z-pcCzEzGMDBf3W6Odf5i7trjCnxYz0QCIYD3pclghT909AC9ztFW4TAJwkOKYTgpmA1Kwm_OE6FdXzIy0GKvc5v34YkNoG4yb3WZ3reV1cnbJ2xhfCOO-yo0kCQ29FRJ-NJYzyoHKOLMsXlL1OQsoiHE22g3fNwzbaLTBemOjBe6ATUnKJuL2mCCBjgKtBvOiYxK6C0lT79bUsg--PmnyQCBeYt8be4fYC1k0H5JFtjA3dNMg%3D%3D)
Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - _I know what it's like to be in the big leagues._

Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. clean_body: Every single article that talks about the Senate majority mentions Georgia. | Peter, Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia. Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination. That very night, Democrats officially began their barrage of attacks against me. We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues. This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States. This race is about winning back the Senate majority and charting a MAJOR course correction to get our country back on track. Peter, Georgia will likely be the most expensive general election race in the nation this year - total spending will likely exceed $200 million. As of today, Dems have committed to spend more than $60 million in ads - mostly to attack me - because they can't defend Senator Raphael Warnock's rubber stamp record of voting 96% of the time with President Biden. Our campaign MUST be able to fight back. I need YOUR help to do that. Critics are saying that I'm in a "whole different league" now that I've made it out of the Republican primary. The truth is - I know what it's like to be in the big leagues. Senator Warnock, Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and national Democrats don't want to talk about inflation, gas prices, baby formula, broken borders, or rising crime because they don't have any solutions other than doubling down on their disastrous policies. Instead, they are focusing on disgusting and racist attacks against me. If you share our belief that the voters in a swing state like Georgia need to know just how dramatically Democrats have messed things up in the year since they took power, Help us make this a referendum on Biden and Warnock's policies, Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46133938/348957898/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1121-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNjYTZjNy01YWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WV5ajtqwN16722kZCWvCfbVgnORhh7clXjQm1ftfMr4=)
Peter, yep, that's me in the top-left corner. This is my entire family – we even got our two dogs and pet ferret in the shot!
**As a kid growing up in a union family in rural Iowa, I've always known what it looks like to work hard for everything you've got.** My parents both worked hard to provide for our family – my mom in the public school system and my dad as a union pipefitter-welder.
They did everything to give my siblings and me a fair shot at life. **But as good-paying union jobs disappear and the cost of living skyrockets, it's getting harder and harder for parents to give their kids the opportunities they deserve.**
I'm running for U.S. Senate to fight for those working families and their kids. Everyone deserves a fair shot at a good life and a bright future – but right now, too many Iowans and Americans are getting left behind by out-of-touch politicians in Washington.
I'm in this fight because I care about my community – but after 47 years in Washington, my opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R), only cares about big corporate donors and DC lobbyists. He represents everything that's wrong with Washington, and in November, Iowans are going to show him the door.
**Now that he's facing record-low approval ratings, we've got a real momentum advantage. But I need you with me:[please, if you believe in winning a better future for our kids, can you rush $5 before tonight's midnight deadline to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46133939/348957899/805649176?&amount=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1121-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNjYTZjNy01YWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WV5ajtqwN16722kZCWvCfbVgnORhh7clXjQm1ftfMr4=)**

clean_body: | | | = Peter, yep, that's me in the top-left corner. This is my entire family – we even got our two dogs and pet ferret in the shot! As a kid growing up in a union family in rural Iowa, I've always known what it looks like to work hard for everything you've got. My parents both worked hard to provide for our family – my mom in the public school system and my dad as a union pipefitter-welder. They did everything to give my siblings and me a fair shot at life. But as good-paying union jobs disappear and the cost of living skyrockets, it's getting harder and harder for parents to give their kids the opportunities they deserve. I'm running for U.S. Senate to fight for those working families and their kids. Everyone deserves a fair shot at a good life and a bright future – but right now, too many Iowans and Americans are getting left behind by out-of-touch politicians in Washington. I'm in this fight because I care about my community – but after 47 years in Washington, my opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R), only cares about big corporate donors and DC lobbyists. He represents everything that's wrong with Washington, and in November, Iowans are going to show him the door. Now that he's facing record-low approval ratings, we've got a real momentum advantage. But I need you with me:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, – Abby | |

Friend, the stakes are rising higher than ever before, so we'll keep this quick – but the bottom line is that we CANNOT let our extremist possible opponent, Kari Lake (R), win this election. Here's why:
**FIRST, Trump saw how Kari Lake helped spread his "Big Lie"** about the 2020 election and **immediately threw his FULL SUPPORT behind her** dangerous campaign.
**THEN, Lake cemented her extremism by CELEBRATING the potential overturning of Roe v. Wade.** Lake has PROUDLY said she would BAN abortion in Arizona if she wins this race.
**NOW, GOP donors are throwing MILLIONS at Lake to keep Arizona red.** They know that if we defeat Lake, we'll defeat the era of GOP extremism in Arizona along with her – and experts agree that this race is _highly_ competitive. That's why they're spending millions of dollars to stop us.
Friend, The Washington Post confirmed that the ONLY surefire way to defeat this kind of extremism is to replace it with Democratic leadership – so we can't afford to fall short of a single fundraising goal.

**But at this critical moment, we're facing a $3,482 budget gap, and we're counting on you to help us close it. subject: Leave Our Guns Alone
body:
Leave Our Guns Alone | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8ee406b6d724/happy-new-year-6094605?e=6582090d83)
---
|
---
**TO: SOUTH CAROLINA REPUBLICANS****SCHOOL SAFETY PREPAREDNESS** Let me first respond to William Timmons mentor, Senator Lindsey Graham, “**leave our guns alone.** ”

When it comes to the safety of our children, we should NEVER settle for incremental, ad hoc improvements.

Schools across America must begin a new phase of anticipatory security measures to protect our loved ones. These security measures must be layered in nature to ensure the complete and total safety of our children.

We need to harden the confines and access of school buildings; increase the presence of armed law enforcement officers; rethink local community communication and information sharing strategies; institute community task forces, training, and preparedness academies; identify standard operating procedures and best practices; while proactively taking diagnosed mentally challenged and deranged individuals who are at risk to commit such dastardly and heinous crimes off the street for questioning, evaluation, and/or confinement.

Societal conditions have greatly deteriorated over the last many decades and we need to put policies and procedures in place to identify "signals" and "indicators" to increase our school safety preparedness levels.

Infringing our 2nd Amendment guns rights should **NOT** be part of the solution. We should never punish American citizens for the crimes of evil doers.

Let us begin anew to keep our precious loved ones safe!

VOTE Mike LaPierre for Congress
SC District 4 - Greenville and Spartanburg Counties

An experienced business executive and strategist that knows how to solve problems

I LIKE MIKE
God bless the beautiful state of SOUTH CAROLINA!
|
---
|
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: Add Your Name
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALEX GRAY FOR SENATE**
body:
Dear Peter: The only way to prevent further damage by the progressive left is to take back the Senate and elect an "America First" conservative like my friend Alex Gray. With the possibility of an all-out war in Europe, the inept Biden Administration brokering a catastrophic nuclear deal with Iran, an invasion on our southern border mired in people bringing COVID, sex trafficking and drugs, we need leaders like Alex Gray, who will fight to put America first. This will only get worse in the coming months, and since the Biden Administration is asleep at the wheel, our nation needs proven national security leaders guiding us. We cannot continue on the path the progressives in Washington are taking us down. It's time for fundamental change and after witnessing Alex's service under President Trump, I can think of no one better to shepherd that change. **[That's why I'm asking you to join me in endorsing Alex Gray for the U.S. Senate with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518785:JsOoZtoAN:m:1:3253819041:C3598C2484A0A0B5FE7EBBF4E13FDB9E:r "That’s why I’m asking you to join me in endorsing Alex
Gray for the U.S. Senate with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.")** My name is Kash Patel, and I am the former Chief of Staff to the Acting United States Secretary of Defense under President Donald Trump. I know firsthand the importance of keeping threats against the United States from taking shape and the type of leadership required to keep us safe. Alex served under President Trump from the 2016 campaign until the President's last day in office. In the White House, he was one of the key national-security officials who worked tirelessly to help keep America safe. Alex put America first and helped to thwart threats to our country. The United States would greatly benefit by having Alex continue to serve this great nation in the U.S. Senate. **[We urgently need proven conservative leadership in the U.S. Senate and that's why I'm writing you on behalf of Alex. Can you chip in $100, $250, or $500 today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518785:JsOoZtoAN:m:1:3253819041:C3598C2484A0A0B5FE7EBBF4E13FDB9E:r "We urgently need proven conservative leadership in the U.S. Senate
and that’s why I’m writing you on behalf of Alex. Can you chip in $100, $250, or $500 today?")** As you watch the events taking place in Ukraine, the White House or at our Southern Border, what further proof do you need to be certain that we need proven America First leaders, now more than ever? With Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer calling the shots, America's suffered enough from "experienced politicians" who promote progressive policies while trying to control the citizenry. Unlike the leaders we have in Washington today, Alex is committed to upholding our Constitution as the Founding Fathers intended, ensuring we have a government accountable to the people while keeping us safe. I am proud to join a long list of Former Trump Administration officials and other great conservative leaders who have joined Team Gray:
* Acting Attorney General Matt Whitaker
* Acting Secretary of Defense Chris Miller
* Ambassador Robert O'Brien
* Ambassador Ric Grenell
* Ambassador David Friedman
* Lt. Gen Keith Kellog, USA (Ret.)
* U.S. Senator Mike Lee
* Rep. Paul Gosar
* Sheriff Joe Arpaio
* Governor Pete Wilson

Isn't it time for you to add your name to this great list of freedom-loving Americans who are a part of Team Gray? **[Act now and add your name alongside mine and other great leaders who have joined Team Gray! If you love America as much as Alex and I do, then dig deep to help Alex win with your $500, $1,000, or any amount you can afford.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518785:JsOoZtoAN:m:1:3253819041:C3598C2484A0A0B5FE7EBBF4E13FDB9E:r "Act
now and add your name alongside mine and other great leaders who have joined Team Gray! If you love America as much as Alex and I do, then dig deep to
help Alex win with your $500, $1,000, or any amount you can afford.")** Supporting Alex will help us win the Senate majority back and remove Chuck Schumer from power while stopping Biden's disastrous policies. **[Join Team Gray today and let's Save America together!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60518785:JsOoZtoAN:m:1:3253819041:C3598C2484A0A0B5FE7EBBF4E13FDB9E:r "Join Team Gray today and
let’s Save America together!")** God Bless America, Kash Patel
Former Senior Trump Advisor
---
| **PAID FOR BY ALEX GRAY FOR SENATE**
---

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We’re going to be working non-stop to make sure we talk to every voter possible from now until November 8th. |
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=4f18b2e6e8404f6ead6d2b636a3c565c&_e=rX6pK5Y6xaXuUvyb99TYhhmGgT703emeSUcNyB0dbfCxqV_paKuJurfPRIoHiaDwpvEBg5Tejvs61cKdBgZ6gPI4PtqgUmvDSwTgCmoeO-8zhQxRctgBDUeGe7RrTlnFG7cInt7GxdWyvVhydGEDpNUOFujm0EDwlP20c7nsoUwtoVJ3IfZAbjNvgDBVM-6n--d6FKGNKTYWsqdIsPDEVaenO6u3LTyn5appL5bAsrMjcSeCw2vFymNtXoqSc0g9nsO3KwuPdRaXxjGk1LPJbfFMQfGimb_UWsPSnTc6VMKpOiXoIjumksqtdW0EDvJicp)

Fellow American,

Every vote matters.

Team Herschel is going to be working EVERY DAY through November 8th to secure Georgians' votes to win this Senate seat and help Republicans take back the majority.

Fellow American, that's where you come in. name: Sarah Godlewski
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
This little Wisconsin cheese curd and I want to wish you a happy National Cheese Day! This little Wisconsin cheese curd and I want to wish you a happy National Cheese Day! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46132051/348948873/584544606?refcode=em22_220603_cheese_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220603_cheese_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjk4MzQ2Yy00NWU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CsVjziQ9_PxgdLKX7OTDnxzQxcQvejOSfiw28HVyCIU=) As a working mom, I'm used to wearing a lot of hats — and this November, I'm hoping to put on one more: **U.S. Senator for Wisconsin.**

Like so many folks in our state, I’m fed up with Ron Johnson’s refusal to fight for the issues that matter most to working families. And I’m frustrated by our 50/50 Senate majority getting blocked by a minority of Republicans at every turn. I got in this fight to change that.

When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight to lower everyday costs, protect our democracy, defend reproductive freedom, bring down prescription drug costs, pass gun safety legislation — and end the filibuster if that’s what it takes to get it all done.

Unlike Ron Johnson, I'm ready to be a U.S. Senator for the people of Wisconsin — not the big political donors or special interests. That's why I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Instead, I'm counting on the support of this grassroots team to flip this Senate seat blue.

clean_body: This little Wisconsin cheese curd and I want to wish you a happy National Cheese Day! This little Wisconsin cheese curd and I want to wish you a happy National Cheese Day! = As a working mom, I'm used to wearing a lot of hats — and this November, I'm hoping to put on one more: U.S. Senator for Wisconsin. Like so many folks in our state, I’m fed up with Ron Johnson’s refusal to fight for the issues that matter most to working families. And I’m frustrated by our 50/50 Senate majority getting blocked by a minority of Republicans at every turn. I got in this fight to change that. When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight to lower everyday costs, protect our democracy, defend reproductive freedom, bring down prescription drug costs, pass gun safety legislation — and end the filibuster if that’s what it takes to get it all done. Unlike Ron Johnson, I'm ready to be a U.S. Senator for the people of Wisconsin — not the big political donors or special interests. That's why I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Instead, I'm counting on the support of this grassroots team to flip this Senate seat blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Together, we can defeat Ron Johnson and return this seat to the people of Wisconsin. Thank you, sincerely, for being a part of this campaign. — Sarah Godlewski Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. With your help, we can flip this seat. Chip in to join us: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

body:
Every single article that talks about the Senate majority mentions Georgia. |
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=04b62e2e2a974b5b9d6446ce5c281c31&_e=PcZPpvlWsVDzMviGUrCJJI-wZVoF6ElpJcRVHzeqORQGXxjq1r12o8MuF84-98e_LfXPARGHF-EZ37JajT2b6NIAEbAGQ-8oqsBvXjDVeJkN5ahndBwkDO8ncU8TojrwYi43-waHWjfmkZHdy7AG-i_RhvYRz_YyvrE_kv8ciYjvoF4n4_Aj-T3MT0GImrIC3HnzlX8LUZ8CjNU6q1xtkr3cjUrB8MnZuImA_Wea0hUlTcFAPm4eFJIfg84eSFb_XWrz9dsbbwsJSTNYCR0Q2VLj5j2VIhh280mbNrlFsH76e-h8CwT4WsVe-uBYjQu645QqcJhscHbOhPaPe9sMHi4OhdPH4rWD99cKzHC0dYPjtDQjezMcARVisZjsggoapkt6BpS7rThaqSL88mDfPOSQTlKNgAn6PQYLw_veUTKv_kDGJ7LNlnrsli6WR8gf_usF-M2IKHXrZOfe70YUHcyFCZV_uP5jVdPduOtRPm9VJkVCkUf4aVEBzfidkHmU)

---
Fellow American,

Last week marked the beginning of the general election here in Georgia.

Our primary victory party was the last chance to celebrate all the hard work that we've done to clinch the Republican Senate nomination.

**That very night, Democrats _officially_ began their barrage of attacks against me.**

We knew that the attacks would come quickly - and that they would be fierce. Democrats will do their best to ignore and deflect. They want to do anything to avoid talking about the issues.

**This Senate race isn't about me. This race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States.**

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: Can you guess Dr. Oz’s net worth?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
With enough money and fame to buy his way to the top, Dr. Oz is a serious threat.
#
Derek, it became official last night: **Dr. Oz is officially John’s Republican opponent for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.**_Seriously._
And look, he might be a kind of a quack — but he’s a very, *very* wealthy one.
**With a net worth of $100-400 million, Oz can spend virtually unlimited sums to keep Pennsylvania Red. 🔴**
[**_We can’t let Dr. Oz anywhere near the U.S. Senate. Please, Derek, can you donate $5 or more to our people-powered campaign to stop him from buying his way to Washington?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220604-2?refcode=em20220604-6104&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6104_434096_T4bASZ&akid=6104%2E434096%2ET4bASZ)
**[Donate to Stop Dr. Oz »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220604-2?refcode=em20220604-6104&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6104_434096_T4bASZ&akid=6104%2E434096%2ET4bASZ)**
The biggest mistake we could make right now is underestimating Dr. Oz.
Yes, he’s a celebrity doctor.
Yes, he’s spent the two last decades profiting off of questionable health products and advice that “endangers patients.”
Yeah, he’s from New Jersey and only moved to Pennsylvania to run for Senate.
But, we know another rich celebrity that the politicians and pundits underestimated. **His name is Donald Trump and he won Pennsylvania in 2016.**
With enough money and fame to buy his way to the top, Dr. Oz is a serious threat to not only outspend us on the airwaves but win the whole damn thing.
The good news is we have been preparing for this very moment. We have one of the biggest grassroots teams Pennsylvania’s ever seen. And if we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign Dr. Oz just by the sheer force of our numbers. That’s why we’re asking you right now...
[**_Please make a $5 donation to help us fight Dr. Oz’s money onslaught. Whether you can give $5 or $50 or $500, it doesn’t matter. What’s important is that we all do it together._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220604-2?refcode=em20220604-6104&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6104_434096_T4bASZ&akid=6104%2E434096%2ET4bASZ)
**[Donate Now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220604-2?refcode=em20220604-6104&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6104_434096_T4bASZ&akid=6104%2E434096%2ET4bASZ)**
Let’s win this thing,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220604-6104-footer&t=2&refcode2=6104_434096_T4bASZ&akid=6104%2E434096%2ET4bASZ)**

clean_body: With enough money and fame to buy his way to the top, Dr. Oz is a serious threat. Derek, it became official last night: Dr. Oz is officially John’s Republican opponent for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.Seriously. And look, he might be a kind of a quack — but he’s a very, very wealthy one. With a net worth of $100-400 million, Oz can spend virtually unlimited sums to keep Pennsylvania Red. 🔴 The biggest mistake we could make right now is underestimating Dr. Oz. Yes, he’s a celebrity doctor. Yes, he’s spent the two last decades profiting off of questionable health products and advice that “endangers patients.” Yeah, he’s from New Jersey and only moved to Pennsylvania to run for Senate. But, we know another rich celebrity that the politicians and pundits underestimated. His name is Donald Trump and he won Pennsylvania in 2016. With enough money and fame to buy his way to the top, Dr. Oz is a serious threat to not only outspend us on the airwaves but win the whole damn thing. The good news is we have been preparing for this very moment. We have one of the biggest grassroots teams Pennsylvania’s ever seen. And if we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign Dr. Oz just by the sheer force of our numbers. That’s why we’re asking you right now... Let’s win this thing, Team Fetterman | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

subject: A few bucks could make a big difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=303%2E5257348%2E6bWXz3 ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Hi Derek,

We're reaching out today to ask for your donation because we're about to
hit the deadline to make our final online ad reservations and make our
final push on the ground in Los Angeles heading into Tuesday's primary
election.

Getting the word out is more important now than ever since this is Adam's
first time running in California’s newly-drawn 30th congressional
district. Tens of thousands of voters have never seen Adam's name on a
ballot until now, and we need to make sure they hear from our campaign
before they cast their vote.

We're running a robust get-out-the-vote effort to turn out as many voters
as possible — and even chipping in just a few bucks could make the
difference.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220604_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=303%2E5257348%2E6bWXz3 ]Derek, can you pitch in $10, or any amount, today to help us
mobilize voters in this final stretch?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2022_abs_em.MhlmI3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220604_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=303%2E5257348%2E6bWXz3 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2022_abs_em.rfaCVT&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220604_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=303%2E5257348%2E6bWXz3 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2022_abs_em.DoGQ0c&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220604_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=303%2E5257348%2E6bWXz3 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jun2022_abs_em.P8MHmG&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220604_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=303%2E5257348%2E6bWXz3 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220604_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=303%2E5257348%2E6bWXz3 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Making sure these new voters hear directly from us is so crucial,
especially with how frequently Adam's name is being thrown around by Fox
News fearmongers like Tucker Carlson, Trump himself, and his right-wing
cronies.

Reserving these ads and hitting the precincts one last time ensures that
voters will be able to see exactly who Adam is and learn about the work
he's done to defend our democracy and push for progressive values.

The only thing standing in our way is the resources. Reaching folks in the
Los Angeles area isn’t cheap, and our campaign is depending on grassroots
contributions not only to get us where we need to be, but to ensure we
enter the general election with the resources necessary to defend our
House majority all across California and the entire country.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2022_abs_em.pEwDN5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220604_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=303%2E5257348%2E6bWXz3 ]Can you chip in a few bucks today to help us pay for this final primary
push? Any amount helps.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

After everything he has done for our country, the least we can do is give our 45th President the best day ever.

_I know you wish President Trump was still in the White House, Peter._

name: Tim Ryan
subject: re: the Equality Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=4018%2E3611125%2EJ2ylLi ][IMG]

Happy Pride Month, folks!

I’m proud to stand with the LGBTQ+ community and advocates who are
fighting for equality—because all Ohioans deserve to live their lives
safely, with dignity, and free from discrimination.

This Pride Month, I encourage everyone to take a moment to reflect on the
progress we’ve made, while also understanding the work is far from done.

We must keep fighting to make the promise of equality a reality for our
LGBTQ+ friends and loved ones.

The Equality Act is a critical and necessary step toward ensuring we’re
living up to our foundational values of equality and freedom for all. The
bill would ban discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and
gender identity at the federal level.

I was proud to vote in favor of the Equality Act as a member of the House
of Representatives.

But after last year’s clear Republican obstruction of the bill, I
understand the only way we’re ever going to secure equal rights for the
LGBTQ+ community is by expanding our Democratic Senate majority this fall.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14029?t=1009&amount=25&akid=4018%2E3611125%2EJ2ylLi ]That’s why I’m humbly asking you to join our campaign and help us win
the race that will decide Senate control in November. Equality is on the
ballot, and we need your support.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14029?t=1010&amount=25&akid=4018%2E3611125%2EJ2ylLi ]Donate

Sincerely,

Tim Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/14034?t=1007&akid=4018%2E3611125%2EJ2ylLi ]Tim Ryan headshot

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=4018%2E3611125%2EJ2ylLi ][IMG]

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

body:
No debate about it: I show up for the people of Utah! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/022d5c521fe4/lets-talk-about-it-7269221?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=e43e0292f7&e=10c1db3257)
---
|
---
| Friend,

This past Wednesday and Thursday, **I showed up to answer questions and share my vision for a better future with the people of Utah** at the [Utah GOP Senate Debate](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=7298a88fea&e=10c1db3257) and the debate hosted by the Utah Debate Commission.

**The Utah GOP Senate Debate was the first time Mike Lee has faced an opponent in a primary debate since he first ran for the Senate against Bob Bennet 12 years ago!** Mike Lee wasn't willing to debate until the Republican Party offered to host the debate.

**I was also at the Utah Debate Commission’s Senate Debate, but faced an empty podium.** Mike Lee is not showing up for the people of Utah!

Utahns are tired of politicians who have broken promises and contribute to a broken congress. **I am showing up for you and I’m asking you to help share my vision by making a donation today.**
---
|
---
| [DONATE $22](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=e5720cb2e0&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE $22")
---
| | [DONATE $122](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=7de32864cd&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE $122")
---
| [DONATE $222](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=fea9b36ec1&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE $222")
---
| **At the end of the day, this election is not about me or Mike Lee. It's about you—the voters and people of this great state. **

Mike Lee and he can sit out all he wants.**I will always listen to and show up for the people of Utah.**

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. subject: 📺 See me take on Fox News here 👀

body:
| | | Hi there, The past week has been exciting! First I went on [Fox News live](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46134960/348987510/1262485506?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTljMjc0ZS03ZmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9KiWeZE0fj9NaoG8J0rmXmTZnSkH68gegIRBHHHiGo=&emci=828549a3-78e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=499c274e-7fe4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=8222569) with Jesse Watters. Then I went on [Newsmax live](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46134961/348987511/340356015?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTljMjc0ZS03ZmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9KiWeZE0fj9NaoG8J0rmXmTZnSkH68gegIRBHHHiGo=&emci=828549a3-78e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=499c274e-7fe4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=8222569) (bright and early at 6am my time). And then [Kyle Kulinksi covered](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46134962/348987512/-392601652?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTljMjc0ZS03ZmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9KiWeZE0fj9NaoG8J0rmXmTZnSkH68gegIRBHHHiGo=&emci=828549a3-78e4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=499c274e-7fe4-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=8222569) my Fox appearance. Our campaign’s message is resonating with people across WA-06 and the country. Why? Because it just makes sense. In the richest country on Earth, no one should be hungry, homeless, without healthcare, or in poverty. It’s time to end America’s war on the poor and bring more people into the middle class. We do that by enacting a $30 minimum wage, Housing for All, Medicare for All, expanding Social Security, canceling student debt, and starting a national jobs program. How do we pay for it? By subsidizing the 99%, not the 1%. For example, we could subsidize American small businesses to pay their workers $30 instead of subsidizing multinational corporations to give their CEOs million-dollar payouts. This is a winning message. In 2020, I got 35,000 votes, and now I’m here to finish the job. [**I’ve got a busy week coming up, with volunteers across the district ready to talk to voters and spread our message. If you can, please fund our volunteers’ work here. We have a LOT of posters and postcards to get made at our local union printer. Thank you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/46134963/348987513/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTljMjc0ZS03ZmU0LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n9KiWeZE0fj9NaoG8J0rmXmTZnSkH68gegIRBHHHiGo=) ---
| | Peter,

I’m coming to you in confidence because you’ve been one of my strongest supporters. We’re just 3 days away from election day and voters are already casting their ballots. But our team is still [$12,309 short of funding our get out the vote budget.](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=17f1dce609&e=8a657725d1)

This is more than a bit embarrassing because the entire Republican Party is counting on us to defeat Katie Porter. This seat is one of the 5 seats Republicans need to flip to take back the House!

So, in confidence, I’m urgently asking you to help before this news spreads far and wide. Will you help us make up the deficit ASAP?
---
| [DONATE $20](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=a521aa0e1d&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE $20")

| If you are considering making a donation at any point in this 2022 campaign to take back the House, now is the time to do it and this race is the one to invest in.

Katie Porter has been a hypocritical disaster as a Member of Congress – voting to increase spending, which in turn created massive inflation, and then turning around and complaining about her grocery bill on national TV. She even suggest abortion was a good solution to inflation!

[So, you see, we have to defeat her and to do that, we need to fully fund our Get Out The Vote Budget. Please, will you help us raise another $12,309 before it's too late**?**](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=11602cc2b8&e=8a657725d1)

| Thank you,
Scott Baugh
